meaning: n. 寝具 adj. 适于花坛种植的 vt. 把…栽入苗床（bed的ing形式）
example: The beddings were clean and soft.
exampleChinese: 这些寝具又干净又柔软。

meaning: conj. 尽管
example: Although it was late, she kept studying.
exampleChinese: 尽管已经很晚了，她还是继续学习。

meaning: n. 努力
example: His effort helped the team win.
exampleChinese: 他的努力帮助球队赢了。

meaning: n. 偏爱，倾向
example: She has a preference for tea over coffee.
exampleChinese: 她更偏爱茶而不是咖啡。

meaning: prep. 在…之下 adv. 在下方
example: The cat slept beneath the table.
exampleChinese: 那只猫睡在桌子下面。

meaning: n. 货币
example: You can pay for the book in local currency.
exampleChinese: 你可以用当地货币买这本书。

meaning: n. 温暖
example: The blanket gave us warmth on the cold night.
exampleChinese: 那条毯子在寒冷的夜晚给了我们温暖。

meaning: v. 使适应
example: Children can adapt quickly to a new school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们能很快适应新学校。

meaning: v. 改写 n. 重写或改写的文稿
example: Please rewrite the sentence in your notebook.
exampleChinese: 请把这个句子改写在你的笔记本上。

meaning: num. 十四 n. 十四的记号
example: There are fourteen students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有十四名学生。

meaning: v. 蒸，散发 n. 蒸汽 adj. 蒸汽的
example: Steam rose from the hot soup.
exampleChinese: 热汤冒出了蒸汽。

meaning: n. 钢琴
example: She plays the piano after dinner.
exampleChinese: 她晚饭后弹钢琴。

meaning: adj. 坚定的 v. 使坚定 adv. 稳固地
example: He stayed firm in his decision.
exampleChinese: 他对自己的决定很坚定。

meaning: v. 烤，烘焙 n. 烤
example: We bake bread every Sunday morning.
exampleChinese: 我们每周日早上烤面包。

meaning: v. 提议，建议 vt. 建议
example: I suggest that we start early tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我建议我们明天早点出发。

meaning: adv. 快乐地
example: The children laughed happily in the park.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在公园里快乐地笑着。

meaning: adj. 无常的
example: The weather here is changeable in spring.
exampleChinese: 这里春天的天气很无常。

meaning: v. 发生
example: What will happen at the meeting?
exampleChinese: 会议上会发生什么？

meaning: n. 溪流 v. 流
example: A small stream ran through the forest.
exampleChinese: 一条小溪流过森林。

meaning: adj. 晚的 adv. 晚
example: We arrived late for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们赶火车晚了。

meaning: int. 喂！（引起注意等） n. 干草（等于hay）
example: Hey, please wait for me!
exampleChinese: 喂，请等我一下！

meaning: n. 费用 v. 使充电
example: The phone charge is very low now.
exampleChinese: 这部手机现在电量很低。

meaning: v. 治疗 n. 请客 vt. 对待， 看待
example: The nurse will treat the patient kindly.
exampleChinese: 护士会友好地照顾病人。

meaning: v. 简化
example: We can simplify the problem with a chart.
exampleChinese: 我们可以用图表来简化这个问题。

meaning: n. 政治家
example: The statesman spoke for peace.
exampleChinese: 这位政治家为和平发声。

meaning: n. 预约，预订
example: I made a reservation for dinner at seven.
exampleChinese: 我预约了晚上七点的晚餐。

meaning: n. 框架，骨架
example: The school built a new framework for the science project.
exampleChinese: 学校为这个科学项目搭建了一个新的框架。

meaning: v. 考虑
example: Please consider my idea before you decide.
exampleChinese: 请在你决定之前考虑一下我的想法。

meaning: n. 克
example: The bag of rice weighs one gram.
exampleChinese: 这袋大米重一克。

meaning: abbr. 数字化视频光盘（Digital Video Disk）
example: We watched a movie on a DVD last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚用DVD看了一部电影。

meaning: adj. 上级的 n. 上级，长官
example: Her superior praised her careful work.
exampleChinese: 她的上级表扬了她细心的工作。

meaning: n. 成就
example: This award is a great achievement for our team.
exampleChinese: 这个奖项是我们团队的一项巨大成就。

meaning: adj. 紧急的
example: We need an urgent answer before noon.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在中午前得到一个紧急答复。

meaning: n. 感觉，功能 v. 感觉到
example: I could sense that something was wrong.
exampleChinese: 我能感觉到有些不对劲。

meaning: v. 预见
example: No one can foresee the future exactly.
exampleChinese: 没有人能准确预见未来。

meaning: v. 试图，努力 n. 尝试
example: Please try again after you read the instructions.
exampleChinese: 请在你读完说明后再试一次。

meaning: n. 指南针，罗盘 v. 包围
example: He used a compass to find north on the hike.
exampleChinese: 他在徒步旅行中用指南针找到了北方。

meaning: n. 中小学的校长
example: The headteacher spoke to our class about being kind.
exampleChinese: 校长对我们班讲了要友善。

meaning: v. 赚，赚得 vt. 挣得
example: She works after school to earn money for a new bike.
exampleChinese: 她放学后打工为新自行车赚钱。

meaning: v. 收集 adv. 由收件人付款地 adj. 由收件人付款的
example: We collect leaves for our science project.
exampleChinese: 我们为科学项目收集树叶。

meaning: n. 面具 v. 掩饰
example: She wore a mask at the costume party.
exampleChinese: 她在化装舞会上戴了一个面具。

meaning: v. 假定 vt. 假定， 设想
example: We assume the store opens at nine.
exampleChinese: 我们假定这家商店九点开门。

meaning: n. 运动员，比赛者
example: The player ran fast and scored a goal.
exampleChinese: 这名运动员跑得很快，还进了一个球。

meaning: n. 修正
example: The teacher made a revision to the report.
exampleChinese: 老师对这份报告做了修正。

meaning: v. 种田，务农 n. 农场
example: My uncle likes to farm in the countryside.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔喜欢在乡下务农。

meaning: v. 群居 n. 蜂房，蜂巢
example: A hive can hold thousands of bees.
exampleChinese: 一个蜂巢可以容纳成千上万只蜜蜂。

meaning: n. 年
example: This year feels very busy.
exampleChinese: 今年感觉很忙。

meaning: v. 继续，延续
example: Please continue your story.
exampleChinese: 请继续讲你的故事。

meaning: v. 反驳
example: I cannot contradict her without proof.
exampleChinese: 没有证据，我不能反驳她。

meaning: adv. 通常
example: We usually eat dinner at six.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在六点吃晚饭。

meaning: v. 说服，劝说 adj. 空闲的
example: He tried to persuade me to join the team.
exampleChinese: 他试图说服我加入这个团队。

meaning: adj. 精神的 n. 精神病患者
example: The exam caused her a lot of mental stress.
exampleChinese: 这次考试给她带来了很大的精神压力。

meaning: v. 兜售，沿街叫卖 n. 鹰
example: A hawk soared over the field.
exampleChinese: 一只鹰在田野上空盘旋。

meaning: n. 衣服
example: His clothes are still wet from the rain.
exampleChinese: 他的衣服被雨淋后还是湿的。

meaning: adj. 塑料的 n. 塑料制品
example: This box is made of plastic.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子是塑料做的。

meaning: adj. 可怕的 adv. 很，非常
example: The weather was terrible yesterday.
exampleChinese: 昨天天气很可怕。

meaning: n. 床上用品
example: Please fold the bedclothes before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前把床上用品叠好。

meaning: v. 授予 n. 奖品
example: She won an award for her painting.
exampleChinese: 她因自己的画作获得了一个奖。

meaning: v. 围绕 n. 围绕物 adj. 环绕立体声的
example: Tall trees surround the small house.
exampleChinese: 高大的树木围绕着那座小房子。

meaning: n. 幽默（等于humor） v. 迁就
example: She used humour to make the class laugh.
exampleChinese: 她用幽默逗得全班大笑。

meaning: n. 女主人，女老板
example: The hostess greeted us at the door.
exampleChinese: 女主人在门口迎接了我们。

meaning: n. 演讲者
example: The speaker began with a short story.
exampleChinese: 演讲者以一个简短的故事开场。

meaning: adj. 成功的
example: Our team was successful in the final match.
exampleChinese: 我们队在决赛中取得了成功。

meaning: n. 机会，际遇 v. 偶然发生
example: This job gives me a chance to learn new skills.
exampleChinese: 这份工作给了我学习新技能的机会。

meaning: n. 盖子 vt. 给…盖盖子
example: Please put the lid on the jar.
exampleChinese: 请把盖子盖在罐子上。

meaning: n. 美元
example: This apple costs one dollar.
exampleChinese: 这个苹果一美元。

meaning: n. 人 v. 操纵
example: A tall man opened the door for us.
exampleChinese: 一位高个子男子为我们开了门。

meaning: num. 十个，十
example: There are ten apples in the basket.
exampleChinese: 篮子里有十个苹果。

meaning: v. 支付，付 n. 工资，薪水 adj. 收费的
example: I need to pay for my lunch.
exampleChinese: 我得付我的午餐钱。

meaning: prep. 低于，少于 adv. 在下面 adj. 下面的
example: The cat is sleeping under the table.
exampleChinese: 猫正在桌子下面睡觉。

meaning: adj. 领导的 n. 领导 v. 领导（lead的ing形式）
example: She played a leading role in the school drama.
exampleChinese: 她在学校戏剧中扮演了一个主要角色。

meaning: n. 亚洲
example: Asia is the largest continent.
exampleChinese: 亚洲是最大的洲。

meaning: n. 打字机
example: My grandfather still keeps an old typewriter.
exampleChinese: 我祖父还保留着一台旧打字机。

meaning: adj. 偶数的 adv. 甚至 v. 使平坦
example: Even my little brother could do it.
exampleChinese: 甚至我弟弟都能做到。

meaning: n. 行李
example: We packed our luggage before the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们在旅行前把行李打包好了。

meaning: v. 逃避，避开，避免 n. 逃跑
example: The bird made a quick escape through the window.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟迅速从窗户逃走了。

meaning: n. 粉 v. 使成粉末
example: The sugar will powder easily in the grinder.
exampleChinese: 糖在研磨机里很容易被磨成粉末。

meaning: n. 斑马 adj. 有斑纹的
example: We saw a zebra at the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们在动物园看见了一只斑马。

meaning: n. 大衣
example: He put on an overcoat before going out.
exampleChinese: 他出门前穿上了大衣。

meaning: n. 爆米花
example: We shared a bag of popcorn at the movie.
exampleChinese: 我们看电影时分着吃了一袋爆米花。

meaning: n. 事情
example: It was a serious affair for the whole family.
exampleChinese: 这对整个家庭来说是一件严肃的事情。

meaning: n. 管家 vi. 当服务员 vt. 管理
example: The steward showed us to our seats.
exampleChinese: 管家把我们领到座位上。

meaning: adj. 可获得的
example: Fresh bread is available at the bakery.
exampleChinese: 面包店有新鲜面包可买。

meaning: n. 进口，进口货 v. 输入，进口
example: Our country will import more oil this year.
exampleChinese: 我国今年将进口更多石油。

meaning: n. 碗柜
example: The cups are in the kitchen cupboard.
exampleChinese: 杯子在厨房的柜橱里。

meaning: n. 日期 v. 过时 vt. 约会
example: Please write the date at the top of the page.
exampleChinese: 请把日期写在页面顶部。

meaning: n. 污染
example: Air pollution is a serious problem in some cities.
exampleChinese: 空气污染在一些城市是个严重问题。

meaning: n. 罐 v. 冲突
example: The loud noise made the window jar.
exampleChinese: 那阵巨响使窗户震动了。

meaning: pron. 任何事
example: Did you buy anything at the store?
exampleChinese: 你在商店买了什么东西吗？

meaning: n. 悬浮
example: The suspension of the dust made the water look cloudy.
exampleChinese: 尘土悬浮在水中，使水看起来很浑浊。

meaning: adj. 意大利的 n. 意大利人
example: My neighbor is Italian and speaks three languages.
exampleChinese: 我的邻居是意大利人，会说三种语言。

meaning: n. 散文 v. 尝试
example: I finished my history essay last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚写完了历史短文。

meaning: adj. 诚实的，实在的
example: He is honest and never tells lies.
exampleChinese: 他很诚实，从不说谎。

meaning: adj. 新的，新鲜的 adv. 新近
example: She bought a new backpack yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天买了一个新书包。

meaning: n. 暂停 v. 暂停，停顿，中止
example: The teacher gave us a short pause before the next question.
exampleChinese: 老师在下一个问题前让我们短暂暂停了一下。

meaning: n. 日光
example: The flowers grew better in the warm sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些花在温暖的日光下长得更好。

meaning: v. 打扰
example: Please do not disturb my little brother.
exampleChinese: 请不要打扰我弟弟。

meaning: v. 分配
example: We distribute the books to every student.
exampleChinese: 我们把书分发给每个学生。

meaning: n. 马厩 adj. 稳定的 v. 被关在马厩
example: The stable horse stood quietly in its stall.
exampleChinese: 那匹马在马厩里安静地站着。

meaning: n. 稻草 adj. 稻草的
example: The roof was made of straw.
exampleChinese: 屋顶是用稻草做的。

meaning: adv. 因此
example: It was raining hard; therefore, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 雨下得很大，因此我们待在室内。

meaning: n. 踝关节，踝
example: I twisted my ankle while running.
exampleChinese: 我跑步时扭伤了脚踝。

meaning: n. 书店（等于bookshop）
example: We bought a notebook at the bookstore.
exampleChinese: 我们在书店买了一本笔记本。

meaning: n. 困苦
example: The family faced great hardship during the war.
exampleChinese: 这家人在战争期间面临很大的困苦。

meaning: v. 涂黄油于 n. 黄油
example: Please butter the bread for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 请给早餐的面包涂上黄油。

meaning: v. 使…延期 vt. 推迟
example: We will postpone the meeting until Monday.
exampleChinese: 我们会把会议推迟到星期一。

meaning: n. 物理学家
example: The physicist explained how light travels.
exampleChinese: 这位物理学家解释了光是如何传播的。

meaning: n. 灯笼
example: We hung a red lantern outside the door.
exampleChinese: 我们在门外挂了一个红灯笼。

meaning: n. 恐慌，惊慌 adj. 恐慌的 v. 使恐慌
example: There was panic when the fire alarm rang.
exampleChinese: 火警响起时，人们一阵恐慌。

meaning: n. 欧洲
example: My aunt lives in Europe now.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈现在住在欧洲。

meaning: v. 消失
example: The bird will disappear into the trees.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟会消失在树丛中。

meaning: adv. 往闹市区 adj. 市中心的 n. 市中心区
example: We took the subway downtown after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我们乘地铁去了市中心。

meaning: v. 问，询问
example: Please ask the teacher for help.
exampleChinese: 请向老师寻求帮助。

meaning: v. 娱乐 vt. 使快乐
example: The clown can amuse the children easily.
exampleChinese: 这个小丑很容易逗孩子们开心。

meaning: n. （批评判断的）标准
example: The teacher used one clear criterion for grading.
exampleChinese: 老师用了一个明确的评分标准。

meaning: n. 航天飞机 v. 使穿梭般来回移动
example: The shuttle carried astronauts into space.
exampleChinese: 航天飞机把宇航员送入了太空。

meaning: v. 出版
example: They will publish the book next month.
exampleChinese: 他们下个月将出版这本书。

meaning: n. 动物园
example: We saw pandas at the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们在动物园看到了熊猫。

meaning: adv. 或许 n. 假定
example: Perhaps we can go after lunch.
exampleChinese: 或许我们可以午饭后去。

meaning: n. 压力 v. 迫使
example: Too much pressure can make people tired.
exampleChinese: 太大的压力会让人疲惫。

meaning: n. 观察者
example: Each viewer wrote a different opinion.
exampleChinese: 每个观察者都写下了不同的看法。

meaning: n. 存在 adj. 存在的
example: Life is a journey of being and change.
exampleChinese: 生命是存在与变化的旅程。

meaning: n. 焦虑
example: She felt anxiety before the test.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前感到焦虑。

meaning: n. 原子
example: An atom is far too small to see with the eye.
exampleChinese: 原子小到肉眼无法看见。

meaning: n. 基础
example: Practice is the basis of good writing.
exampleChinese: 练习是写好文章的基础。

meaning: v. 恐吓 vt. 使人感到害怕
example: The loud noise can terrify small children.
exampleChinese: 巨大的噪音会吓坏小孩子。

meaning: adj. 电的 n. 电
example: My family uses an electric stove at home.
exampleChinese: 我家在家里使用电炉。

meaning: v. 使失望
example: I will not disappoint my team.
exampleChinese: 我不会让我的团队失望。

meaning: n. 干杯 v. 向…祝酒 vt. 向…敬酒
example: I ate eggs and toast for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了鸡蛋和吐司。

meaning: v. 爆炸，爆发
example: The gas can explode if it gets too hot.
exampleChinese: 如果气体太热，就可能爆炸。

meaning: v. 复述 vt. 重讲
example: Please retell the story in your own words.
exampleChinese: 请用你自己的话复述这个故事。

meaning: vt. 给加薪 n. 薪水
example: Her salary is enough to pay the rent.
exampleChinese: 她的薪水足够支付房租。

meaning: n. 骑自行车的人
example: The cyclist wore a helmet and gloves.
exampleChinese: 那个骑自行车的人戴着头盔和手套。

meaning: n. 腹痛，肚子痛
example: I had a stomachache after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我肚子疼。

meaning: n. 代理，中介
example: The travel agency helped us book the trip.
exampleChinese: 这家旅行代理帮我们预订了行程。

meaning: v. 用粉笔写 n. 粉笔 adj. 用粉笔写的
example: Please use chalk to write on the board.
exampleChinese: 请用粉笔在黑板上写字。

meaning: n. 尊严
example: She spoke with dignity even after the mistake.
exampleChinese: 即使犯了错，她说话时仍保持尊严。

meaning: adj. 努力的 adv. 努力地
example: She studies hard before every test.
exampleChinese: 她每次考试前都努力学习。

meaning: n. 一半 adv. 一半地 adj. 一半的
example: Half the cake is gone.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕的一半没了。

meaning: adj. 脆的
example: Be careful with the fragile glass.
exampleChinese: 请小心这只易碎的玻璃杯。

meaning: n. 同志
example: The comrade shared food with everyone.
exampleChinese: 这位同志把食物分给了大家。

meaning: n. 责任
example: It is our duty to keep the classroom clean.
exampleChinese: 保持教室整洁是我们的责任。

meaning: n. 堆 v. 累积
example: He put the books in a pile on the desk.
exampleChinese: 他把书堆在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 疲倦的 v. 穿
example: The shoes looked worn after many years.
exampleChinese: 这双鞋穿了很多年，看起来很旧。

meaning: v. 点击 n. 单击
example: Please click the button to start.
exampleChinese: 请点击按钮开始。

meaning: n. 天堂
example: Some people believe heaven is a peaceful place.
exampleChinese: 有些人相信天堂是一个宁静的地方。

meaning: adv. 注意地
example: The students listened attentively to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 学生们认真地听老师讲课。

meaning: n. 汉堡包，火腿汉堡
example: He ordered a hamburger and juice.
exampleChinese: 他点了一个汉堡包和一杯果汁。

meaning: adj. 高兴的 v. 满意
example: I was pleased to see your good work.
exampleChinese: 看到你的出色表现，我很高兴。

meaning: n. 扣环 int. 哎哟（突然疼痛时发出的声音）
example: Ouch, that needle hurt a little.
exampleChinese: 哎哟，那根针有点疼。

meaning: n. 木匠 v. 当木匠
example: My uncle is a carpenter.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔是一名木匠。

meaning: n. 长颈鹿
example: The giraffe is eating leaves.
exampleChinese: 长颈鹿正在吃树叶。

meaning: n. 循环 v. 使循环 vi. 骑自行车
example: The seasons cycle through the year.
exampleChinese: 四季在一年中循环更替。

meaning: n. 标题 v. 加上说明
example: The caption explained the photo clearly.
exampleChinese: 这条标题清楚地说明了这张照片。

meaning: v. 捻 n. 扭曲
example: She had to twist the lid open.
exampleChinese: 她不得不把盖子拧开。

meaning: v. 更喜欢 vt. 宁愿
example: I prefer tea to coffee in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早上我更喜欢喝茶，不喜欢喝咖啡。

meaning: n. 架子
example: Put the storybooks back on the shelf.
exampleChinese: 把故事书放回书架上。

meaning: adj. 民用的 n. 平民
example: The civilian area was kept safe.
exampleChinese: 平民区域被保护得很安全。

meaning: v. 拉 n. 拉，拉绳
example: Pull the door gently, please.
exampleChinese: 请轻轻把门拉开。

meaning: adv. 仍然 adj. 静止的，不动的 n. 寂静
example: She is still reading by the window.
exampleChinese: 她仍然在窗边看书。

meaning: n. 野生动植物 adj. 野生动植物的
example: We saw wildlife near the river.
exampleChinese: 我们在河边看到了野生动植物。

meaning: n. 训练
example: The soccer training ends before dinner.
exampleChinese: 足球训练在晚饭前结束。

meaning: adj. 无害的
example: This soap is harmless to the skin.
exampleChinese: 这种肥皂对皮肤无害。

meaning: v. 躺 n. 谎言 vi. 躺，卧，平放
example: I like to lie on the grass and read.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢躺在草地上看书。

meaning: adj. 口语的 v. 说（speak的过去分词）
example: The teacher gave us spoken instructions.
exampleChinese: 老师给了我们口头指示。

meaning: adj. 本国的 n. 本地人
example: She is a native speaker of English.
exampleChinese: 她以英语为母语。

meaning: adj. 有雾的
example: It was a foggy morning on the hill.
exampleChinese: 山上那天早晨有雾。

meaning: n. 长辈 adv. 更好的 adj. 较好的
example: This chair is better for your back.
exampleChinese: 这把椅子对你的背更好。

meaning: n. 主要部分，要点 adj. 主要的，最重要的
example: The main reason was the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 主要原因是大雨。

meaning: n. 会议 v. 会面
example: We have a meeting at ten o'clock.
exampleChinese: 我们十点钟开会。

meaning: n. 广告
example: I saw an advertisement for a new phone.
exampleChinese: 我看到一则新手机的广告。

meaning: n. 半圆
example: The children stood in a semicircle around the speaker.
exampleChinese: 孩子们围成半圆站在演讲者周围。

meaning: n. 先锋 v. 开辟
example: She was a pioneer in computer science.
exampleChinese: 她是计算机科学领域的先锋。

meaning: n. 纸 adj. 纸做的 v. 用纸糊
example: She wrote her name on a piece of paper.
exampleChinese: 她把自己的名字写在一张纸上。

meaning: n. 军官，警官 v. 指挥
example: The officer checked our IDs at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那位警官在门口检查了我们的证件。

meaning: n. 百万富翁 adj. 100万以上人口的
example: The millionaire donated money to the school.
exampleChinese: 这位百万富翁给学校捐了钱。

meaning: n. 纪念碑，纪念馆 adj. 记忆的
example: We left flowers at the memorial for the soldiers.
exampleChinese: 我们在纪念碑前为士兵献了花。

meaning: n. 嫉妒，妒忌
example: I felt envy when my sister won the prize.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹获奖时，我心里有些嫉妒。

meaning: v. 追求
example: The prince tried to woo the princess with music.
exampleChinese: 王子试着用音乐追求公主。

meaning: n. 山
example: We climbed the mountain before sunrise.
exampleChinese: 我们在日出前爬上了那座山。

meaning: v. 盖印 n. 印象，印记 vt. 留下印象
example: Her hard work will impress the teacher.
exampleChinese: 她的努力学习会给老师留下深刻印象。

meaning: n. 协会，联盟，社团
example: She joined the student association last term.
exampleChinese: 她上学期加入了学生协会。

meaning: n. 包，包裹 adj. 一揽子的 v. 打包
example: A package arrived at our door this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上一个包裹送到了我们门口。

meaning: n. 鲨鱼 v. 诈骗
example: We saw a shark in the sea show.
exampleChinese: 我们在海洋表演中看见了一条鲨鱼。

meaning: n. 种类 v. 分类
example: What sort of music do you like?
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪种音乐？

meaning: n. 牛
example: The ox pulled the heavy cart across the field.
exampleChinese: 那头牛把沉重的车拉过了田地。

meaning: v. 看护，护理 n. 护士
example: My aunt is a nurse at the town hospital.
exampleChinese: 我阿姨是镇医院的一名护士。

meaning: n. 敌人，仇敌 adj. 敌人的
example: The two countries were once enemy states.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家曾经是敌对国家。

meaning: n. 抓住 vt. 抓住， 紧握
example: She used both hands to grasp the rope tightly.
exampleChinese: 她用双手紧紧抓住绳子。

meaning: n. 电影 adj. 电影的
example: We watched a movie after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们看了一部电影。

meaning: n. 巧合
example: It was a coincidence that we wore the same coat.
exampleChinese: 我们穿了同一件外套，这真是巧合。

meaning: n. 外貌，外观
example: Her appearance changed a lot after the haircut.
exampleChinese: 她理发后外貌变化很大。

meaning: n. 衣服，服装 v. 给…穿衣服
example: The tailor made a warm garment for the child.
exampleChinese: 裁缝给孩子做了一件保暖的衣服。

meaning: adj. 农业的
example: The school started an agricultural project.
exampleChinese: 学校启动了一个农业项目。

meaning: v. 成为 vt. 变得
example: She wants to become a doctor someday.
exampleChinese: 她想有一天成为一名医生。

meaning: adj. 西方的，西部的 n. 西方人
example: This book explains western history.
exampleChinese: 这本书讲解西方历史。

meaning: v. 需要
example: These plants want more sunlight.
exampleChinese: 这些植物需要更多阳光。

meaning: n. 担心
example: His biggest worry is the exam tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他最大的担心是明天的考试。

meaning: n. 法律 vi. 起诉 vt. 控告
example: Everyone must follow the law.
exampleChinese: 每个人都必须遵守法律。

meaning: prep. 减，减去 n. 负号，减号 adj. 减的
example: Ten minus four equals six.
exampleChinese: 十减四等于六。

meaning: adj. 思考的 n. 思考 v. 思考（think的现在分词）
example: The students are thinking about the question.
exampleChinese: 学生们正在思考这个问题。

meaning: n. 管理
example: The new administration improved the city park.
exampleChinese: 新管理层改善了城市公园。

meaning: n. 眼睛 v. 注视，看
example: The baby has big brown eye s.
exampleChinese: 那个宝宝有一双棕色的大眼睛。

meaning: n. 结婚
example: Their marriage began in a small town church.
exampleChinese: 他们的婚姻始于小镇的一座教堂。

meaning: n. 五十 adj. 五十的
example: The box holds fifty crayons.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子里装着五十支蜡笔。

meaning: n. 扫帚 v. 扫除
example: Please put the broom back in the closet.
exampleChinese: 请把扫帚放回衣柜里。

meaning: v. 代表
example: She will represent our class in the speech contest.
exampleChinese: 她将代表我们班参加演讲比赛。

meaning: adv. 向前 prep. 到
example: We walked to school together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走路去学校。

meaning: adj. 近的 adv. 近 prep. 靠近
example: The supermarket is near my home.
exampleChinese: 超市在我家附近。

meaning: adj. 破旧的
example: He lived in a shabby house near the station.
exampleChinese: 他住在车站附近一间破旧的房子里。

meaning: n. 光荣，荣誉 v. 自豪，骄傲
example: The team played with great glory in the final match.
exampleChinese: 这个队在决赛中光荣地比赛。

meaning: n. 影响 v. 产生
example: The new bridge had a big effect on traffic.
exampleChinese: 这座新桥对交通有很大影响。

meaning: n. 释放
example: The country celebrated its liberation.
exampleChinese: 这个国家庆祝了它的解放。

meaning: v. 传真
example: Please fax the form to our office today.
exampleChinese: 请今天把这份表格传真到我们办公室。

meaning: n. 国家 v. 规定 adj. 国家的
example: Please state your name clearly.
exampleChinese: 请清楚地说出你的名字。

meaning: adj. 友好的 adv. 友善地
example: Our new neighbor is very friendly.
exampleChinese: 我们的新邻居非常友好。

meaning: adj. 向前的 adv. 向前地 v. 促进
example: Please step forward and say your name.
exampleChinese: 请向前走一步并说出你的名字。

meaning: n. 交换
example: We exchange gifts at the New Year party.
exampleChinese: 我们在新年聚会上交换礼物。

meaning: v. 假设 conj. 假使…结果会怎样 vi. 料想
example: I suppose he will arrive after lunch.
exampleChinese: 我想他会在午饭后到。

meaning: adj. 慷慨的，大方的
example: She was generous and shared her lunch with me.
exampleChinese: 她很大方，把午饭分给了我。

meaning: pron. 她的（所有格）
example: My pen is blue, and hers is black.
exampleChinese: 我的钢笔是蓝色的，她的是黑色的。

meaning: v. 说明 vt. 解释
example: Can you explain this rule to me?
exampleChinese: 你能给我说明一下这条规则吗？

meaning: adj. 有效的
example: Your ticket is still valid today.
exampleChinese: 你的票今天仍然有效。

meaning: v. 系 n. 领带
example: Please tie your shoes before running.
exampleChinese: 跑步前请系好你的鞋带。

meaning: adv. 然后 n. 那时
example: Finish your homework, then watch TV.
exampleChinese: 先完成作业，然后再看电视。

meaning: v. 缝合，缝上
example: My grandmother can sew a button back on quickly.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶能很快把纽扣缝回去。

meaning: adj. 不顾一切的
example: She felt desperate and called for help.
exampleChinese: 她感到不顾一切，便大声求助。

meaning: n. 牛排
example: He ordered a steak for dinner.
exampleChinese: 他晚餐点了一块牛排。

meaning: adj. 英国的 n. 英国人
example: My British teacher told us a story.
exampleChinese: 我的英国老师给我们讲了一个故事。

meaning: n. 水手，海员
example: The sailor waved from the ship.
exampleChinese: 那名水手在船上挥手。

meaning: n. 衣物 v. 穿着
example: I usually wear a hat in summer.
exampleChinese: 我夏天通常戴一顶帽子。

meaning: n. 邮资
example: The postage for this letter is high.
exampleChinese: 这封信的邮资很高。

meaning: n. 展示
example: Her presentation was clear and helpful.
exampleChinese: 她的展示清晰又有帮助。

meaning: adj. 潮湿的 n. 雨天 v. 弄湿
example: My shoes got wet in the rain.
exampleChinese: 我的鞋在雨里淋湿了。

meaning: v. 避免
example: We leave early to avoid heavy traffic.
exampleChinese: 我们早点出发以避免交通拥堵。

meaning: n. 怜悯，同情 v. 对……表示怜悯
example: I felt pity for the lost dog.
exampleChinese: 我对那只走失的狗感到同情。

meaning: n. 布置
example: We changed the arrangement of the desks.
exampleChinese: 我们改变了课桌的布置。

meaning: prep. 在…中间
example: She sat among her friends.
exampleChinese: 她坐在朋友们中间。

meaning: n. 作者 v. 创作出版
example: The author spoke about her new book.
exampleChinese: 这位作者谈到了她的新书。

meaning: n. 妈咪
example: Mommy read me a bedtime story.
exampleChinese: 妈咪给我读了一个睡前故事。

meaning: n. 盗窃
example: Police are investigating the theft.
exampleChinese: 警方正在调查这起盗窃案。

meaning: v. 沐浴 n. 洗澡
example: You can bathe in warm water after the walk.
exampleChinese: 散步后你可以在温水里洗澡。

meaning: n. 助手 adj. 辅助的，助理的
example: My assistant helped me organize the files.
exampleChinese: 我的助手帮我整理了文件。

meaning: n. 战役 v. 斗争
example: The battle lasted for three days.
exampleChinese: 这场战役持续了三天。

meaning: n. 豆腐
example: We ate beancurd and rice for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午餐吃了豆腐和米饭。

meaning: n. 前面 v. 面对 adj. 前面的
example: There is a small shop at the front of the school.
exampleChinese: 学校前面有一家小商店。

meaning: n. 工作 v. 使工作
example: My parents work in the same hospital.
exampleChinese: 我父母在同一家医院工作。

meaning: n. 黑板
example: The teacher wrote the homework on the blackboard.
exampleChinese: 老师把作业写在黑板上。

meaning: n. 洗手间
example: The washroom is next to the classroom.
exampleChinese: 洗手间在教室旁边。

meaning: adj. 法律的
example: Is this action legal in your country?
exampleChinese: 这种行为在你的国家合法吗？

meaning: v. 装满，使充满 n. 满足
example: Please fill the bottle with water.
exampleChinese: 请把瓶子装满水。

meaning: n. 罪行，犯罪 vt. 控告……违反纪律
example: He was charged with a serious crime.
exampleChinese: 他被指控犯了一项严重罪行。

meaning: n. 十五 adj. 十五的
example: My little cousin is fifteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我的小表弟今年十五岁。

meaning: adv. 的确 int. 真的（表示惊讶、怀疑、讽刺等）
example: Indeed, the answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 的确，答案是对的。

meaning: adj. 聪明的
example: The clever boy solved the math problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个聪明的男孩很快解出了这道数学题。

meaning: n. 垃圾 v. 拒绝
example: She had to refuse the invitation politely.
exampleChinese: 她不得不礼貌地拒绝邀请。

meaning: pron. 任何一个 adj. 无论哪个
example: Choose whichever color you like.
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪个颜色就选哪个。

meaning: n. 残留物 adj. 残余的
example: We ate the leftover soup.
exampleChinese: 我们喝了剩下的汤。

meaning: n. 基础 adj. 卑鄙的 v. 以…作基础
example: A good diet is the base of health.
exampleChinese: 良好的饮食是健康的基础。

meaning: n. 行动
example: The teacher asked us to take action at once.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们立刻采取行动。

meaning: adj. 天主教的 n. 天主教徒
example: My neighbor is a Catholic.
exampleChinese: 我的邻居是一位天主教徒。

meaning: v. 成功 vt. 继承
example: If we keep trying, we will succeed.
exampleChinese: 如果我们继续努力，我们就会成功。

meaning: n. 轨道 v. 追踪
example: The train moved slowly along the track.
exampleChinese: 火车沿着轨道缓缓行驶。

meaning: adj. 很少的 pron. 很少 n. 很少数
example: Few students were late today.
exampleChinese: 今天迟到的学生很少。

meaning: n. 城市 adj. 城市的
example: This city is busy even at night.
exampleChinese: 这座城市即使在晚上也很繁忙。

meaning: n. 星期日
example: We usually visit Grandma on Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在星期日去看望奶奶。

meaning: n. 宠物 v. 宠爱 adj. 宠爱的
example: My pet rabbit loves carrots.
exampleChinese: 我的宠物兔子喜欢胡萝卜。

meaning: prep. 到…里
example: She walked into the room quietly.
exampleChinese: 她安静地走进了房间。

meaning: v. 击败，战胜 n. 失败的事实 vt. 击败
example: Our team worked hard to defeat the visitors.
exampleChinese: 我们队努力击败了客队。

meaning: n. 十几岁的青少年
example: The teenager rides his bike to school every day.
exampleChinese: 那个十几岁的少年每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. 吉普车
example: He drove the jeep across the muddy road.
exampleChinese: 他开着吉普车穿过了泥泞的道路。

meaning: adj. 丰富的
example: We had ample time to finish the homework.
exampleChinese: 我们有充足的时间完成作业。

meaning: n. 镜子 v. 反射
example: I looked in the mirror before leaving home.
exampleChinese: 出门前，我照了照镜子。

meaning: n. 打字员
example: The typist typed the letter quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个打字员很快打好了这封信。

meaning: n. 体育场
example: The stadium was full of cheering fans.
exampleChinese: 体育场里坐满了欢呼的球迷。

meaning: n. 代用品 v. 替代 vt. 替换
example: Salt can be a good substitute for sugar in some recipes.
exampleChinese: 在某些食谱中，盐可以作为糖的替代品。

meaning: v. 雕刻
example: Dad can carve a bird from a piece of wood.
exampleChinese: 爸爸能用一块木头雕刻出一只鸟。

meaning: adj. 有关电的
example: Electrical wires run behind the wall.
exampleChinese: 电线从墙后穿过。

meaning: v. 大叫 n. 喊声
example: The kids began to yell when the game ended.
exampleChinese: 比赛结束时，孩子们开始大喊。

meaning: adj. 广泛的 adv. 广泛地 n. 大千世界
example: The river is wide in summer.
exampleChinese: 这条河在夏天很宽。

meaning: n. 葡萄
example: She put a grape in her lunch box.
exampleChinese: 她在午餐盒里放了一颗葡萄。

meaning: v. 辞职 n. 辞去职务
example: She decided to resign after five years in the job.
exampleChinese: 她在这份工作上干了五年后决定辞职。

meaning: n. 百分比
example: Only a small percentage of the class was absent.
exampleChinese: 班里只有很小一部分人缺席了。

meaning: adj. 结实的 n. 矮胖子
example: The stout table did not move at all.
exampleChinese: 那张结实的桌子一点也没动。

meaning: adj. 最终的 n. 决赛
example: This is my final answer.
exampleChinese: 这是我最终的答案。

meaning: adj. 某一 pron. 某些
example: A certain student left this notebook here.
exampleChinese: 某个学生把这本笔记本落在这里了。

meaning: v. 阻止 vt. 使气馁
example: Do not let a bad score discourage you.
exampleChinese: 不要让一次差成绩使你气馁。

meaning: adj. 严格的
example: Our math teacher is strict but fair.
exampleChinese: 我们的数学老师很严格，但很公平。

meaning: adj. 视觉的，视力的
example: The chart gives a clear visual summary of the results.
exampleChinese: 这张图表清楚地给出了结果的视觉总结。

meaning: adj. 那些的 pron. 那些（that的复数）
example: Those shoes look very comfortable.
exampleChinese: 那些鞋子看起来很舒服。

meaning: n. 针 v. 缝纫
example: Please pass me the needle and thread.
exampleChinese: 请把针和线递给我。

meaning: n. 汽车
example: His new car is parked outside the house.
exampleChinese: 他的新汽车停在房子外面。

meaning: v. 放 n. 掷 adj. 固定不动的
example: Please put your bag under the chair.
exampleChinese: 请把你的包放在椅子下面。

meaning: n. 环境，情况
example: We had to leave early because of the weather circumstance.
exampleChinese: 由于天气情况，我们不得不提前离开。

meaning: prep. 没有 adv. 户外 n. 外部
example: He left without his umbrella.
exampleChinese: 他没带伞就离开了。

meaning: v. 修理，修补 n. 好转，改进
example: I need to mend my torn bag tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我得修补我破了的包。

meaning: n. 算术
example: Arithmetic was my favorite subject in primary school.
exampleChinese: 算术是我小学时最喜欢的科目。

meaning: adj. 聪明的
example: The smart student solved the math problem quickly.
exampleChinese: 那个聪明的学生很快解出了这道数学题。

meaning: v. 褪色 adj. 平淡的 n. 淡出
example: The colors on the old poster fade in the sun.
exampleChinese: 那张旧海报上的颜色在阳光下褪色了。

meaning: v. 达到，实现 n. 成就 vt. 获得
example: She worked hard to attain her goal.
exampleChinese: 她努力工作以实现自己的目标。

meaning: n. 希腊语 adj. 希腊的
example: She can read a little Greek.
exampleChinese: 她会读一点希腊语。

meaning: v. 微笑
example: Babies often smile when they see their mothers.
exampleChinese: 婴儿看见妈妈时常常会微笑。

meaning: adv. 最后
example: We will eventually reach the top.
exampleChinese: 我们最后会到达山顶。

meaning: n. 财富 vt. 给予财富 vi. 偶然发生
example: He made a fortune by selling computers.
exampleChinese: 他靠卖电脑赚了一大笔财富。

meaning: n. 目的 v. 决心
example: The purpose of this meeting is clear.
exampleChinese: 这次会议的目的是明确的。

meaning: adj. 紧张的 v. 变得紧张 n. 时态
example: I felt tense before the piano competition.
exampleChinese: 钢琴比赛前我感到很紧张。

meaning: n. 桥 v. 架桥
example: A wooden bridge crosses the small river.
exampleChinese: 一座木桥横跨这条小河。

meaning: n. 柠檬水
example: She made cold lemonade for us.
exampleChinese: 她给我们做了冰凉的柠檬水。

meaning: n. 陌生人
example: The stranger asked me for directions.
exampleChinese: 那个陌生人向我问路。

meaning: v. 解放
example: The army came to liberate the city.
exampleChinese: 军队来解放这座城市。

meaning: n. 图书馆员
example: The librarian helped me find a book.
exampleChinese: 图书馆员帮我找到了那本书。

meaning: n. 俱乐部，社团 v. 用棍棒打 adj. 俱乐部的
example: She joined the school music club.
exampleChinese: 她加入了学校的音乐社团。

meaning: n. 嫌疑犯 adj. 可疑的 v. 怀疑
example: The police suspect him of lying.
exampleChinese: 警方怀疑他在说谎。

meaning: n. 锡 adj. 锡制的 v. 涂锡于
example: The box was made of tin.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子是锡制的。

meaning: adj. 适当的 adv. 完全地
example: Wear proper shoes for gym class.
exampleChinese: 上体育课要穿合适的鞋。

meaning: n. 问候，招呼 v. 致敬
example: He sent a warm greeting to his teacher.
exampleChinese: 他向老师送上了亲切的问候。

meaning: n. 折扣 v. 贴现
example: Students get a discount with this card.
exampleChinese: 学生凭这张卡可以享受折扣。

meaning: v. 延期
example: Please delay the meeting until Friday.
exampleChinese: 请把会议延期到周五。

meaning: n. 车轮 v. 转动
example: The front Wheel of the bike is loose.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车的前轮松了。

meaning: n. 时间 v. 计时 adj. 定时的
example: We had a good time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园玩得很开心。

meaning: v. 打击 n. 打
example: Be careful not to hit the window with the ball.
exampleChinese: 小心别让球击中窗户。

meaning: n. 皮革 v. 用皮革包盖 adj. 皮的
example: She wore a leather jacket.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件皮夹克。

meaning: n. 改正
example: The teacher made a correction on my spelling.
exampleChinese: 老师改正了我的拼写错误。

meaning: n. 十二 adj. 十二的
example: There are twelve eggs in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里有十二个鸡蛋。

meaning: adj. 准确的，精密的 v. 要求
example: Please give the exact time of the meeting.
exampleChinese: 请给出会议的准确时间。

meaning: pron. 它 abbr. 信息技术information technology
example: I found a watch on the desk, but it was not mine.
exampleChinese: 我在桌子上发现了一块手表，但它不是我的。

meaning: n. 渔夫
example: The fisherman came back with a big net of fish.
exampleChinese: 渔夫带着满满一大网鱼回来了。

meaning: v. 知道
example: I know his name.
exampleChinese: 我知道他的名字。

meaning: n. 退休金，抚恤金 v. 发给养老金或抚恤金
example: My grandfather gets a pension every month.
exampleChinese: 我祖父每个月都领退休金。

meaning: pron. 我们自己
example: We made the cake ourselves.
exampleChinese: 我们自己做了这个蛋糕。

meaning: n. 十一 adj. 十一的
example: There are eleven players on the team.
exampleChinese: 这支队里有十一名队员。

meaning: v. 允许，让 n. 障碍 vt. 让
example: My parents let me stay up late on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 我父母允许我周五晚一点睡。

meaning: adj. 好的 n. 好处 adv. 好
example: It was a good day for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 那是一个适合野餐的好日子。

meaning: adj. 不幸的
example: She felt unfortunate after missing the bus.
exampleChinese: 她因为错过公交车而感到不幸。

meaning: n. 新闻，消息
example: The news made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 这个消息让大家都笑了。

meaning: v. 观察 n. 手表
example: I like to watch the rain from my window.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢从窗边看雨。

meaning: n. 协议
example: Both sides signed the agreement yesterday.
exampleChinese: 双方昨天签署了协议。

meaning: n. 存款 v. 使沉积
example: He made a small deposit at the bank.
exampleChinese: 他在银行存了一小笔钱。

meaning: v. （使）下决心
example: We must determine our goal before we start.
exampleChinese: 我们必须在开始前下定目标。

meaning: adj. 墨西哥的 n. 墨西哥人
example: The Mexican food was very spicy.
exampleChinese: 墨西哥食物非常辣。

meaning: n. 调制解调器（等于modulator-demodulator）
example: The modem connected the computer to the internet.
exampleChinese: 调制解调器把电脑连接到了互联网。

meaning: n. 色拉
example: I made a salad with tomatoes and eggs.
exampleChinese: 我用西红柿和鸡蛋做了一份色拉。

meaning: adj. 相反的 adv. 相反地 n. 相反
example: His opinion was contrary to mine.
exampleChinese: 他的看法和我的相反。

meaning: n. 教育
example: Good education can change a child's future.
exampleChinese: 良好的教育可以改变孩子的未来。

meaning: v. 欢呼
example: The fans cheer for their team.
exampleChinese: 球迷们为他们的球队欢呼。

meaning: v. 呼喊
example: Please do not shout in the library.
exampleChinese: 请不要在图书馆里大声喊叫。

meaning: n. 原谅
example: He asked for her pardon after the mistake.
exampleChinese: 犯错后他请求她的原谅。

meaning: adj. 精密的
example: The watch has a nice and precise design.
exampleChinese: 这块手表有一个精密的设计。

meaning: n. 购买
example: I made the purchase online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上完成了这笔购买。

meaning: v. 欠
example: I owe my sister ten dollars.
exampleChinese: 我欠我妹妹十美元。

meaning: v. 觉醒，意识到 adj. 醒着的
example: I was still awake at midnight.
exampleChinese: 我在半夜时还醒着。

meaning: adv. 到处 n. 每个地方
example: I looked for my keys everywhere.
exampleChinese: 我到处找我的钥匙。

meaning: adj. 公平的 adv. 公平地 v. 转晴
example: Our teacher is fair to every student.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师对每个学生都很公平。

meaning: n. 爱尔兰
example: My uncle lives in Ireland.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔住在爱尔兰。

meaning: v. 挑选 n. 选择
example: Please pick a seat near the window.
exampleChinese: 请选择一个靠窗的座位。

meaning: n. 组织者
example: The organiser checked the room before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 组织者在会议前检查了房间。

meaning: adj. 年轻的 n. 年轻人
example: My teacher looks young and energetic.
exampleChinese: 我的老师看起来年轻又有活力。

meaning: n. 厨师
example: The chef made a fresh salad.
exampleChinese: 厨师做了一份新鲜的沙拉。

meaning: n. 滚筒
example: The painter used a roller on the wall.
exampleChinese: 油漆工用滚筒刷墙。

meaning: n. 周末，周末休假 adj. 周末的 v. 度周末
example: We will visit my grandparents this weekend.
exampleChinese: 这个周末我们要去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 视频 adj. 视频的 v. 录制
example: I watched a short video online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上看了一个短视频。

meaning: v. 任命 vt. 指定
example: They will appoint a new manager tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 他们明天将任命一位新经理。

meaning: n. 女士，夫人
example: The lady at the desk gave me a map.
exampleChinese: 服务台的那位女士给了我一张地图。

meaning: n. 薄片 v. 切下
example: Please slice the bread for lunch.
exampleChinese: 请把面包切成片做午餐。

meaning: n. 偏爱 v. 赞成
example: She has a favour for quiet music.
exampleChinese: 她偏爱安静的音乐。

meaning: adj. 北极的 n. 北极圈
example: An Arctic wind blew across the camp.
exampleChinese: 一阵北极的寒风吹过营地。

meaning: n. 脉冲 v. 使跳动
example: The monitor showed a steady pulse.
exampleChinese: 显示器上显示着稳定的脉冲。

meaning: n. 曲调 v. 调整
example: Please tune the guitar before class.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前调音吉他。

meaning: adj. 外国的
example: He likes to watch foreign films.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢看外国电影。

meaning: n. 葬礼 adj. 丧葬的
example: We wore black clothes to the funeral.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着黑色衣服去参加葬礼。

meaning: v. 竞争 vi. 比赛
example: Our team will compete in the final.
exampleChinese: 我们队将参加决赛。

meaning: n. 加仑（容量单位）
example: The bottle holds one gallon of milk.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子能装一加仑牛奶。

meaning: v. 导电 n. 进行 vt. 引导
example: Metal can conduct electricity.
exampleChinese: 金属可以导电。

meaning: adj. 值…的 n. 价值
example: This book is worth reading twice.
exampleChinese: 这本书值得读两遍。

meaning: n. 发现，发觉
example: The discovery surprised the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这个发现让全班都很惊讶。

meaning: v. 以…为中心 n. 中心 adj. 中央的
example: The town centre is busy on weekends.
exampleChinese: 市中心在周末很热闹。

meaning: adj. 生硬的
example: His abrupt reply surprised me.
exampleChinese: 他生硬的回答让我很惊讶。

meaning: adj. 热的 adv. 热 v. 变热
example: The soup is too hot to drink.
exampleChinese: 这汤太热了，不能喝。

meaning: adj. 太阳的 n. 日光浴室
example: We installed solar panels on the roof.
exampleChinese: 我们在屋顶安装了太阳能板。

meaning: n. （总称） 服装 v. 覆盖（clothe的ing形式）
example: Winter clothing is on sale this week.
exampleChinese: 冬季服装本周正在打折。

meaning: n. 紧急情况 adj. 紧急的
example: Call for help in an emergency.
exampleChinese: 遇到紧急情况时要呼救。

meaning: n. 放任 v. 遗弃 vt. 放弃
example: The family had to abandon the old house.
exampleChinese: 这家人不得不放弃那座旧房子。

meaning: n. 羊，绵羊
example: The farmer keeps sheep on the hill.
exampleChinese: 那位农夫在山坡上养羊。

meaning: n. 计算机
example: My computer is on the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的电脑在书桌上。

meaning: adj. 传统的
example: We ate traditional food during the festival.
exampleChinese: 我们在节日期间吃了传统食物。

meaning: n. 正号，加号 adj. 正的 prep. 加，加上
example: Two plus two equals four.
exampleChinese: 二加二等于四。

meaning: n. 带，环 v. 用带绑扎
example: The school band played at the festival.
exampleChinese: 学校乐队在节日活动上演奏了。

meaning: n. 文件，公文 v. 用文件证明
example: Please sign this document before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前签署这份文件。

meaning: n. 大门 v. 给…装大门
example: Please close the gate before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把大门关上。

meaning: v. 击鼓 n. 鼓
example: They drum on the table with their fingers.
exampleChinese: 他们用手指在桌子上敲击。

meaning: n. 图书馆，藏书室
example: I return these books to the library every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我每周五把这些书还到图书馆。

meaning: n. 营养，营养学
example: Good nutrition helps children grow strong.
exampleChinese: 良好的营养有助于孩子健康成长。

meaning: aux. 可以，能够 modal verb. 可能 n. 山楂花
example: My birthday is in May this year.
exampleChinese: 我今年的生日在五月。

meaning: v. 动摇 n. 摇动 vt. 使摇动
example: Shake the bottle before you drink the juice.
exampleChinese: 喝果汁前先摇一摇瓶子。

meaning: adj. 值得做的
example: It was worthwhile to wait for the bus.
exampleChinese: 等公交车是值得的。

meaning: n. 被子 v. 东拼西凑地编
example: She slept under a warm quilt.
exampleChinese: 她睡在一条温暖的被子下面。

meaning: pron. 我自己
example: I made the model plane myself.
exampleChinese: 这个飞机模型是我自己做的。

meaning: v. 取笑 n. 戏弄
example: Do not tease your little brother.
exampleChinese: 不要取笑你的小弟弟。

meaning: n. 书籍 v. 预订
example: We need to book a hotel for the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们需要为这次旅行预订一家酒店。

meaning: adj. 现代的，近代的 n. 现代人
example: The library has a modern design.
exampleChinese: 这座图书馆有现代的设计。

meaning: adj. 遗憾的 int. 对不起
example: Sorry, I stepped on your foot.
exampleChinese: 对不起，我踩到你的脚了。

meaning: n. 平行线 v. 使…与…平行 adj. 平行的
example: These two roads run parallel to each other.
exampleChinese: 这两条路彼此平行。

meaning: adj. 明显的
example: It is evident that he studied hard.
exampleChinese: 很明显他很用功。

meaning: n. 小吃，快餐 v. 吃快餐
example: I bought a snack after school.
exampleChinese: 我放学后买了一份小吃。

meaning: adv. 可能地
example: She will possibly arrive after lunch.
exampleChinese: 她大概会在午饭后到。

meaning: pron. 你的
example: Is this your backpack by the door?
exampleChinese: 门边这个背包是你的吗？

meaning: n. 权威
example: The manager has the authority to change the schedule.
exampleChinese: 经理有权力更改日程安排。

meaning: adj. 北部的 n. 北部方言
example: The northern wind was cold and strong.
exampleChinese: 北风又冷又强。

meaning: prep. 通过
example: We sent the photo by email.
exampleChinese: 我们通过电子邮件发送了这张照片。

meaning: adj. 下面的 n. 下列事物 v. 跟随
example: Read the following sentence carefully.
exampleChinese: 仔细阅读下面这句话。

meaning: n. 海贝，贝壳
example: We found a blue seashell on the beach.
exampleChinese: 我们在海滩上找到了一枚蓝色的海贝。

meaning: n. 一对 v. 把…组成一对
example: I need a new pair of shoes.
exampleChinese: 我需要一双新鞋。

meaning: v. 探索
example: We will explore the old castle tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我们明天要去探索那座古城堡。

meaning: n. 伙伴 v. 合伙
example: I will partner with Mia for the class game.
exampleChinese: 我要和米娅搭档参加班级游戏。

meaning: v. 传播 adj. 伸展的
example: Please spread the map on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把地图展开在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 瑞士的 n. 瑞士人
example: My teacher met a Swiss family on the trip.
exampleChinese: 我的老师在旅行中遇到了一家瑞士人。

meaning: n. 显微镜
example: Look at the bacteria under the microscope.
exampleChinese: 用显微镜看这些细菌。

meaning: n. 纪念碑 vt. 为…树碑
example: The monument honors brave soldiers.
exampleChinese: 这座纪念碑纪念勇敢的士兵。

meaning: adj. 慢的 v. 变慢 adv. 慢慢地
example: The bus is too slow this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上的公交车太慢了。

meaning: adj. 更坏的 adv. 更糟 n. 更坏的事
example: The weather got worse after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后天气变得更糟了。

meaning: adj. 特别的 n. 详细说明
example: Is there any particular book you want to borrow?
exampleChinese: 你有想借的某一本特定的书吗？

meaning: v. 投标 n. 出价
example: The company will bid for the new bridge project.
exampleChinese: 这家公司将为新桥项目投标。

meaning: n. 电池
example: My phone battery died before lunch.
exampleChinese: 我的手机电池在午饭前就没电了。

meaning: n. 胶带 v. 录音
example: Please use tape to fix the torn page.
exampleChinese: 请用胶带把破掉的书页粘好。

meaning: adv. 后来 adj. 更迟的
example: We can talk about it later.
exampleChinese: 我们以后可以再谈这件事。

meaning: n. 信封，封皮
example: I put the letter in an envelope.
exampleChinese: 我把信放进了一个信封里。

meaning: adj. 短的 n. 短 adv. 不足
example: Her hair is short and neat.
exampleChinese: 她的头发又短又整齐。

meaning: n. 昆虫
example: This insect has bright green wings.
exampleChinese: 这只昆虫有鲜绿色的翅膀。

meaning: n. 力量 v. 可以 aux. 可能
example: You might try asking the teacher for help.
exampleChinese: 你可以试着向老师求助。

meaning: n. 地带 v. 分成区
example: This area is a quiet zone.
exampleChinese: 这个地区是安静地带。

meaning: v. 油漆
example: We need to paint the door white.
exampleChinese: 我们需要把门漆成白色。

meaning: n. 春天 adj. 春天的 v. 生长
example: Flowers spring up fast after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后花儿长得很快。

meaning: adv. 亲自地
example: I personally checked the homework.
exampleChinese: 我亲自检查了作业。

meaning: n. 目录 adj. 指导的
example: You can find the phone number in the directory.
exampleChinese: 你可以在目录里找到电话号码。

meaning: adv. 起来 prep. 在…之上 adj. 涨的
example: Please stand up when the teacher comes in.
exampleChinese: 老师进来时请站起来。

meaning: n. 仓库 v. 储入仓库
example: The boxes are stored in the warehouse.
exampleChinese: 这些箱子存放在仓库里。

meaning: n. 高速公路
example: The freeway was crowded during rush hour.
exampleChinese: 高峰时段高速公路很拥挤。

meaning: pron. 那 adv. 那么 conj. 因为
example: That is my new schoolbag.
exampleChinese: 那是我的新书包。

meaning: adv. 又，此外 n. （英、保）阿盖恩
example: Please say that again.
exampleChinese: 请再说一遍。

meaning: adj. 数字的 n. 数字
example: She keeps all her photos on a digital camera.
exampleChinese: 她把所有照片都保存在数码相机里。

meaning: adj. 随机的 n. 随意 adv. 胡乱地
example: We picked a random number for the game.
exampleChinese: 我们为游戏随便选了一个随机数。

meaning: n. 极大，最大限度 adj. 最高的
example: This is the maximum number of students allowed.
exampleChinese: 这是允许的学生最大人数。

meaning: n. 马 v. 使骑马
example: The horse ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 那匹马跑过了田野。

meaning: n. 猴子 v. 胡闹
example: The monkey climbed the tree quickly.
exampleChinese: 那只猴子很快爬上了树。

meaning: n. 飞行 v. 射击
example: Our flight leaves at seven in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我们的航班在早上七点起飞。

meaning: v. 铸造（货币） n. 硬币
example: I found a coin under the sofa.
exampleChinese: 我在沙发下面找到了一枚硬币。

meaning: n. 乐意
example: Her willingness to help made the work easier.
exampleChinese: 她乐意帮忙让工作更轻松了。

meaning: n. 猪肉 vt. 与女子性交
example: We had pork and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了猪肉和米饭。

meaning: v. 废除，废止 vt. 废止
example: The government decided to abolish the old law.
exampleChinese: 政府决定废除这项旧法律。

meaning: v. 淹没 n. 洪水
example: Heavy rain can flood the streets quickly.
exampleChinese: 大雨会很快淹没街道。

meaning: v. 反应 vi. 起反应， 起作用
example: How did you react to the good news?
exampleChinese: 你对这个好消息有什么反应？

meaning: v. 提供 n. 提议
example: They offer free water at the station.
exampleChinese: 他们在车站提供免费饮用水。

meaning: v. 使弯曲 n. 弯曲
example: Please bend the wire into a circle.
exampleChinese: 请把这根铁丝弯成一个圆圈。

meaning: adj. 不变的 n. 常数
example: The temperature stayed constant all day.
exampleChinese: 气温一整天都保持不变。

meaning: adj. 有罪的
example: He felt guilty about lying to his friend.
exampleChinese: 他因为对朋友撒谎而感到内疚。

meaning: n. 网 v. 用网缠住
example: A spider built a web between the trees.
exampleChinese: 一只蜘蛛在树之间织了一张网。

meaning: n. 描述，描写
example: Her description of the park was very clear.
exampleChinese: 她对这个公园的描述非常清楚。

meaning: n. 害怕
example: His fear of dogs slowly faded.
exampleChinese: 他对狗的害怕慢慢消失了。

meaning: v. 选择
example: You can choose a book from this box.
exampleChinese: 你可以从这个箱子里选一本书。

meaning: n. 囚犯，犯人
example: The story was about a prisoner who escaped.
exampleChinese: 这个故事讲的是一名逃跑的囚犯。

meaning: n. 毛巾，手巾 v. 用毛巾擦
example: He used a towel to dry his hair.
exampleChinese: 他用毛巾擦干头发。

meaning: adj. 微小的
example: A tiny bird sat on the fence.
exampleChinese: 一只小小的鸟停在篱笆上。

meaning: n. 张力，拉力 vt. 使紧张
example: There was tension in the room before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前，房间里气氛很紧张。

meaning: v. 包括 n. 封面，封皮 vt. 覆盖
example: This book will cover the history of China.
exampleChinese: 这本书将包括中国的历史。

meaning: n. 树 v. 把赶上树
example: A tall tree stands by the road.
exampleChinese: 路边立着一棵高树。

meaning: adj. 创办的 v. 铸造
example: The founding members met every week.
exampleChinese: 创始成员每周都会见面。

meaning: adj. 极好的，精彩的，绝妙的
example: We had a wonderful time at the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里玩得非常开心。

meaning: n. 位置，方位 v. 安置
example: Please position the chair near the window.
exampleChinese: 请把椅子安置在窗户旁边。

meaning: n. 院子 vt. 把…关进或围在畜栏里
example: The kids are playing in the yard.
exampleChinese: 孩子们正在院子里玩。

meaning: adv. 其他 adj. 别的
example: Do you need anything else from the store?
exampleChinese: 你还需要商店里的别的东西吗？

meaning: v. 扩张 vi. 发展
example: The company plans to expand into new markets.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划扩展到新市场。

meaning: abbr. 毫米（millimeter） n. 缅甸的域名
example: The sign says the package is 20 mm wide.
exampleChinese: 标牌上写着这个包裹宽 20 毫米。

meaning: n. 国家，国土 adj. 祖国的，故乡的
example: China is a large country.
exampleChinese: 中国是一个大国。

meaning: adv. 在下面，在较低处 prep. 在…下面
example: The shoes are below the bed.
exampleChinese: 鞋子在床下面。

meaning: v. 压 vt. 压，按
example: Press the green button to start the machine.
exampleChinese: 按下绿色按钮来启动机器。

meaning: n. 茶托，浅碟
example: She placed the cup on a saucer.
exampleChinese: 她把杯子放在茶托上。

meaning: n. 文学
example: He wants to study literature in college.
exampleChinese: 他想在大学里学习文学。

meaning: adv. 同时 n. 其间
example: I was cooking; meanwhile, my brother set the table.
exampleChinese: 我在做饭；与此同时，我哥哥在摆桌子。

meaning: adj. 可笑的
example: It is ridiculous to wear a coat in this heat.
exampleChinese: 这么热的天气还穿外套太可笑了。

meaning: adj. 最小的 adv. 最小
example: This is the least expensive bag in the store.
exampleChinese: 这是店里最便宜的包。

meaning: n. 数据包，信息包 vt. 包装
example: The network packet reached the server in a second.
exampleChinese: 这个网络数据包在一秒内到达了服务器。

meaning: n. 失败
example: Her failure taught her to try again.
exampleChinese: 她的失败教会了她再次尝试。

meaning: n. 公寓
example: We rented an apartment near the school.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校附近租了一套公寓。

meaning: n. 道德心
example: His conscience told him to return the lost wallet.
exampleChinese: 他的道德心告诉他要归还那个丢失的钱包。

meaning: n. 运转 adj. 连续的 v. 跑
example: The machine is still running smoothly.
exampleChinese: 这台机器仍在平稳运转。

meaning: adj. 全世界的 adv. 在世界各地
example: This company sells its products worldwide.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在世界各地销售它的产品。

meaning: adv. 向前地 prep. 向，朝…… adj. 开着的
example: Please keep the lights on at night.
exampleChinese: 请在晚上让灯开着。

meaning: n. 附录
example: The book's appendix lists the main sources.
exampleChinese: 这本书的附录列出了主要来源。

meaning: n. 加拿大（北美洲国家）
example: My aunt lives in Canada now.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈现在住在加拿大。

meaning: n. 父亲（或母亲）
example: Each parent signed the school notice.
exampleChinese: 每位家长都在学校通知上签了字。

meaning: v. 杀死 n. 杀戮 adj. 致命的
example: The medicine can kill harmful bacteria.
exampleChinese: 这种药可以杀死有害细菌。

meaning: v. 使惊吓 vt. 使惊恐
example: The loud noise can frighten small children.
exampleChinese: 这巨大的噪音会吓到小孩。

meaning: adj. 不安全的
example: This path is unsafe after dark.
exampleChinese: 天黑后这条路不安全。

meaning: n. 术语 v. 把…叫做
example: This term is common in science books.
exampleChinese: 这个术语在科学书中很常见。

meaning: adj. 官僚的
example: The process felt slow and bureaucratic.
exampleChinese: 这个流程感觉缓慢又官僚。

meaning: n. 长袍，长外衣 v. 使穿睡衣
example: She wore a white gown at the ceremony.
exampleChinese: 她在典礼上穿了一件白色长袍。

meaning: adj. 疯狂的
example: It is crazy to walk home in a storm.
exampleChinese: 在暴风雨中走回家太疯狂了。

meaning: adj. 向外的 adv. 向外（等于outwards） n. 外表
example: The door opened outward.
exampleChinese: 门向外打开。

meaning: v. 开发，开拓 n. 勋绩
example: We should exploit the new technology wisely.
exampleChinese: 我们应该明智地开发这项新技术。

meaning: v. 划分 n. 分水岭
example: Please divide the cake into six pieces.
exampleChinese: 请把蛋糕分成六块。

meaning: n. 路线，航线 v. 排成一行
example: This bus line goes to the airport.
exampleChinese: 这条公交线路通往机场。

meaning: n. 袋 v. 猎获
example: I put my lunch in my bag.
exampleChinese: 我把午饭放进我的包里。

meaning: v. 航行 n. 帆，篷
example: They sail across the lake every summer.
exampleChinese: 他们每年夏天都在湖上航行。

meaning: adj. 不真实的
example: The report proved untrue.
exampleChinese: 这份报告被证明是不真实的。

meaning: n. 阅读，朗读 adj. 阅读的 v. 阅读（read的ing形式）
example: Reading before bed helps me relax.
exampleChinese: 睡前阅读能帮助我放松。

meaning: prep. 向 adj. 即将来到的
example: The dog ran toward the open gate.
exampleChinese: 那只狗朝着打开的大门跑去。

meaning: n. 歧视
example: The school has a strict rule against discrimination.
exampleChinese: 学校有严格的禁止歧视规定。

meaning: n. 间隔
example: There was a short interval between the two classes.
exampleChinese: 两节课之间有一段短暂的间隔。

meaning: adj. 对人友好的，开朗的 n. 外出 v. 超过
example: The outgoing train leaves at noon.
exampleChinese: 离开的那班火车在中午出发。

meaning: n. 减法
example: We practiced subtraction in math class.
exampleChinese: 我们在数学课上练习了减法。

meaning: n. 小孩 v. 欺骗 adj. 小山羊皮制的
example: The kid is drawing a cat on the wall.
exampleChinese: 那个小孩正在墙上画一只猫。

meaning: n. 歌手
example: My sister wants to be a singer one day.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹希望有一天成为一名歌手。

meaning: n. 雇用，租用 v. 雇用 vt. 租用
example: They hire extra workers during the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 他们在假期期间雇用额外工人。

meaning: adj. 苏格兰的 n. 苏格兰人
example: My Scottish friend loves bagpipes.
exampleChinese: 我那位苏格兰朋友喜欢风笛。

meaning: n. 截止期限
example: We finished the project before the deadline.
exampleChinese: 我们在截止期限前完成了项目。

meaning: v. 抢劫
example: The thief tried to rob a small shop.
exampleChinese: 小偷试图抢劫一家小商店。

meaning: n. 四月
example: The flowers bloom in April.
exampleChinese: 这些花在四月开花。

meaning: n. 卡车 v. 驾驶卡车 adj. （美）运货汽车的
example: A red truck stopped outside the store.
exampleChinese: 一辆红色卡车停在商店外面。

meaning: n. 画廊 vt. 在…修建走廊 vi. 挖地道
example: We visited a new art gallery on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们周六参观了一家新的美术馆。

meaning: n. 火炉 vt. 用火炉烤
example: We put the soup on the stove to heat it.
exampleChinese: 我们把汤放在火炉上加热。

meaning: adj. 太平洋的 n. 太平洋
example: They hoped for a pacific solution to the problem.
exampleChinese: 他们希望以和平的方式解决这个问题。

meaning: v. 使成熟
example: Warm sunshine will ripen the apples soon.
exampleChinese: 温暖的阳光很快会使苹果成熟。

meaning: adj. 高兴的 vt. 使高兴
example: I am glad to see you again.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴再次见到你。

meaning: n. 英寸 v. 使缓慢地移动
example: The picture is only six inch wide.
exampleChinese: 这张图片只有六英寸宽。

meaning: v. 教
example: My father can teach me to swim.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸可以教我游泳。

meaning: n. 香肠
example: He ate a sausage for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 他早餐吃了一根香肠。

meaning: adj. 东北的 n. 东北 adv. 向东北
example: A cold wind blew from the northeast.
exampleChinese: 一阵冷风从东北方向吹来。

meaning: n. 保险
example: She bought insurance for her new bike.
exampleChinese: 她给新自行车买了保险。

meaning: adj. 凌乱的，散乱的
example: His desk was messy after the art project.
exampleChinese: 美术项目结束后，他的书桌很凌乱。

meaning: n. 农村，乡下
example: We spent the weekend in the countryside.
exampleChinese: 我们在乡下度过了周末。

meaning: n. 茶壶
example: The teapot was full of hot tea.
exampleChinese: 茶壶里装满了热茶。

meaning: n. 职员 adj. 职员的 v. 供给人员
example: The school staff welcomed the new students.
exampleChinese: 学校的全体工作人员欢迎新生。

meaning: n. 食堂，小卖部
example: We ate lunch in the school canteen.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校食堂吃了午饭。

meaning: v. 接触 vt. 感动
example: Do not touch the wet paint.
exampleChinese: 不要碰湿油漆。

meaning: v. 是（be的第二人称单复数现在式） n. 公亩
example: There are two apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有两个苹果。

meaning: n. 公平
example: Fairness matters when the teacher gives grades.
exampleChinese: 老师给分时，公平很重要。

meaning: n. 报告 vt. 报道
example: I finished my science report last night.
exampleChinese: 我昨晚完成了我的科学报告。

meaning: n. 脖子 v. 搂著脖子亲吻
example: The scarf around my neck is very warm.
exampleChinese: 我脖子上的围巾很暖和。

meaning: n. 成员
example: She is a member of the music club.
exampleChinese: 她是音乐社团的一名成员。

meaning: n. 宪法
example: The constitution protects people's rights.
exampleChinese: 宪法保护人民的权利。

meaning: n. 及格 v. 经过
example: We pass the library on our way to school.
exampleChinese: 我们上学路上会经过图书馆。

meaning: adj. 医学的 n. 医生
example: She needs medical help now.
exampleChinese: 她现在需要医疗帮助。

meaning: n. 果酱 v. 使堵塞
example: I like toast with jam for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐喜欢吃涂了果酱的烤面包。

meaning: n. 代表
example: She spoke on behalf of her class.
exampleChinese: 她代表全班发言。

meaning: v. 管理
example: Good leaders govern with wisdom and care.
exampleChinese: 好的领导者用智慧和关怀来管理。

meaning: n. 交叉，十字 v. 交叉 adj. 交叉的，相反的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 你过马路时要小心。

meaning: adj. 第五的 n. 第五
example: She finished fifth in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中获得第五名。

meaning: n. 黎明 v. 破晓
example: Dawn came early, and birds began to sing.
exampleChinese: 黎明来得很早，鸟儿开始歌唱。

meaning: adj. 不同的
example: Our school has a diverse group of students.
exampleChinese: 我们学校有一个多样化的学生群体。

meaning: pron. 有人
example: Someone left a bag on the bus.
exampleChinese: 有人把一个包落在公交车上了。

meaning: n. 溜冰板 v. 用滑板滑行
example: He can skateboard very well.
exampleChinese: 他滑滑板滑得很好。

meaning: n. 希望 v. 祝愿
example: I wish you a happy birthday.
exampleChinese: 祝你生日快乐。

meaning: v. 嗅，闻 n. 气味，嗅觉
example: I could smell fresh bread in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我能闻出厨房里新鲜面包的气味。

meaning: n. 物质 v. 有关系 vi. 要紧
example: It does not matter who goes first.
exampleChinese: 谁先去都不要紧。

meaning: n. 烤肉 v. 烧烤
example: My family will barbecue fish in the yard tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我家人会在院子里烤鱼。

meaning: adv. 离开，撇开 n. 旁白 prep. 在…旁边
example: Stand aside and let the others pass.
exampleChinese: 站到一边，让其他人通过。

meaning: v. 欣赏
example: I appreciate your help with my homework.
exampleChinese: 我很感激你帮我做作业。

meaning: n. 湖 vt. （使）血球溶解
example: We swam in the lake last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天我们在湖里游泳。

meaning: pron. 我的 int. 哎呀（表示惊奇等）
example: My bag is under the chair.
exampleChinese: 我的书包在椅子下面。

meaning: n. 碟 v. 电镀
example: She put the cake on a blue plate.
exampleChinese: 她把蛋糕放在一个蓝色的碟子上。

meaning: adv. 大约，近似地
example: The trip will take approximately two hours.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行大约需要两个小时。

meaning: n. 饮食 v. 节食
example: A healthy diet includes fresh vegetables.
exampleChinese: 健康的日常饮食包括新鲜蔬菜。

meaning: n. 方法 adv. 大大地 adj. 途中的
example: This is a simple way to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 这是解决这个问题的一个简单方法。

meaning: n. 钻石，金刚石 adj. 菱形的
example: She wore a diamond ring to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一枚钻石戒指去参加派对。

meaning: v. 保持 n. 遗迹 vi. 余下
example: Please remain quiet in the library.
exampleChinese: 请在图书馆里保持安静。

meaning: n. 飞机
example: The aircraft landed safely at the airport.
exampleChinese: 飞机安全地降落在机场。

meaning: n. 幕 v. 遮蔽
example: We closed the curtain to block the bright sun.
exampleChinese: 我们拉上窗帘挡住明亮的阳光。

meaning: v. 挖，掘 n. 戳，刺
example: They dig a hole to plant the tree.
exampleChinese: 他们挖了一个坑来种树。

meaning: n. 苏格兰
example: She visited Scotland during the summer holidays.
exampleChinese: 她在暑假期间去了苏格兰。

meaning: n. 年龄 v. 成熟
example: Her age is twelve.
exampleChinese: 她十二岁。

meaning: n. 竹，竹子 vt. 为…装上篾条 adj. 竹制的
example: The panda is eating bamboo.
exampleChinese: 那只熊猫正在吃竹子。

meaning: n. 弓形，拱形 adj. 主要的 v. 使…弯成弓形
example: The old stone arch stood at the garden gate.
exampleChinese: 花园门口立着一个古老的石拱门。

meaning: n. 诗人
example: The poet read his poem aloud to the class.
exampleChinese: 那位诗人把他的诗朗读给全班听。

meaning: v. 煽动 n. 迷
example: My sister is a big fan of that actor.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是那位演员的忠实粉丝。

meaning: n. 乳房，胸部 v. 以胸对着
example: He felt a sharp pain in his breast.
exampleChinese: 他胸部感到一阵剧痛。

meaning: n. 套筒， 套管 vt. 给……装袖子
example: The coat has a loose sleeve.
exampleChinese: 这件外套有一只宽松的袖子。

meaning: adv. 精神上，智力上
example: She was mentally tired after the long exam.
exampleChinese: 长时间考试后，她精神上很疲惫。

meaning: n. 力量，能力 v. 激励 adj. 借影响有权势人物以操纵权力的
example: Knowledge is a powerful form of power.
exampleChinese: 知识是一种强大的力量。

meaning: prep. 渠道，通过
example: You can submit the form via email.
exampleChinese: 你可以通过电子邮件提交表格。

meaning: v. 标记号于 n. 滴答声
example: Please tick the box beside your answer.
exampleChinese: 请在你的答案旁边打勾。

meaning: v. 放松，休息
example: I like to relax with music after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我喜欢听音乐放松。

meaning: n. 图画 v. 绘画
example: My drawing won first prize in the contest.
exampleChinese: 我的图画在比赛中得了第一名。

meaning: adj. 粗糙的 v. 使粗糙 n. 艰苦
example: The road was rough after the heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 大雨过后，这条路很粗糙。

meaning: adj. 系统的
example: The team followed a systematic plan.
exampleChinese: 这个团队遵循了一个系统的计划。

meaning: v. 为…理发 n. 理发师
example: The barber cut my hair very quickly.
exampleChinese: 理发师很快给我剪了头发。

meaning: n. 麻烦 vt. 使苦恼
example: If you lie again, you will be in trouble.
exampleChinese: 如果你再说谎，你就会有麻烦。

meaning: adj. 男性的 n. 男人
example: The male students sat near the front.
exampleChinese: 男生们坐在前面附近。

meaning: n. 成果
example: Her hard work led to excellent production.
exampleChinese: 她的努力带来了出色的成果。

meaning: adv. 向下，下去 adj. 向下的 n. 软毛，绒毛
example: Please sit down and relax.
exampleChinese: 请坐下休息一下。

meaning: adj. 液体的 n. 液体，流体
example: The bottle is filled with a clear liquid.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子里装着一种透明的液体。

meaning: n. 青春期
example: He changed a lot during adolescence.
exampleChinese: 他在青春期期间变化很大。

meaning: n. n邻居;同胞 v. 邻接 adj. 邻居的
example: My neighbour helped me carry the box.
exampleChinese: 我的邻居帮我搬了那个箱子。

meaning: n. 潜能 adj. 潜在的
example: She has the potential to become a great singer.
exampleChinese: 她有成为一名出色歌手的潜能。

meaning: adv. 第一 adj. 第一的
example: Wash your hands first.
exampleChinese: 先洗手。

meaning: n. 图表 v. 用图解法表示
example: The teacher drew a diagram on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师在黑板上画了一张图表。

meaning: n. 记忆，记忆力
example: She has a good memory for names.
exampleChinese: 她对名字记忆力很好。

meaning: adj. 不快乐的
example: He felt unhappy when he lost his wallet.
exampleChinese: 丢了钱包后，他感到很不快乐。

meaning: adj. 遥远的
example: Our hotel is in a distant town.
exampleChinese: 我们的酒店在一个遥远的小镇上。

meaning: n. 栅栏 v. 防护
example: They built a fence around the garden.
exampleChinese: 他们在花园周围建了一圈栅栏。

meaning: n. 群众,一伙 v. 拥挤
example: A crowd waited outside the stadium.
exampleChinese: 一群人在体育场外等着。

meaning: n. 功能 v. 运行 vi. 起作用
example: This machine can function all day without a break.
exampleChinese: 这台机器可以连续运行一整天。

meaning: n. 鸟 v. 向…喝倒彩
example: A small bird sang outside my window.
exampleChinese: 一只小鸟在我的窗外歌唱。

meaning: v. 分类
example: We classify the books by subject.
exampleChinese: 我们按学科给这些书分类。

meaning: adj. 明确的
example: Please give me an explicit answer.
exampleChinese: 请给我一个明确的答案。

meaning: adj. 闪电的 n. 闪电
example: A flash of lightning lit up the sky.
exampleChinese: 一道闪电照亮了天空。

meaning: n. 步，脚步 v. 踏，踩
example: Please step back from the door.
exampleChinese: 请从门边往后退一步。

meaning: v. 慢跑
example: I jog every morning before school.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上上学前慢跑。

meaning: adv. 已经，早已
example: I have already finished my homework.
exampleChinese: 我已经完成作业了。

meaning: n. 夜晚，晚上 adj. 夜晚的
example: We saw many stars in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 我们在夜空中看到了很多星星。

meaning: n. 抽屉
example: The socks are in the top drawer.
exampleChinese: 袜子在最上面的抽屉里。

meaning: adj. 木制的
example: The table is made of wooden boards.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子是用木板做的。

meaning: adj. 易接近的
example: The library is accessible to students with disabilities.
exampleChinese: 这座图书馆方便有残障的学生进入。

meaning: adj. 被动的，消极的 n. 被动语态
example: He gave a passive answer and said little.
exampleChinese: 他回答得很被动，几乎没说什么。

meaning: n. 惊奇 v. 怀疑 adj. 奇妙的
example: I wonder why the bus is late.
exampleChinese: 我想知道公交车为什么晚了。

meaning: aux. 应该，应当
example: You ought to finish your homework first.
exampleChinese: 你应该先完成作业。

meaning: v. 改变，使…变形
example: Heat can transform ice into water.
exampleChinese: 热量可以把冰变成水。

meaning: v. 辩护 vt. 保护
example: We must defend the park from pollution.
exampleChinese: 我们必须保护这个公园免受污染。

meaning: n. 公里
example: The village is three kilometre from here.
exampleChinese: 那个村庄离这里有三公里。

meaning: v. 说 n. 谈话
example: We need to talk after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后需要谈一谈。

meaning: n. 女孩
example: The girl is reading by the window.
exampleChinese: 那个女孩正在窗边看书。

meaning: n. 大使
example: The ambassador visited our school today.
exampleChinese: 大使今天访问了我们学校。

meaning: n. 草 v. 放牧
example: The grass is wet after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后草是湿的。

meaning: n. 十亿 adj. 十亿的
example: The company made a billion dollars last year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司去年赚了十亿美元。

meaning: adj. 简易的 n. 概要
example: Here is a summary of the story.
exampleChinese: 这里是这个故事的概要。

meaning: adj. 穆斯林的 n. 穆斯林
example: Moslem families celebrated the festival together.
exampleChinese: 穆斯林家庭一起庆祝这个节日。

meaning: n. 电线 v. 拍电报
example: He fixed the wire behind the desk.
exampleChinese: 他把电线固定在书桌后面。

meaning: n. 早晨
example: I go for a walk every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早晨都去散步。

meaning: v. 依赖，依靠 vi. 依靠， 指望
example: Many plants depend on sunlight to grow.
exampleChinese: 许多植物依靠阳光生长。

meaning: v. 折叠 n. 折痕
example: Please fold the paper in half.
exampleChinese: 请把这张纸对折。

meaning: adj. 精确的
example: Please give me a precise answer.
exampleChinese: 请给我一个精确的答案。

meaning: n. 核心 adj. 快的 adv. 迅速地，快
example: We took a quick walk after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们快步走了一会儿。

meaning: n. 会议 vi. 举行或参加（系列）会议
example: The conference starts at nine in the main hall.
exampleChinese: 会议九点在主厅开始。

meaning: adv. 代替
example: We stayed home instead.
exampleChinese: 我们反而待在家里。

meaning: adj. 加拿大（人）的 n. 加拿大人
example: My Canadian friend loves hockey.
exampleChinese: 我的加拿大朋友喜欢曲棍球。

meaning: adv. 适当地
example: Please speak properly in class.
exampleChinese: 请在课堂上得体地说话。

meaning: adj. 绝对的 n. 绝对
example: Her confidence is absolute.
exampleChinese: 她的信心是绝对的。

meaning: n. 例子 vt. 作为…的例子 vi. 举例
example: Can you give me an example?
exampleChinese: 你能给我举个例子吗？

meaning: n. 法案 v. 宣布
example: The bill was passed after a long debate.
exampleChinese: 这项法案经过长时间辩论后获得通过。

meaning: conj. 因为 prep. 自…以来 adv. 后来
example: I have lived here since 2020.
exampleChinese: 我从2020年起就住在这里。

meaning: adv. 差不多
example: The bottle is almost empty.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子差不多空了。

meaning: v. 嫁
example: She will marry a kind man.
exampleChinese: 她将嫁给一个善良的男人。

meaning: v. 崇拜 vt. 爱慕
example: I adore my grandmother.
exampleChinese: 我崇拜我的奶奶。

meaning: n. 饿死
example: The village faced starvation after the harvest failed.
exampleChinese: 收成失败后，这个村庄面临饿死的威胁。

meaning: n. 少数
example: Only a handful of students stayed after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后只有少数学生留下来。

meaning: n. 粥，糊 vt. 服刑
example: Grandma made warm porridge for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 奶奶做了热粥当早餐。

meaning: n. 喷射，喷嘴 adj. 墨黑的 v. 射出
example: A jet of water shot across the garden.
exampleChinese: 一道水柱喷射到花园里。

meaning: n. 排球
example: We played volleyball after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后打了排球。

meaning: n. 汇票 v. 起草 adj. 初步画出或（写出）的
example: She wrote a draft of her report last night.
exampleChinese: 她昨晚起草了报告的初稿。

meaning: n. 节日 adj. 节日的，喜庆的
example: The Spring Festival is my favorite holiday.
exampleChinese: 春节是我最喜欢的节日。

meaning: n. 闹钟 v. 警告
example: The alarm woke me at six o'clock.
exampleChinese: 闹钟在六点把我叫醒了。

meaning: adj. 急剧的 adv. 急剧地 n. 尖头
example: Prices rose at a sharp rate this year.
exampleChinese: 今年物价急剧上涨。

meaning: adj. 定期的 n. 常客 adv. 定期地
example: The bus comes at regular times every day.
exampleChinese: 这辆公交车每天都按固定时间到。

meaning: n. 应用
example: This application helps students learn English.
exampleChinese: 这个应用帮助学生学习英语。

meaning: n. 共和国
example: France is a republic.
exampleChinese: 法国是一个共和国。

meaning: n. 垃圾，废物 adj. 毫无价值的
example: Please throw the rubbish in the bin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾桶里。

meaning: adj. 沉重的 n. 重物 adv. 大量地
example: This box is too heavy for me to lift.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子太重了，我搬不起来。

meaning: v. 淹没
example: Be careful not to drown in the strong current.
exampleChinese: 小心不要被湍急的水流淹没。

meaning: n. 质量， 品质 adj. 优质的
example: The quality of this bag is very good.
exampleChinese: 这个包的质量很好。

meaning: n. 目录 v. 把…编入目录
example: We looked up the book in the catalogue.
exampleChinese: 我们在目录里查找了这本书。

meaning: n. 立方 v. 使成立方形
example: He cut the cheese into a cube.
exampleChinese: 他把奶酪切成了立方体。

meaning: n. 皱纹 v. 起皱
example: The wrinkle on her shirt disappeared after ironing.
exampleChinese: 她衬衫上的皱褶熨过后就消失了。

meaning: n. 书店
example: I bought a notebook at the bookshop.
exampleChinese: 我在书店买了一个笔记本。

meaning: v. 吃，喝
example: We eat dinner at six every evening.
exampleChinese: 我们每天晚上六点吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 蛋 v. 煽动
example: I ate a boiled egg for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了一个煮鸡蛋。

meaning: n. 公路，大路
example: We drove along the highway for two hours.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着公路开了两个小时。

meaning: adj. 白色的 n. 白色
example: She wore a white dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条白色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: n. 铅笔 v. 用铅笔写
example: I need a pencil for this test.
exampleChinese: 这次考试我需要一支铅笔。

meaning: v. 权衡
example: We must weigh the risks first.
exampleChinese: 我们必须先权衡风险。

meaning: n. 滥用
example: Smoking can abuse your health.
exampleChinese: 吸烟会滥用你的健康。

meaning: n. 老虎
example: The tiger slept under the tree.
exampleChinese: 老虎在树下睡觉。

meaning: adj. 真实的 adv. 真实地 n. 真实
example: Is this story true?
exampleChinese: 这个故事是真的吗？

meaning: n. 八十 adj. 八十的，八十个的
example: My grandpa is eighty years old.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷八十岁了。

meaning: n. 疾病
example: Her sickness kept her in bed for two days.
exampleChinese: 她的疾病让她卧床两天。

meaning: n. 圣歌（尤指美国南部黑人的） adj. 精神的
example: We sang a spiritual at the school concert.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校音乐会上唱了一首圣歌。

meaning: pron. 我 n. 碘元素
example: I forgot my keys at home.
exampleChinese: 我把钥匙忘在家里了。

meaning: adj. 空白的 n. 空白 v. 使…无效
example: Leave the last page blank.
exampleChinese: 把最后一页空着。

meaning: prep. 通过 adv. 彻底 adj. 直达的
example: We walked through the park at noon.
exampleChinese: 中午我们穿过了公园。

meaning: v. 联合抵制
example: The workers decided to boycott the new store.
exampleChinese: 工人们决定联合抵制这家新店。

meaning: n. 协调
example: Good communication brings harmony to a team.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通能给团队带来协调。

meaning: n. 阿姨
example: My aunt makes delicious noodles.
exampleChinese: 我阿姨做的面条很好吃。

meaning: v. 得到燃料 n. 燃料
example: The car needs fuel before the long trip.
exampleChinese: 这辆车在长途旅行前需要加燃料。

meaning: n. 巴黎（法国首都）
example: My aunt will visit Paris in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈将在春天去巴黎。

meaning: v. 结霜于 n. 霜
example: Frost covered the grass this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早晨，霜覆盖了草地。

meaning: adj. 中心的 n. 电话总机
example: The meeting room is in the central building.
exampleChinese: 会议室在中心大楼里。

meaning: n. 农夫
example: The farmer feeds the chickens every morning.
exampleChinese: 这位农夫每天早上都喂鸡。

meaning: n. 投票，选举 v. 提议，使投票
example: I will vote for the class monitor today.
exampleChinese: 我今天会给班长投票。

meaning: n. 废墟 v. 毁灭
example: The storm could ruin our picnic plans.
exampleChinese: 这场暴风雨可能会毁掉我们的野餐计划。

meaning: n. 英格兰
example: My aunt lives in England.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈住在英格兰。

meaning: n. 钢盔
example: He wore a helmet while riding his bike.
exampleChinese: 他骑自行车时戴着钢盔。

meaning: art. 这 adv. 更加（用于比较级
example: The more you read, the better you write.
exampleChinese: 你读得越多，写得就越好。

meaning: n. 海边 adj. 海边的
example: We spent a week at the seaside last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天，我们在海边待了一周。

meaning: adj. 完美的 v. 使完美 n. 完成式
example: The sky was a perfect blue.
exampleChinese: 天空是完美的蓝色。

meaning: n. 机场
example: We arrived at the airport early.
exampleChinese: 我们很早就到了机场。

meaning: v. 逃走
example: The villagers had to flee the fire.
exampleChinese: 村民们不得不逃离火灾。

meaning: n. 家庭主妇
example: The housewife prepared dinner for the family.
exampleChinese: 这位家庭主妇为家人准备了晚饭。

meaning: v. 打架
example: The two boys started a fight over the ball.
exampleChinese: 那两个男孩因为球打了起来。

meaning: n. 块 v. 修补
example: He took a piece of cake from the plate.
exampleChinese: 他从盘子里拿了一块蛋糕。

meaning: n. 呼吸，气息
example: Take a deep breath before you speak.
exampleChinese: 说话前先深呼吸。

meaning: n. 所有权
example: They argued about the ownership of the land.
exampleChinese: 他们就这块土地的所有权发生了争论。

meaning: n. 飞机 v. 刨 adj. 平的
example: The plane landed safely at noon.
exampleChinese: 飞机在中午安全降落了。

meaning: adj. 流畅的，流利的
example: She is fluent in both English and Chinese.
exampleChinese: 她的英语和汉语都很流利。

meaning: n. 枪支 v. 用枪射击
example: The police found a gun in the bag.
exampleChinese: 警方在包里发现了一把枪。

meaning: adj. 印度的 n. 印度人
example: My Indian friend taught me this song.
exampleChinese: 我的印度朋友教我这首歌。

meaning: adj. 坏的 n. 坏事 adv. 很，非常
example: The milk smells bad.
exampleChinese: 这牛奶闻起来坏了。

meaning: n. 男孩
example: The boy is flying a kite in the park.
exampleChinese: 那个男孩正在公园里放风筝。

meaning: v. 咆哮 n. 嗥叫
example: The dog began to howl at midnight.
exampleChinese: 那只狗在午夜开始嗥叫。

meaning: n. 洋娃娃 v. 把…打扮得花枝招展
example: The little girl hugged her doll at bedtime.
exampleChinese: 小女孩睡觉前抱着她的洋娃娃。

meaning: adj. 黄色的 n. 黄色 v. 使变黄或发黄
example: The yellow flower stands out in the garden.
exampleChinese: 那朵黄色的花在花园里很显眼。

meaning: n. 移居者
example: The first settler built a small house here.
exampleChinese: 第一位移居者在这里建了一所小房子。

meaning: adj. 不愿意的
example: He was unwilling to join the game.
exampleChinese: 他不愿意参加这个游戏。

meaning: n. 新郎
example: The bridegroom thanked everyone at the wedding.
exampleChinese: 新郎在婚礼上感谢了所有人。

meaning: adj. 特别受喜爱的 n. 特别喜爱的人（或物）
example: This is my favourite book of all.
exampleChinese: 这是我最喜欢的一本书。

meaning: adj. 美味的
example: This soup is delicious on a cold day.
exampleChinese: 这汤在寒冷的日子里喝起来很美味。

meaning: n. 阶段 v. 举行
example: She waited behind the stage before the show.
exampleChinese: 演出前她在后台等候。

meaning: adj. 学术的 n. 大学生，大学教师
example: She is an academic who teaches history.
exampleChinese: 她是一位教授历史的大学教师。

meaning: n. 彩虹 adj. 五彩缤纷的 vt. 使呈彩虹状
example: A rainbow appeared after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后出现了一道彩虹。

meaning: n. 接见，采访 v. 采访
example: The reporter will interview the school artist.
exampleChinese: 记者将采访学校里的那位艺术家。

meaning: n. 收入，收益
example: Their income helps pay for school and food.
exampleChinese: 他们的收入帮助支付学费和食物。

meaning: v. 标记 n. 标志
example: Please flag the important page in the book.
exampleChinese: 请把书里重要的那一页标记出来。

meaning: n. 宇宙飞船
example: The spaceship returned safely to Earth.
exampleChinese: 宇宙飞船安全返回了地球。

meaning: n. 行动 vt. 立契转让
example: Her kind deed made everyone smile.
exampleChinese: 她善意的举动让每个人都笑了。

meaning: n. 疼痛 v. 使…痛苦
example: I felt a sharp pain in my leg.
exampleChinese: 我感到腿上一阵剧痛。

meaning: v. 欺骗 n. 狐狸
example: The fox ran across the field.
exampleChinese: 那只狐狸跑过了田野。

meaning: n. （美）分
example: This candy costs only one penny.
exampleChinese: 这块糖只要一便士。

meaning: adv. 大约 prep. 四处
example: We walked around the park after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们在公园四处走了走。

meaning: n. 奶奶
example: Grandma told me a story before bed.
exampleChinese: 奶奶在睡前给我讲了一个故事。

meaning: v. 阅读 adj. 有学问的
example: I like to read before going to bed.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在睡觉前阅读。

meaning: n. 孙女
example: His granddaughter drew him a picture.
exampleChinese: 他的孙女给他画了一幅画。

meaning: n. 贸易，交易 v. 交易，买卖 vt. 买卖
example: The two countries trade oil and rice.
exampleChinese: 这两个国家交易石油和大米。

meaning: adj. 欧洲的 n. 欧洲人
example: She met a European student at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校遇到了一位欧洲学生。

meaning: n. 垫 v. 缠结 adj. 无光泽的
example: Please wipe your shoes on the mat.
exampleChinese: 请在垫子上擦擦你的鞋。

meaning: n. 酒，葡萄酒 v. 喝酒
example: My parents bought a bottle of wine for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我父母买了一瓶葡萄酒配晚餐。

meaning: n. 医师
example: The physician examined the patient carefully.
exampleChinese: 这位医师仔细检查了病人。

meaning: n. 山坡，山腹
example: We walked down the grassy hillside.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着长满草的山坡走下去。

meaning: n. 英国
example: Britain is known for its rainy weather.
exampleChinese: 英国以多雨的天气而闻名。

meaning: n. 英雄
example: The firefighter was a hero to the children.
exampleChinese: 这位消防员对孩子们来说是一位英雄。

meaning: n. 计划
example: Our plan is to visit the museum tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我们的计划是明天去参观博物馆。

meaning: v. 哀悼
example: Many people mourn the loss of their friend.
exampleChinese: 许多人哀悼失去朋友的痛苦。

meaning: n. 工程师 v. 设计
example: My sister is an engineer at a car company.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是一家汽车公司的工程师。

meaning: v. 度过，消磨（时光） n. 预算 vt. 度过
example: I spend two hours on homework every night.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上花两个小时做作业。

meaning: n. 面包 v. 在…上洒面包屑
example: I ate bread and soup for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了面包和汤。

meaning: n. 解释者
example: The interpreter explained the speech clearly.
exampleChinese: 这位口译员把演讲解释得很清楚。

meaning: v. 运转
example: The doctors had to operate at once.
exampleChinese: 医生们不得不立刻动手术。

meaning: v. 影响 n. 情感
example: Cold weather can affect our mood.
exampleChinese: 寒冷的天气会影响我们的心情。

meaning: n. 自行车 v. 骑自行车（或摩托车）
example: I bike to school every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我每周五骑自行车上学。

meaning: adj. 神的
example: This temple is a sacred place.
exampleChinese: 这座寺庙是一个神圣的地方。

meaning: n. 手段 v. 意思是
example: What does this sign means?
exampleChinese: 这个标志是什么意思？

meaning: v. 疲劳 n. 轮胎
example: My eyes tire after too much reading.
exampleChinese: 读太久后，我的眼睛会疲劳。

meaning: n. 大理石 adj. 大理石的
example: The table is made of marble.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子是用大理石做的。

meaning: n. 渡船 v. （乘渡船）渡过
example: We took a ferry across the river.
exampleChinese: 我们乘渡船过了河。

meaning: v. 打破 n. 破裂
example: Be careful not to break the glass.
exampleChinese: 小心不要把玻璃打破。

meaning: adj. 自然的 n. 自然的事情
example: Her smile looks natural in the photo.
exampleChinese: 她在照片里的笑容看起来很自然。

meaning: n. 信 v. 写字母于
example: I got a letter from my cousin.
exampleChinese: 我收到了我表亲的一封信。

meaning: adj. 极端的 n. 极端
example: The desert has extreme heat during the day.
exampleChinese: 沙漠里白天的温度极高。

meaning: n. 失望
example: She felt disappointment after losing the game.
exampleChinese: 她在输掉比赛后感到失望。

meaning: n. 厨房
example: My mother is cooking in the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈正在厨房做饭。

meaning: n. 考虑
example: Please give this plan careful consideration.
exampleChinese: 请仔细考虑这个计划。

meaning: n. 商人，批发商 adj. 商业的
example: The merchant sold tea in the busy market.
exampleChinese: 那个商人在热闹的市场上卖茶。

meaning: n. 珠宝
example: She bought a silver jewelry box for her mother.
exampleChinese: 她给妈妈买了一个银制首饰盒。

meaning: n. 地位
example: His status changed after he won the prize.
exampleChinese: 他获奖后地位提高了。

meaning: n. 家庭作业
example: I finished my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我在晚饭前完成了家庭作业。

meaning: n. 秋天 adj. 秋天的
example: The leaves turn yellow in autumn.
exampleChinese: 树叶在秋天变黄。

meaning: adv. 永远
example: I will remember this day forever.
exampleChinese: 我会永远记住这一天。

meaning: adj. 自私的
example: It was selfish of him to take all the candy.
exampleChinese: 他把所有糖果都拿走，太自私了。

meaning: n. 运动员，体育家
example: The athlete trained hard every morning.
exampleChinese: 这名运动员每天早上都刻苦训练。

meaning: prep. 在…之前 adv. 以前 conj. 在…以前
example: Wash your hands before dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭前要洗手。

meaning: pron. 它自己
example: The cat cleaned itself after dinner.
exampleChinese: 那只猫晚饭后给自己舔毛清洁。

meaning: n. 角色
example: She played the role of a doctor in the play.
exampleChinese: 她在戏剧中扮演医生这个角色。

meaning: n. 家庭 adj. 家庭的
example: My family eats dinner together every night.
exampleChinese: 我家人每天晚上一起吃晚饭。

meaning: n. 受害人
example: The victim called the police for help.
exampleChinese: 受害人打电话向警察求助。

meaning: n. 虫，蠕虫 v. 使蠕动
example: The worm moved slowly across the wet ground.
exampleChinese: 那条虫子在潮湿的地面上慢慢爬动。

meaning: n. 店主
example: The shopkeeper opened the store at eight.
exampleChinese: 店主八点钟开了店。

meaning: n. 婚礼，婚宴 v. 与…结婚（wed的ing形式）
example: We watched the wedding in the garden.
exampleChinese: 我们在花园里观看了婚礼。

meaning: adj. 古典的 n. 古典音乐
example: My grandfather enjoys listening to classical music.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷喜欢听古典音乐。

meaning: n. 剩余 adj. 剩余的
example: We have a surplus of apples this week.
exampleChinese: 我们这周有多余的苹果。

meaning: adj. 陡峭的 v. 泡 n. 峭壁
example: The path up the hill is very steep.
exampleChinese: 这条上山的路非常陡峭。

meaning: adj. 羊毛制的 n. 毛织品
example: She wore a warm woollen coat in winter.
exampleChinese: 她冬天穿了一件暖和的羊毛外套。

meaning: prep. 关于
example: We are talking of our summer plans.
exampleChinese: 我们正在谈论我们的暑假计划。

meaning: n. 纤维
example: Cotton fibre is used to make soft fabric.
exampleChinese: 棉纤维被用来制作柔软的布料。

meaning: adj. 无味的
example: The soup was tasteless without salt.
exampleChinese: 这汤没有盐就没味道。

meaning: n. 狗 v. 跟踪
example: Their dog sleeps by the door.
exampleChinese: 他们家的狗睡在门边。

meaning: adj. 敏感的 n. 敏感的人
example: He is sensitive to loud noise.
exampleChinese: 他对大声噪音很敏感。

meaning: adj. 年少的 n. 年少者，晚辈
example: My junior brother studies in middle school.
exampleChinese: 我的弟弟在上中学。

meaning: n. 译者
example: The translator worked late to finish the book.
exampleChinese: 译者加班到很晚才完成这本书。

meaning: n. 冒险
example: Our class had an exciting adventure in the forest.
exampleChinese: 我们班在森林里经历了一次刺激的冒险。

meaning: n. 资格
example: She has the right qualification for the job.
exampleChinese: 她具备这份工作的合格资格。

meaning: n. 行星
example: Mars is the fourth planet from the sun.
exampleChinese: 火星是离太阳第四近的行星。

meaning: adj. 丑陋的
example: The wall looked ugly after the paint peeled off.
exampleChinese: 油漆脱落后，这面墙看起来很丑。

meaning: n. 历史，历史学
example: I enjoy studying history at school.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在学校学习历史。

meaning: n. 住宅 v. 覆盖
example: Their house is near the river.
exampleChinese: 他们的房子在河边。

meaning: n. 表面 adj. 表面的 v. 浮出水面
example: The surface of the lake was calm.
exampleChinese: 湖面很平静。

meaning: v. 致力于 vt. 奉献
example: He will devote more time to his studies.
exampleChinese: 他会把更多时间致力于学习。

meaning: n. 援助
example: The nurse came quickly to aid the old man.
exampleChinese: 护士很快赶来帮助那位老人。

meaning: adj. 组成的 n. 成分
example: The wheel has one broken component.
exampleChinese: 这个轮子有一个坏掉的部件。

meaning: n. 一代
example: My grandmother's generation lived through hard times.
exampleChinese: 我祖母那一代人经历过艰难岁月。

meaning: n. 边缘 v. 使锐利
example: Be careful near the edge of the roof.
exampleChinese: 在屋顶边缘附近要小心。

meaning: n. 器官
example: The heart is an important organ.
exampleChinese: 心脏是一个重要的器官。

meaning: adj. 联邦的 adv. 联邦政府地
example: The federal law applies to all states.
exampleChinese: 这项联邦法律适用于所有州。

meaning: adj. 活着的
