example: The fish was still alive in the bucket.
exampleChinese: 那条鱼在桶里还活着。

meaning: n. 顶部，顶端 v. 高出，超越 adj. 最高的，顶上的
example: The cat sat on top of the wall.
exampleChinese: 猫坐在墙顶上。

meaning: n. 少数民族 adj. 少数的
example: The school supports minority students.
exampleChinese: 学校支持少数族裔学生。

meaning: v. 有 aux. 已经 vt. 有，使，令
example: I have a blue backpack.
exampleChinese: 我有一个蓝色的背包。

meaning: n. 通知，布告 v. 通知
example: The school posted a notice on the wall.
exampleChinese: 学校在墙上张贴了一则通知。

meaning: n. 塔 v. 高耸
example: The old tower stands by the river.
exampleChinese: 那座古塔矗立在河边。

meaning: n. 女演员
example: The actress smiled at the audience.
exampleChinese: 那位女演员对观众微笑。

meaning: adj. 热情的
example: She was enthusiastic about the trip.
exampleChinese: 她对这次旅行很热情。

meaning: adj. 宽松的 v. 释放 adv. 松散地
example: These jeans are too loose for me.
exampleChinese: 这条牛仔裤我穿太宽松了。

meaning: adj. 充足的
example: The food was adequate for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 这些食物对全班来说是足够的。

meaning: v. 锁，锁上 n. 锁 vt. 锁， 锁上
example: Do not forget to lock the door.
exampleChinese: 别忘了锁门。

meaning: n. 血，血液 v. 从…抽血
example: There was blood on his knee after he fell.
exampleChinese: 他摔倒后，膝盖上有血。

meaning: n. 出生地
example: Paris is her birthplace.
exampleChinese: 巴黎是她的出生地。

meaning: n. 海军
example: My brother joined the navy after high school.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥高中毕业后加入了海军。

meaning: n. 美国人，美洲人 adj. 美国的，美洲的
example: My American friend likes dumplings.
exampleChinese: 我的美国朋友喜欢吃饺子。

meaning: n. 难题 adj. 成问题的
example: This math problem is hard.
exampleChinese: 这道数学难题很难。

meaning: aux. 应 modal verb. 〔某事〕必定
example: Shall we meet at the school gate at eight?
exampleChinese: 我们八点在校门口见好吗？

meaning: prep. 为，为了 conj. 因为
example: This gift is for you.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是给你的。

meaning: n. 不用电线的 adj. 无线的（副词cordlessly）
example: This cordless vacuum is easy to carry.
exampleChinese: 这台无线吸尘器很容易携带。

meaning: n. 快乐 vt. 使高兴 vi. 高兴
example: It is a pleasure to work with you.
exampleChinese: 和你一起工作是一件愉快的事。

meaning: n. 任命
example: I have a dentist appointment at three.
exampleChinese: 我三点有一个看牙医的预约。

meaning: aux. 将，将要 v. will的过去式 modal verb. 将，将会〔表示想做某事或认为某事会发生〕
example: I would help if I had more time.
exampleChinese: 如果我有更多时间，我会帮忙的。

meaning: n. 孙子
example: Her first grandchild was born last spring.
exampleChinese: 她的第一个孙子去年春天出生了。

meaning: n. 窗
example: Please close the window.
exampleChinese: 请把窗户关上。

meaning: v. 使改方向 adj. 再直接的 n. 再直接询问
example: Please redirect the call to my office.
exampleChinese: 请把电话转到我的办公室。

meaning: n. 外甥女
example: My niece drew a picture for me.
exampleChinese: 我的外甥女给我画了一幅画。

meaning: v. 上煤 n. 煤
example: The train carried coal to the city.
exampleChinese: 火车把煤运到了城市。

meaning: n. 大陆 adj. 大陆的
example: They moved back to the mainland last year.
exampleChinese: 他们去年搬回了大陆。

meaning: n. 母亲 v. 生下 adj. 母亲的
example: My mother makes soup for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭做汤。

meaning: n. 混沌
example: The room was in chaos after the party.
exampleChinese: 派对结束后，房间一片混乱。

meaning: adj. 有礼貌的，客气的
example: She was polite to the new student.
exampleChinese: 她对新同学很有礼貌。

meaning: n. 娱乐
example: The park offers free entertainment in summer.
exampleChinese: 这个公园在夏天提供免费的娱乐活动。

meaning: n. 人事部门 adj. 人员的
example: The personnel office hired two new workers.
exampleChinese: 人事部门雇了两名新员工。

meaning: n. 循环，周期 v. 盘旋，旋转
example: The children sat in a circle on the floor.
exampleChinese: 孩子们围成一圈坐在地板上。

meaning: n. 中文，汉语 adj. 中国的，中国人的
example: She is learning Chinese at school.
exampleChinese: 她正在学校学习中文。

meaning: n. 星期一
example: We have a math test on Monday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期一有数学考试。

meaning: v. 节省 prep. 除之外 n. 救援
example: We should save water every day.
exampleChinese: 我们应该每天节约用水。

meaning: n. 衣领 v. 抓住
example: He grabbed the dog by the collar.
exampleChinese: 他抓住了那只狗的项圈。

meaning: n. 点，圆点 v. 打上点
example: She drew a small dot on the map.
exampleChinese: 她在地图上画了一个小圆点。

meaning: n. 教练 v. 训练
example: Our basketball coach is very patient.
exampleChinese: 我们的篮球教练很有耐心。

meaning: adj. 原子能的
example: Scientists study nuclear energy carefully.
exampleChinese: 科学家们认真研究原子能。

meaning: n. 声音 v. 表达
example: Her voice is calm and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的声音平静而清晰。

meaning: v. 挑选 adj. 精选的 n. 被挑选者
example: Please select the best answer.
exampleChinese: 请挑选最好的答案。

meaning: n. 雷 v. 打雷
example: We heard thunder before the rain started.
exampleChinese: 下雨前我们听到了雷声。

meaning: n. 始祖，祖先
example: Her ancestor came to this village long ago.
exampleChinese: 她的祖先很久以前来到这个村庄。

meaning: v. 趋向，倾向 vi. 趋向 vt. 照管
example: These flowers tend to grow in the shade.
exampleChinese: 这些花往往长在阴凉处。

meaning: n. 碗 v. 玩保龄球
example: He ate rice from a blue bowl.
exampleChinese: 他用一个蓝色的碗吃米饭。

meaning: v. 假装 adj. 假装的
example: He tried to pretend that nothing happened.
exampleChinese: 他试图假装什么都没发生。

meaning: n. 多数
example: The majority of the class voted for the trip.
exampleChinese: 班上大多数人投票支持这次旅行。

meaning: n. 分，分钟 v. 将…记录下来 adj. 微小的
example: The class starts in five minute.
exampleChinese: 课还有五分钟开始。

meaning: n. 天气 v. 经受住 adj. 露天的
example: The weather is warm and sunny today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气温暖又晴朗。

meaning: n. 建议
example: Thank you for your suggestion about the class trip.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你对班级旅行提出的建议。

meaning: n. 日出
example: We woke up early to watch the sunrise.
exampleChinese: 我们早起去看日出。

meaning: adj. 相似的 adv. 以同样的方式
example: The two brothers look alike.
exampleChinese: 这两个兄弟看起来很相似。

meaning: n. 区域
example: This district has many small parks.
exampleChinese: 这个地区有很多小公园。

meaning: adj. 义务的 n. （花样滑冰、竞技体操等的）规定动作
example: School uniforms are compulsory here.
exampleChinese: 这里的校服是强制性的。

meaning: n. 西藏（中国一自治区）
example: She traveled through Tibet with her family.
exampleChinese: 她和家人一起游览了西藏。

meaning: v. 躺下 adj. 世俗的 n. 位置
example: Please lay the book on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把书放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 胃 v. 忍受
example: My stomach hurts after eating too much.
exampleChinese: 吃太多后我的胃疼。

meaning: n. 损害
example: The storm caused damage to the roof.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨对屋顶造成了损害。

meaning: n. 咳嗽，咳嗽声 v. 咳出
example: He has a bad cough this morning.
exampleChinese: 他今天早上咳嗽得很厉害。

meaning: v. 关闭 adj. 关闭的
example: Please shut the door before you leave.
exampleChinese: 你离开前请把门关上。

meaning: n. 周年纪念日
example: Today is their wedding anniversary.
exampleChinese: 今天是他们的结婚纪念日。

meaning: n. 外套 v. 覆盖…的表面
example: She put on her coat before going outside.
exampleChinese: 她出门前穿上了外套。

meaning: n. 火腿 v. 表演过火 adj. 过火的
example: He put ham in the sandwich.
exampleChinese: 他在三明治里放了火腿。

meaning: n. 深度
example: The pool has a depth of two meters.
exampleChinese: 这个游泳池的深度是两米。

meaning: n. 大人物 pron. 有人
example: Somebody left a notebook on the chair.
exampleChinese: 有人把一本笔记本落在椅子上了。

meaning: n. 要求
example: The job has one important requirement.
exampleChinese: 这份工作有一个重要要求。

meaning: n. 守卫 v. 警惕
example: Two dogs guard the farm at night.
exampleChinese: 两只狗在夜里守卫农场。

meaning: n. 超人
example: He looked like a superman on the field.
exampleChinese: 他在球场上看起来像个超人。

meaning: n. 艺术家
example: The artist painted a mountain at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 这位画家画了一座日出时的山。

meaning: v. 证明 vi. 证明是
example: Can you prove that this answer is correct?
exampleChinese: 你能证明这个答案是正确的吗？

meaning: v. 叫喊
example: I heard someone cry for help outside.
exampleChinese: 我听见外面有人大声呼救。

meaning: n. 午餐 v. 吃午餐
example: We usually eat lunch at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在中午吃午餐。

meaning: adj. 第四的，第四个的 n. 第四，月的第四日 num. 第四
example: She finished fourth in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中得了第四名。

meaning: n. 拖拉机
example: The tractor pulled the heavy load slowly.
exampleChinese: 拖拉机慢慢拉着沉重的货物。

meaning: adj. 全部的，整个的
example: We stayed there for the entire afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我们在那里待了整整一个下午。

meaning: adj. 空的 v. 露出 vt. 使赤裸
example: The tree was bare in winter.
exampleChinese: 这棵树在冬天光秃秃的。

meaning: v. 猜测
example: Can you guess the answer?
exampleChinese: 你能猜出答案吗？

meaning: adj. 外面的，外部的 n. 外部 adv. 在外面，向外面
example: The kids are playing outside now.
exampleChinese: 孩子们现在正在外面玩。

meaning: adj. 缺席的 v. 使缺席
example: She was absent from school yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天缺席了学校的课程。

meaning: n. 柴火
example: He gathered firewood for the campfire.
exampleChinese: 他为营火收集了柴火。

meaning: pron. 我们的
example: Our classroom is on the second floor.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室在二楼。

meaning: n. 冰岛（欧洲岛名
example: Iceland is famous for its hot springs and glaciers.
exampleChinese: 冰岛以温泉和冰川而闻名。

meaning: n. 生态学
example: She is studying ecology at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里学习生态学。

meaning: n. 宗教
example: Many families celebrate their religion in different ways.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭以不同的方式庆祝他们的宗教。

meaning: v. 参与，参加 vi. 参加
example: Students can participate in the school science fair.
exampleChinese: 学生可以参加学校的科学展览会。

meaning: adj. 不寻常的
example: It is unusual to see snow in April here.
exampleChinese: 在这里四月见到雪是不平常的。

meaning: n. 重力，地心引力
example: Gravity keeps the ball on the ground.
exampleChinese: 重力把球留在地面上。

meaning: n. 灰尘 v. 撒
example: Dust covered the old shelf.
exampleChinese: 灰尘覆盖了那只旧书架。

meaning: n. 科学
example: Science helps us understand the world.
exampleChinese: 科学帮助我们理解世界。

meaning: n. 钱
example: She saves her money in a small box.
exampleChinese: 她把钱存放在一个小盒子里。

meaning: v. 运送，乘船 n. 船
example: We ship the books every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们每周五运送这些书。

meaning: adj. 宝贵的
example: Her help was precious to us.
exampleChinese: 她的帮助对我们很宝贵。

meaning: adv. 今天
example: I have a piano lesson today.
exampleChinese: 我今天有一节钢琴课。

meaning: v. 忽略 n. 忽视 vt. 俯瞰
example: Don't overlook the small details.
exampleChinese: 不要忽略这些小细节。

meaning: v. 悬挂，垂下 n. 悬挂
example: Please hang your coat by the door.
exampleChinese: 请把你的外套挂在门边。

meaning: n. 票 v. 加标签于
example: I bought a train ticket online.
exampleChinese: 我在网上买了一张火车票。

meaning: n. 蚊子
example: A mosquito bit me last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚有一只蚊子咬了我。

meaning: n. 修理
example: The repairs took two hours.
exampleChinese: 修理花了两个小时。

meaning: n. 宿舍 adj. 住宅区的
example: She returned to the dormitory after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后她回到了宿舍。

meaning: v. 写，写字
example: I write in my diary every night.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上写日记。

meaning: n. 座位 v. 使…坐下 vt. 使就座
example: Is this seat taken?
exampleChinese: 这个座位有人吗？

meaning: v. 徘徊
example: The child began to wander around the park.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子开始在公园里徘徊。

meaning: adj. 试验性的，暂定的 n. 假设
example: We made a tentative plan for Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们为周六做了一个暂定的计划。

meaning: n. 十八 adj. 十八个的
example: My brother is eighteen this year.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥今年十八岁。

meaning: v. 持有 n. 控制
example: Please hold my bag for a minute.
exampleChinese: 请帮我拿一下我的包。

meaning: n. 习惯，习性 v. 使穿衣
example: Reading every day is a good habit.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读是一个好习惯。

meaning: n. 未来 adj. 将来的
example: She wants to be a doctor in the future.
exampleChinese: 她将来想当医生。

meaning: adj. 独立的 n. 独立自主者
example: She became an independent adult.
exampleChinese: 她成了一名独立的成年人。

meaning: n. 主题 adj. 服从的 v. 使…隶属
example: Math is my favorite subject at school.
exampleChinese: 数学是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

meaning: v. 讲
example: Please say your name clearly.
exampleChinese: 请清楚地说出你的名字。

meaning: n. 目标 v. 把……作为目标
example: Our target is to finish the project by Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们的目标是周五前完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 病， 疾病 vt. 传染
example: Doctors are working to stop the disease.
exampleChinese: 医生们正在努力阻止这种疾病。

meaning: n. 死
example: The old king's death changed the country.
exampleChinese: 老国王的去世改变了这个国家。

meaning: adv. 以前 adj. 以前的
example: He moved here two years ago.
exampleChinese: 他两年前搬到了这里。

meaning: v. 支撑，使稳住 n. 海滨
example: The old wall can shore up the roof for now.
exampleChinese: 这堵旧墙目前可以支撑屋顶。

meaning: v. 服从，听从
example: Students must obey the school rules.
exampleChinese: 学生必须遵守校规。

meaning: adj. 感谢的
example: I am thankful for your help.
exampleChinese: 我很感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 餐馆
example: We had lunch at a small restaurant.
exampleChinese: 我们在一家小餐馆吃了午饭。

meaning: adj. 令人敬畏的
example: The view from the mountain is awesome.
exampleChinese: 山上的景色令人敬畏。

meaning: v. 装饰
example: We decorate the classroom with paper flowers.
exampleChinese: 我们用纸花装饰教室。

meaning: n. 意见
example: In my judgement, this is the best choice.
exampleChinese: 依我看，这是最好的选择。

meaning: n. 祝贺
example: Please accept my congratulation on your new job.
exampleChinese: 请接受我对你新工作的祝贺。

meaning: adj. 适当的 v. 占用
example: This is the appropriate time to ask for help.
exampleChinese: 现在是寻求帮助的适当时机。

meaning: n. 评定
example: The teacher gave a careful assessment of her work.
exampleChinese: 老师对她的作业做了细致的评定。

meaning: n. 晚餐，晚饭
example: We had rice and fish for supper.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了米饭和鱼。

meaning: n. 爱好 adj. 弯曲的
example: He has a bent for drawing and music.
exampleChinese: 他对绘画和音乐有爱好。

meaning: pron. 他们
example: They play basketball every Saturday.
exampleChinese: 他们每个星期六都打篮球。

meaning: n. 移动
example: One wrong move can drop the blocks.
exampleChinese: 一步走错就会让这些积木掉下来。

meaning: n. 鹰
example: An eagle flew high above the mountain.
exampleChinese: 一只鹰在山上空高高飞过。

meaning: adj. 共同的 n. 普通
example: This is a common mistake for new students.
exampleChinese: 这对新学生来说是一个常见错误。

meaning: n. 顾客
example: The customer asked for a receipt.
exampleChinese: 那位顾客要了一张收据。

meaning: v. 投，抛 n. 投掷，抛 vt. 扔，抛
example: She cast the ball into the basket.
exampleChinese: 她把球投进了篮里。

meaning: n. 百万 adj. 百万的
example: The city has over one million people.
exampleChinese: 这座城市有一百多万人。

meaning: n. 习惯，惯例 adj. （衣服等）定做的
example: It is our custom to eat together on holidays.
exampleChinese: 节日里一起吃饭是我们的习俗。

meaning: adv. 特别地，非常 n. 临时演员 adj. 额外的，另外收费的
example: We need an extra chair for our guest.
exampleChinese: 我们需要给客人多准备一把椅子。

meaning: n. 灰
example: Ash covered the ground after the fire.
exampleChinese: 火灾后，地上覆盖着灰。

meaning: v. 评价
example: We need to evaluate the results carefully.
exampleChinese: 我们需要仔细评价这些结果。

meaning: v. 适合 n. 诉讼
example: He wore a dark blue suit to the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他穿着一套深蓝色西装去参加会议。

meaning: n. 仆人，佣人
example: The old servant opened the front door quietly.
exampleChinese: 那位老仆人轻轻地打开了前门。

meaning: n. 星期三
example: We have a music class on Wednesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期三有一节音乐课。

meaning: adv. 后来 prep. 在……之后 adj. 以后的
example: We went home soon after the game.
exampleChinese: 比赛后不久我们就回家了。

meaning: n. 企图，试图
example: I will attempt the hard question first.
exampleChinese: 我会先尝试那道难题。

meaning: v. 退休
example: My grandfather plans to retire next year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷打算明年退休。

meaning: v. 返回 adj. 报答的
example: We will return home before dark.
exampleChinese: 我们会在天黑前返回家。

meaning: v. 庆祝
example: We will celebrate her birthday tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们今晚要庆祝她的生日。

meaning: v. 转换 n. 开关
example: Please switch the light off before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前把灯关掉。

meaning: v. 治疗
example: The doctor tried to cure the patient.
exampleChinese: 医生试图治疗这位病人。

meaning: adj. 主要的 n. 原色
example: Safety is our primary concern.
exampleChinese: 安全是我们最主要的考虑。

meaning: v. 保持
example: Keep the window open for fresh air.
exampleChinese: 让窗户保持开着，好让空气流通。

meaning: n. 金字塔 v. 渐增
example: The stones formed a small pyramid in the yard.
exampleChinese: 院子里的石头堆成了一个小金字塔。

meaning: v. 给予，提供 vt. 买得起
example: This job can afford us more chances to learn.
exampleChinese: 这份工作能给我们提供更多学习的机会。

meaning: n. 伤口 v. 切割 adj. 割下的
example: Use these scissors to cut the paper.
exampleChinese: 用这把剪刀剪纸。

meaning: v. 禁止 n. 禁令
example: The school will ban phones during class.
exampleChinese: 学校将禁止上课时使用手机。

meaning: n. 碑 vt. 用碑牌纪念
example: The museum displayed an ancient tablet.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一块古老的碑。

meaning: n. 头 v. 前进 adj. 头的
example: She nodded her head and smiled.
exampleChinese: 她点了点头，笑了。

meaning: n. 外地人
example: As a foreigner, he asked for help at the station.
exampleChinese: 作为一个外国人，他在车站寻求帮助。

meaning: adj. 乐意的 v. 决心
example: She is willing to help her classmates.
exampleChinese: 她乐意帮助同学。

meaning: n. 矿物 adj. 矿物的
example: This rock contains a rare mineral.
exampleChinese: 这块岩石含有一种稀有矿物。

meaning: n. 树荫 v. 使阴暗
example: We sat in the shade of a big tree.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在一棵大树的树荫下。

meaning: adj. 各种各样的
example: There are various ways to solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 解决这个问题有各种各样的方法。

meaning: n. 诗
example: She wrote a short poem for her mother.
exampleChinese: 她为妈妈写了一首短诗。

meaning: prep. 超过 adv. 在上面 adj. 上文的
example: The picture hangs above my desk.
exampleChinese: 那幅画挂在我书桌上方。

meaning: n. 恐龙
example: The museum has a dinosaur skeleton.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆有一具恐龙骨架。

meaning: adj. 有价值的 n. 贵重物品
example: This ring is very valuable.
exampleChinese: 这枚戒指非常贵重。

meaning: v. 忍受 n. 燕子 vt. 吞下
example: I had to swallow my pride and apologize.
exampleChinese: 我不得不忍受屈辱，向他道歉。

meaning: n. 蓝色 adj. 蓝色的 v. 把…染成蓝色
example: She wore a blue dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条蓝色连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: n. 团队合作
example: Good teamwork helped our class finish the project on time.
exampleChinese: 良好的团队合作帮助我们班按时完成了项目。

meaning: n. 蜡 v. 给…上蜡 adj. 蜡制的
example: My father put wax on the wooden floor.
exampleChinese: 我父亲在木地板上打了蜡。

meaning: vt. 装轮胎于 n. 轮胎
example: He will tyre the new bike before the race.
exampleChinese: 他会在比赛前给新自行车装上轮胎。

meaning: n. 小时
example: The class lasts for one hour.
exampleChinese: 这节课持续一小时。

meaning: n. 战场
example: The hill became a battleground during the war.
exampleChinese: 这座小山在战争中变成了战场。

meaning: adv. 有时
example: I sometimes read in the library after school.
exampleChinese: 我有时放学后在图书馆看书。

meaning: v. 弄脏 n. 泥
example: The rain turned the path into mud.
exampleChinese: 雨水把小路变成了泥地。

meaning: n. 办公室
example: Her office is on the third floor.
exampleChinese: 她的办公室在三楼。

meaning: n. 腿
example: His leg was hurt during the game.
exampleChinese: 他的腿在比赛中受伤了。

meaning: n. 瓜
example: We cut a melon for dessert.
exampleChinese: 我们切了一个瓜当甜点。

meaning: n. 属，种 v. 使参加比赛
example: The children race across the field.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在田野上赛跑。

meaning: adj. 可选择的 n. 选修科目
example: The art class is optional this term.
exampleChinese: 这学期美术课是可选择的。

meaning: v. 停止
example: Please stop talking in the library.
exampleChinese: 请停止在图书馆里说话。

meaning: n. 垃圾箱
example: Please throw the trash into the dustbin.
exampleChinese: 请把垃圾扔进垃圾箱。

meaning: n. 屏，幕 v. 筛
example: The movie started on the big screen.
exampleChinese: 电影在大屏幕上开始播放了。

meaning: n. 长袜
example: She hung her stocking by the bed.
exampleChinese: 她把长袜挂在床边。

meaning: adj. 平的 adv. （尤指贴着另一表面）平直地 n. 平地
example: The road is flat after the bridge.
exampleChinese: 过了桥以后，这条路是平的。

meaning: adj. 独自的 adv. 独自地
example: He lives alone in a small apartment.
exampleChinese: 他独自住在一间小公寓里。

meaning: n. 印刷业 v. 印刷
example: This shop can print our class photos.
exampleChinese: 这家店可以印刷我们班的照片。

meaning: v. 死亡 n. 冲模，钢模
example: Many flowers die without enough water.
exampleChinese: 没有足够的水，许多花会枯死。

meaning: n. 鼠标 v. 探出
example: A small mouse ran under the table.
exampleChinese: 一只小老鼠跑到了桌子下面。

meaning: n. 空间 v. 留间隔
example: There is not enough space on this desk.
exampleChinese: 这张桌子上没有足够的空间。

meaning: adj. 早期的 adv. 提早
example: We arrived early for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们提早到了火车站。

meaning: adj. 运动的，运动员的
example: He has an athletic build and strong legs.
exampleChinese: 他身材健壮，腿部有力。

meaning: adj. 立方体的
example: The box has a cubic shape.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子是立方体形状的。

meaning: n. 秘密 adj. 秘密的
example: Can you keep a secret?
exampleChinese: 你能保守秘密吗？

meaning: n. 灌木 v. 以灌木装饰 adj. 如灌木般长得低矮的
example: A small bird hid in the bush.
exampleChinese: 一只小鸟躲在灌木里。

meaning: v. 计算
example: Can you calculate the total cost for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我计算一下总费用吗？

meaning: adj. 特级的 n. 特级品，特大号
example: You did a super job on the poster.
exampleChinese: 你的海报做得极好。

meaning: n. 人 v. 居住于
example: Many people walk in the park every morning.
exampleChinese: 每天早上很多人在公园里散步。

meaning: v. 刹车 n. 闸，刹车
example: The driver had to brake suddenly at the crossing.
exampleChinese: 司机不得不在十字路口突然刹车。

meaning: n. 方面 v. 支持 adj. 旁的
example: On this side of the paper, write your name.
exampleChinese: 在这张纸的这一面写上你的名字。

meaning: n. 安全
example: Road safety is important for children.
exampleChinese: 道路安全对孩子们很重要。

meaning: n. 雪球 v. 掷雪球
example: The children rolled a snowball in the yard.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在院子里滚了一个雪球。

meaning: v. 演说 n. 地址
example: Please write your address on this form.
exampleChinese: 请把你的地址写在这张表上。

meaning: n. 商店 v. 贮藏
example: I bought milk at the store.
exampleChinese: 我在商店买了牛奶。

meaning: n. 制度
example: Honesty is a basic institution of our school life.
exampleChinese: 诚实是我们学校生活中的一项基本制度。

meaning: adj. 灵巧的
example: Her handwriting is neat and easy to read.
exampleChinese: 她的字写得很灵巧，也很容易辨认。

meaning: n. 笑
example: The room filled with laughter after the joke.
exampleChinese: 笑话过后，房间里充满了笑声。

meaning: n. 书包
example: My schoolbag is under the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书包在桌子下面。

meaning: v. 鼓掌，拍手 n. 鼓掌
example: Please clap for the school band.
exampleChinese: 请为学校乐队鼓掌。

meaning: n. 墙壁，围墙 v. 用墙围住 adj. 墙壁的
example: There is a clock on the wall.
exampleChinese: 墙上有一个钟。

meaning: n. 鸭子 v. 闪避
example: He had to duck when the ball flew toward him.
exampleChinese: 球朝他飞来时，他不得不闪避。

meaning: v. 下载
example: I will download the app before class.
exampleChinese: 我会在上课前下载这个应用。

meaning: v. 渴望，痛苦 n. 松树 adj. 松木的
example: Many young people pine for their hometown when they move away.
exampleChinese: 许多年轻人搬走后会思念家乡。

meaning: v. 同意，赞成
example: I agree with your plan to leave early.
exampleChinese: 我同意你早点出发的计划。

meaning: v. 记得
example: Do you remember his name?
exampleChinese: 你记得他的名字吗？

meaning: adj. 大的 adv. 大大地 n. 大
example: They live in a large house near the park.
exampleChinese: 他们住在公园附近的一所大房子里。

meaning: adj. 好奇的，有求知欲的
example: The curious boy asked many questions about space.
exampleChinese: 那个好奇的男孩问了许多关于太空的问题。

meaning: n. 一天 adv. 每天 adj. 日间的
example: I read for one hour every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天阅读一小时。

meaning: n. 摩托车 v. 骑摩托车
example: He rides his motorcycle to work every day.
exampleChinese: 他每天骑摩托车去上班。

meaning: n. 牛仔裤
example: He wears blue jeans on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他周末穿蓝色牛仔裤。

meaning: adj. 忙碌的 v. 使忙于
example: She is busy with her homework.
exampleChinese: 她正忙着做作业。

meaning: v. 使惊讶
example: The news astonish everyone in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 这个消息让教室里的每个人都很惊讶。

meaning: n. 棉花 v. 一致 adj. 棉的
example: She wore a soft cotton shirt.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件柔软的棉衬衫。

meaning: v. 向…课税 n. 税金
example: The government may tax imported cars.
exampleChinese: 政府可能会对进口汽车征税。

meaning: adj. 多汁的
example: The apple was fresh and juicy.
exampleChinese: 这个苹果又新鲜又多汁。

meaning: v. 申请
example: I will apply for the scholarship tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天将申请这项奖学金。

meaning: adj. 侵略性的
example: The dog became aggressive when strangers came close.
exampleChinese: 陌生人靠近时，那只狗变得很有攻击性。

meaning: n. 运河 v. 在…开凿运河
example: A canal connects the river to the lake.
exampleChinese: 一条运河把这条河和湖连接起来。

meaning: v. 取得 vt. 达到
example: She worked hard to achieve her goal.
exampleChinese: 她努力工作以取得自己的目标。

meaning: adj. 直的 adv. 直接地 n. 直
example: The road is straight for two miles.
exampleChinese: 这条路笔直地延伸了两英里。

meaning: n. 肩，肩膀 v. 肩负
example: She carried the bag on her shoulder.
exampleChinese: 她把包扛在肩膀上。

meaning: adj. 苦的 n. 苦味 adv. 激烈地
example: The medicine has a bitter taste.
exampleChinese: 这种药有苦味。

meaning: n. 增长
example: The growth of the city is very fast.
exampleChinese: 这座城市的增长非常快。

meaning: n. 志愿者 adj. 志愿的 v. 自愿
example: I volunteer at the animal shelter on Saturdays.
exampleChinese: 我每周六在动物收容所做志愿者。

meaning: n. 嘴唇 vt. 以嘴唇碰 adj. 口头上的
example: She bit her lip when she was nervous.
exampleChinese: 她紧张时咬了咬嘴唇。

meaning: adj. 典型的，有代表性的 n. 代表
example: He gave a representative answer for the whole class.
exampleChinese: 他给出了一个能代表全班的回答。

meaning: adj. 相同的 pron. 同样的事物或人（通常与the连用） adv. 同样地（通常与the连用）
example: We wear the same school uniform.
exampleChinese: 我们穿着相同的校服。

meaning: adj. 南的 n. 南方人
example: They traveled through southern China last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天他们游览了中国南方。

meaning: n. 白天
example: We left before daylight faded.
exampleChinese: 天光变暗前我们就离开了。

meaning: n. 交响乐
example: We listened to a symphony in music class.
exampleChinese: 我们在音乐课上听了一首交响曲。

meaning: n. 西瓜
example: We ate cold watermelon after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们吃了冰镇西瓜。

meaning: n. 抽烟 adv. 冒着烟 adj. 准许吸烟的
example: Smoking is not allowed in this building.
exampleChinese: 这栋楼里不允许吸烟。

meaning: n. 临床
example: The clinic opens at eight every morning.
exampleChinese: 这家诊所每天早上八点开门。

meaning: n. 模型 v. 模拟 adj. 模范的
example: Our science teacher showed us a model of the moon.
exampleChinese: 我们的科学老师给我们看了一个月球模型。

meaning: adv. 部分地
example: The work was partly finished by noon.
exampleChinese: 这项工作到中午时只完成了一部分。

meaning: n. 画家
example: The painter drew a quiet country road.
exampleChinese: 这位画家画了一条安静的乡间小路。

meaning: n. (女士)手提袋 v. （嘴巴）皱起，使缩拢
example: She kept her phone in her purse.
exampleChinese: 她把手机放在手提袋里。

meaning: adj. 典型的 n. 特征
example: Patience is a characteristic of a good teacher.
exampleChinese: 耐心是好老师的一个特征。

meaning: n. 皮肤 v. 剥皮
example: Cold wind can dry out your skin.
exampleChinese: 冷风会使你的皮肤变干。

meaning: n. 火车 v. 培养
example: We took the train to Beijing.
exampleChinese: 我们坐火车去北京。

meaning: adj. 生动的
example: Her vivid story made us feel like we were there.
exampleChinese: 她生动的故事让我们感觉仿佛身临其境。

meaning: n. 操作
example: The safe operation of the machine is important.
exampleChinese: 机器的安全操作很重要。

meaning: v. 检查，核对 n. <美>支票
example: Please check your answer again.
exampleChinese: 请再检查一遍你的答案。

meaning: adj. 酒精的 n. 酒鬼
example: The test showed an alcoholic smell in the sample.
exampleChinese: 测试显示样本中有酒精味。

meaning: n. 按钮 v. 扣住
example: Press the button to start the machine.
exampleChinese: 按下按钮来启动机器。

meaning: n. 女售货员
example: The salesgirl wrapped the gift carefully.
exampleChinese: 那位女售货员仔细地包好了礼物。

meaning: v. 烤，焙 adj. 烘烤的 n. 烤肉
example: We will roast the chicken for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们会把鸡肉烤来当晚饭。

meaning: n. 共产党员 adj. 共产主义的
example: My grandfather was a communist when he was young.
exampleChinese: 我祖父年轻时是一名共产党员。

meaning: v. 给 n. 弹性
example: I want to give my teacher a thank-you card.
exampleChinese: 我想送给老师一张感谢卡。

meaning: v. 伤害 n. 创伤
example: The fall left a scar on his knee.
exampleChinese: 那次摔倒在他的膝盖上留下了伤疤。

meaning: v. 创立，建立 vt. 成立
example: They plan to found a new school here.
exampleChinese: 他们计划在这里创立一所新学校。

meaning: n. 手帕
example: She folded the handkerchief and put it in her pocket.
exampleChinese: 她把手帕叠好，放进口袋里。

meaning: n. 获得物，获得
example: The museum's new acquisition is a rare painting.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆新获得的藏品是一幅罕见的画作。

meaning: n. 布 adj. 布制的
example: This cloth feels soft and warm.
exampleChinese: 这种布摸起来又柔软又暖和。

meaning: adj. 单一的 n. 一个 v. 选出
example: A single tree stood in the field.
exampleChinese: 田野里孤零零地立着一棵树。

meaning: adj. 后者的
example: I like the latter choice better.
exampleChinese: 我更喜欢后者。

meaning: adj. 有耐心的 n. 病人
example: Our teacher is patient with new students.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师对新学生很有耐心。

meaning: n. 墨西哥
example: My cousin lives in Mexico.
exampleChinese: 我的表亲住在墨西哥。

meaning: n. 文书工作
example: She spent the afternoon on paperwork.
exampleChinese: 她花了整个下午处理文书工作。

meaning: n. 食欲
example: The smell of soup gave him an appetite.
exampleChinese: 汤的香味让他有了食欲。

meaning: n. 盘 v. 盛于碟盘中
example: She put some fruit on a dish.
exampleChinese: 她把一些水果放在一个盘子里。

meaning: v. 轻敲 n. 水龙头
example: Please tap the screen to start the game.
exampleChinese: 请轻敲屏幕开始游戏。

meaning: n. 佛教
example: He studied Buddhism at university.
exampleChinese: 他在大学里学习佛教。

meaning: v. 来 int. 嗨！ vi. 来，来到
example: Please come to my room after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后请来我的房间。

meaning: n. 大学
example: My sister wants to study medicine at university.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐想在大学学习医学。

meaning: n. 床 v. 使睡觉
example: The bed by the window is mine.
exampleChinese: 窗边的那张床是我的。

meaning: n. 埃及（非洲国家）
example: We took a boat trip along the Nile in Egypt.
exampleChinese: 我们在埃及的尼罗河上乘船游览。

meaning: n. 项链
example: She wore a silver necklace to the party.
exampleChinese: 她戴着一条银项链去参加派对。

meaning: n. 失业
example: Unemployment rose after the factory closed.
exampleChinese: 工厂关闭后，失业率上升了。

meaning: n. 足球 vi. 踢足球
example: The boys are playing football after school.
exampleChinese: 男孩们放学后在踢足球。

meaning: adj. 向前 adv. 向前地
example: The car is parked ahead of the school.
exampleChinese: 汽车停在学校前面。

meaning: n. 印象
example: The interview made a good impression on her.
exampleChinese: 这次面试给她留下了好印象。

meaning: v. 购买 n. 购买，买卖
example: I need to buy a notebook after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后我需要买一个笔记本。

meaning: v. 吐痰 n. 唾液
example: He tried not to spit on the sidewalk.
exampleChinese: 他尽量不往人行道上吐痰。

meaning: prep. 穿过 adv. 横过
example: We walked across the bridge together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走过了那座桥。

meaning: adv. 不 adj. 没有 abbr. 数字（number）
example: There is no milk left in the fridge.
exampleChinese: 冰箱里没有牛奶了。

meaning: v. 宣布
example: The teacher will announce the test results tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会宣布考试成绩。

meaning: v. 经营 n. 票价
example: The shop does well because it knows how to fare in a tough market.
exampleChinese: 这家商店知道如何在艰难的市场中经营，所以生意不错。

meaning: adj. 可能的 n. 可能性
example: It is possible to finish today.
exampleChinese: 今天完成是可能的。

meaning: n. 海湾 v. 向…吠叫
example: The bay was calm in the evening light.
exampleChinese: 傍晚的灯光下，海湾很平静。

meaning: n. 四分之一 v. 住宿
example: Only a quarter of the cake was left.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕只剩下四分之一了。

meaning: n. 刘海 adv. 直接地 v. 重击
example: Her bang fell over one eye.
exampleChinese: 她的刘海垂到了一只眼睛上。

meaning: adj. 顽固的
example: She is stubborn and refuses to change her mind.
exampleChinese: 她很顽固，拒绝改变主意。

meaning: adv. 非常，极其
example: The soup is extremely hot, so be careful.
exampleChinese: 汤非常烫，小心一点。

meaning: v. 花费 n. 费用，代价，成本
example: The ticket cost fifty yuan.
exampleChinese: 这张票价格是五十元。

meaning: n. 奶酪 v. 停止 adj. 叛变的
example: This sandwich has cheese and tomato.
exampleChinese: 这个三明治里有奶酪和西红柿。

meaning: adj. 简单的 adv. 直截了当地
example: The instructions were straightforward and easy to follow.
exampleChinese: 说明很简单，也很容易照着做。

meaning: n. 旅行者
example: The traveler took a photo of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 那位旅行者给那座老桥拍了张照片。

meaning: n. 国际组织 adj. 国际的
example: The school has many international students.
exampleChinese: 这所学校有很多国际学生。

meaning: adj. 严重的， 急性的
example: She needs urgent care for an acute pain in her leg.
exampleChinese: 她腿部的急性疼痛需要紧急治疗。

meaning: adj. 温和的 v. 使温和 n. 蛆，饵
example: Her gentle voice made the baby calm down.
exampleChinese: 她温柔的声音让宝宝平静下来。

meaning: v. 想像
example: Can you imagine life without the internet?
exampleChinese: 你能想像没有互联网的生活吗？

meaning: n. （美）雨衣
example: Take your raincoat because it may rain later.
exampleChinese: 带上你的雨衣，因为等会儿可能下雨。

meaning: adj. 诙谐的，幽默的
example: Our teacher is humorous and kind.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师既幽默又亲切。

meaning: vt. 使极度疲劳 n. 稀粥
example: The long march began to gruel the soldiers.
exampleChinese: 长途行军开始让士兵们极度疲劳。

meaning: adj. 好的 n. 罚款 adv. 很好地
example: The weather is fine today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气很好。

meaning: v. 离开 adj. 摆脱了…的
example: He decided to quit his job last month.
exampleChinese: 他上个月决定辞职。

meaning: n. 蚂蚁
example: An ant crawled across the table.
exampleChinese: 一只蚂蚁爬过了桌子。

meaning: v. 挤 n. 压榨
example: Please squeeze the juice from the lemon.
exampleChinese: 请把柠檬汁挤出来。

meaning: n. 象
example: The elephant used its trunk to pick up water.
exampleChinese: 大象用鼻子吸起了水。

meaning: n. 害虫
example: A pest destroyed several plants in the garden.
exampleChinese: 一种害虫毁掉了花园里的几株植物。

meaning: v. 使分离 adj. 单独的 n. 分开
example: Please separate the red cards from the blue ones.
exampleChinese: 请把红色卡片和蓝色卡片分开。

meaning: n. 电报 vt. 用电报发送 vi. 发电报
example: They sent a telegram to tell us the news.
exampleChinese: 他们发了一封电报告诉我们这个消息。

meaning: v. 发音
example: Can you pronounce this word clearly?
exampleChinese: 你能清楚地发这个单词的音吗？

meaning: adj. 电子的 n. 电子电路
example: She bought a new electronic keyboard for music class.
exampleChinese: 她为音乐课买了一架新的电子键盘。

meaning: n. 跳跃
example: That horse can make a high jump.
exampleChinese: 那匹马能跳得很高。

meaning: n. 份额 adv. （与形容词和副词连用）很，非常 pron. 大量
example: We still have a lot of time.
exampleChinese: 我们还有很多时间。

meaning: adv. 故意地
example: He deliberately broke the rule to get attention.
exampleChinese: 他故意违反规定来引起注意。

meaning: n. 雕塑
example: We saw a beautiful sculpture in the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们在博物馆里看到了一件漂亮的雕塑。

meaning: v. 剽窃 n. 偷窃
example: It is wrong to steal from others.
exampleChinese: 偷别人的东西是不对的。

meaning: n. 超短裙
example: She wore a miniskirt to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条超短裙去参加派对。

meaning: n. 研究
example: She is doing research on sea animals.
exampleChinese: 她在研究海洋动物。

meaning: n. 冰箱
example: The milk is in the refrigerator.
exampleChinese: 牛奶在电冰箱里。

meaning: n. 圆 adj. 圆的 adv. 在周围
example: We sat at a round table for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在一张圆桌旁吃晚饭。

meaning: adj. 随便的 n. 便装
example: He likes casual clothes on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他周末喜欢穿休闲服。

meaning: v. 取消
example: They may cancel the game because of rain.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，他们可能会取消比赛。

meaning: n. 男孩，男人 pron. 他
example: He is my new classmate.
exampleChinese: 他是我的新同学。

meaning: n. 同事
example: My colleague helped me finish the report.
exampleChinese: 我的同事帮我完成了这份报告。

meaning: conj. 是否 pron. 两个中的哪一个
example: I do not know whether he will come today.
exampleChinese: 我不知道他今天是否会来。

meaning: adj. 活的 v. 经历 vi. 生活
example: Many fish cannot live out of water.
exampleChinese: 许多鱼离开水就不能存活。

meaning: prep. 超过 adv. 在远处 n. 远处
example: The river flows beyond the village.
exampleChinese: 这条河流经村庄那边更远的地方。

meaning: adj. 生病的 adv. 不利地 n. 疾病
example: He stayed home because he was ill.
exampleChinese: 他因为生病而待在家里。

meaning: v. 滑冰 n. 溜冰
example: They skate on the lake every winter.
exampleChinese: 他们每年冬天都在湖上滑冰。

meaning: n. 香草
example: This soup tastes good with fresh herb.
exampleChinese: 这汤加上新鲜香草后味道很好。

meaning: adj. 最近的
example: Her recent trip to Beijing was exciting.
exampleChinese: 她最近的北京之行很令人兴奋。

meaning: v. 讨论
example: We will discuss the problem after class.
exampleChinese: 我们将在课后讨论这个问题。

meaning: adj. 沉默的 n. 无声电影
example: The room became silent after the bell rang.
exampleChinese: 铃响后，房间里变得安静无声。

meaning: n. 种类 adj. 和蔼的
example: Our new teacher is very kind to us.
exampleChinese: 我们的新老师对我们很和蔼。

meaning: adv. 非常，很
example: I miss my hometown badly.
exampleChinese: 我非常想念我的家乡。

meaning: adj. 矛盾的 n. 对立物
example: Their explanations were contradictory and confusing.
exampleChinese: 他们的解释互相矛盾，让人困惑。

meaning: n. 淋浴 v. 大量地给予
example: I take a shower every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上都洗淋浴。

meaning: n. 方面
example: One important aspect of the plan is cost.
exampleChinese: 这个计划的一个重要方面是成本。

meaning: n. 十年，十年期
example: A decade passed before the town changed.
exampleChinese: 十年过去了，这个镇才发生变化。

meaning: n. 距离 v. 疏远
example: The distance from my home to school is three kilometers.
exampleChinese: 从我家到学校的距离是三公里。

meaning: n. 拉链 v. 拉上拉链
example: Please zip the zipper on your jacket.
exampleChinese: 请把你夹克上的拉链拉上。

meaning: adj. 永久的，永恒的 n. 烫发（等于permanent wave）
example: This old phone is still permanent.
exampleChinese: 这部旧手机仍然是永久保留的。

meaning: n. 荣誉 v. 尊敬
example: It is an honour to meet her.
exampleChinese: 见到她是我的荣幸。

meaning: adj. 政治的
example: The school held a political debate.
exampleChinese: 学校举办了一场政治辩论。

meaning: v. 组织起来
example: We organise the class trip together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起组织班级旅行。

meaning: n. 驾驶员
example: The bus driver stopped at the corner.
exampleChinese: 公交车司机在拐角处停了下来。

meaning: adj. 完整的 v. 完成
example: Please complete your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前完成你的作业。

meaning: adv. 无处 adj. 不存在的
example: The key was nowhere to be found.
exampleChinese: 钥匙哪儿也找不到。

meaning: n. 商店 v. 购物
example: My aunt owns a flower shop near the school.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈在学校附近开了一家花店。

meaning: adv. 逐步地
example: The sky gradually turned dark.
exampleChinese: 天空逐渐变暗了。

meaning: n. 理发师
example: The shaver cut hair very quickly.
exampleChinese: 这位理发师剪头发很快。

meaning: n. 病毒
example: A virus can spread from person to person.
exampleChinese: 病毒可以在人与人之间传播。

meaning: n. 磁盘，磁碟片
example: I saved the file on a disk.
exampleChinese: 我把文件保存到了磁盘上。

meaning: n. 条，一条面包 v. 游荡
example: We shared a loaf of bread.
exampleChinese: 我们分吃了一条面包。

meaning: v. 逮捕
example: Police will arrest the thief soon.
exampleChinese: 警察很快会逮捕那个小偷。

meaning: adj. 平方的 v. 使成方形 n. 平方
example: The room is ten square meters.
exampleChinese: 这个房间有十平方米。

meaning: n. 司法，法律制裁
example: The judge spoke about justice.
exampleChinese: 法官谈到了司法公正。

meaning: abbr. 速度三角形定位法（dead reckoning）
example: Dr Wang is our family doctor.
exampleChinese: 王医生是我们的家庭医生。

meaning: n. 世界
example: People around the world watch the game.
exampleChinese: 世界各地的人都看这场比赛。

meaning: conj. （表条件）如果 n. 条件
example: If it rains, we will stay inside.
exampleChinese: 如果下雨，我们就待在室内。

meaning: n. 污垢，泥土
example: There was dirt on the floor.
exampleChinese: 地板上有污垢。

meaning: n. 程序，手续
example: Follow the procedure carefully.
exampleChinese: 请认真遵循这个程序。

meaning: v. 配制 n. 混合
example: Mix the flour with water in a bowl.
exampleChinese: 把面粉和水在碗里混合。

meaning: adj. 坚强的 adv. 强劲地
example: She is strong enough to carry the box.
exampleChinese: 她足够强壮，能搬起这个箱子。

meaning: n. 事实
example: It is a fact that water freezes in winter.
exampleChinese: 水在冬天会结冰，这是事实。

meaning: n. 千克
example: The bag of rice weighs one kilo.
exampleChinese: 这袋米重一千克。

meaning: adj. 科学的
example: The report is based on scientific research.
exampleChinese: 这份报告以科学研究为基础。

meaning: v. 喂养 n. 饲料
example: I feed the fish every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喂鱼。

meaning: n. 种类，分类
example: This book fits into one category.
exampleChinese: 这本书属于一个类别。

meaning: adj. 无生命的 adv. 完全地 n. 死者
example: The plant is dead.
exampleChinese: 这株植物死了。

meaning: prep. 反对，违反 adj. 不利的
example: I am against wasting food.
exampleChinese: 我反对浪费食物。

meaning: adj. 腐败的，贪污的 v. 使腐烂
example: The corrupt official lost his job.
exampleChinese: 那名腐败官员丢了工作。

meaning: n. 笑 vi. 笑， 大笑
example: Her laugh filled the room.
exampleChinese: 她的笑声充满了整个房间。

meaning: n. 空域
example: The plane entered our airspace.
exampleChinese: 飞机进入了我们的空域。

meaning: n. 香子兰 adj. 香草味的
example: I like vanilla ice cream on hot days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在炎热的日子里吃香草冰淇淋。

meaning: v. 锤击 n. 铁锤
example: He used a hammer to fix the broken chair.
exampleChinese: 他用铁锤修好了那把坏椅子。

meaning: n. 香水 v. 洒香水于…
example: She sprayed perfume on her wrist before school.
exampleChinese: 她在上学前把香水喷在手腕上。

meaning: pron. 谁的（疑问代词） conj. 谁的
example: Whose bag is on the chair?
exampleChinese: 椅子上的包是谁的？

meaning: n. 领带
example: He wore a blue necktie to the interview.
exampleChinese: 他面试时系了一条蓝色领带。

meaning: v. 埋葬 vt. 埋， 葬
example: We bury the time capsule in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们把时间胶囊埋在公园里。

meaning: n. 卷心菜，甘蓝菜，洋白菜
example: She bought a fresh cabbage at the market.
exampleChinese: 她在市场买了一个新鲜的卷心菜。

meaning: n. 缺点
example: Every team has a shortcoming they need to fix.
exampleChinese: 每个团队都有需要改进的缺点。

meaning: n. 盐 adj. 咸水的 v. 用盐腌
example: Please add a little salt to the soup.
exampleChinese: 请在汤里加一点盐。

meaning: n. 七十 adj. 七十的
example: My grandfather is seventy this year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷今年七十岁。

meaning: n. 长度，长
example: The length of the rope is two meters.
exampleChinese: 这根绳子的长度是两米。

meaning: adj. 最差的，最坏的 n. 最坏 adv. 最坏地
example: That was the worst storm of the year.
exampleChinese: 那是今年最糟糕的一场暴风雨。

meaning: n. 观众
example: The audience clapped after the song ended.
exampleChinese: 歌曲结束后，观众鼓起了掌。

meaning: n. 测量
example: We used a ruler to measure the desk.
exampleChinese: 我们用尺子测量了书桌。

meaning: n. 轮廓 v. 概述 vt. 描绘轮廓
example: Please outline the main points of your report.
exampleChinese: 请概述一下你报告的要点。

meaning: n. 浴室
example: The bathroom is at the end of the hall.
exampleChinese: 浴室在走廊尽头。

meaning: n. 高地
example: From that height, we could see the whole lake.
exampleChinese: 从那个高地上，我们能看见整个湖。

meaning: n. 大草原
example: The bison crossed the prairie at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时，野牛穿过大草原。

meaning: n. 平衡 v. 使平衡
example: She tried to balance the box on her head.
exampleChinese: 她试着把盒子稳稳地顶在头上。

meaning: adj. 盲目的 adv. 盲目地 n. 掩饰，借口
example: The blind man crossed the street slowly.
exampleChinese: 那位盲人慢慢地穿过街道。

meaning: adj. 手提的，便携式的 n. 手提式打字机
example: This portable speaker fits in my backpack.
exampleChinese: 这台便携式扬声器能放进我的背包里。

meaning: n. 行，排 v. 划船
example: The students sat in the front row.
exampleChinese: 学生们坐在前排。

meaning: adv. 真实地，不假
example: She truly enjoys reading before bed.
exampleChinese: 她真的喜欢睡前阅读。

meaning: adj. 向下的 adv. 向下
example: The plane moved downward through the clouds.
exampleChinese: 飞机穿过云层向下飞行。

meaning: n. 口音 v. 强调
example: She speaks English with an American accent.
exampleChinese: 她说英语时带有美国口音。

meaning: n. 篮子 vt. 装入篮
example: She put the apples in a basket.
exampleChinese: 她把苹果放进了一个篮子里。

meaning: v. 剃须 n. 刮脸，剃胡子
example: He will shave before the interview.
exampleChinese: 他会在面试前刮胡子。

meaning: adj. 外面的，外部的 n. 环外命中
example: The outer wall of the house is painted blue.
exampleChinese: 房子的外墙漆成了蓝色。

meaning: n. 笔记 v. 注意 vt. 记录
example: I wrote a note after class.
exampleChinese: 我课后写了一则笔记。

meaning: n. 渥太华（加拿大首都）
example: Ottawa is the capital of Canada.
exampleChinese: 渥太华是加拿大的首都。

meaning: n. 吸烟者
example: The smoker stood outside the station.
exampleChinese: 那个吸烟者站在车站外面。

meaning: v. 拖累 n. 拖
example: The heavy bag began to drag him backward.
exampleChinese: 沉重的包开始把他往后拖。

meaning: v. 使…混合
example: We unite lemon juice and honey for the drink.
exampleChinese: 我们把柠檬汁和蜂蜜混合做这杯饮料。

meaning: n. 西班牙
example: We traveled to Spain last summer.
exampleChinese: 我们去年夏天去了西班牙。

meaning: n. （英）邮政编码
example: Please write your postcode on the form.
exampleChinese: 请在表格上写下你的邮政编码。

meaning: adj. 自信的
example: She felt confident before the speech.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲前感到很自信。

meaning: n. 网站（全球资讯网的主机站）
example: I found the school calendar on the website.
exampleChinese: 我在这个网站上找到了学校日历。

meaning: v. 膨胀 n. 肿胀 adj. 漂亮的
example: My ankle may swell after the injury.
exampleChinese: 我的脚踝受伤后可能会肿起来。

meaning: n. 药 v. 用药物治疗
example: The doctor gave me medicine for my cough.
exampleChinese: 医生给了我治咳嗽的药。

meaning: n. 集合 v. 树立 adj. 固定的
example: She set the cup on the table carefully.
exampleChinese: 她小心地把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 梳子 v. 梳头发
example: She used a comb to fix her hair.
exampleChinese: 她用梳子整理头发。

meaning: n. 销售
example: The store made a big sale before the holiday.
exampleChinese: 这家商店在假日前进行了一次大销售。

meaning: n. 外来移民
example: Immigration increased in the city last year.
exampleChinese: 去年这个城市的外来移民增加了。

meaning: v. 处理 n. 过程，进行 adj. 经过特殊加工（或处理）的
example: The computer can process the file quickly.
exampleChinese: 这台电脑可以快速处理这个文件。

meaning: n. 东方 adj. 东方的 adv. 向东方
example: The sun rises in the east.
exampleChinese: 太阳从东方升起。

meaning: n. 匆忙 v. 仓促（做某事）
example: We must hurry or we will miss the bus.
exampleChinese: 我们得快点，不然会错过公交车。

meaning: adv. 如何 n. 方法
example: Can you show me how to use this camera?
exampleChinese: 你能告诉我如何使用这台相机吗？

meaning: n. 野兽
example: A beast roared in the dark forest.
exampleChinese: 一只野兽在黑暗的森林里吼叫。

meaning: n. 实践 v. 练习
example: I practice the piano every evening.
exampleChinese: 我每天晚上练习弹钢琴。

meaning: adj. 可靠的 n. 可靠的人
example: Our teacher is very reliable.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师非常可靠。

meaning: n. 晚上 adj. 在晚上的 int. 晚上好（等于good evening）
example: We often take a walk in the evening.
exampleChinese: 我们经常在晚上散步。

meaning: v. 分配
example: The manager will allocate more time for practice.
exampleChinese: 经理会分配更多时间用于练习。

meaning: n. 发展
example: The city has seen rapid development.
exampleChinese: 这座城市经历了快速发展。

meaning: n. 段落 v. 将…分段
example: Please write a short paragraph about your school.
exampleChinese: 请写一段关于你学校的简短段落。

meaning: n. 末端 adj. 末端的
example: The train is waiting at the terminal.
exampleChinese: 火车正在终点站等候。

meaning: v. 符合，一致 vi. 通信
example: Her actions correspond to her words.
exampleChinese: 她的行动与她的话一致。

meaning: n. 战争，斗争 v. 打仗，作战
example: Many families suffered during the war.
exampleChinese: 许多家庭在战争期间受了苦。

meaning: adj. 欲睡的
example: I feel sleepy after lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭后觉得很困。

meaning: n. 惊奇，诧异 v. 使惊奇 adj. 令人惊讶的
example: Her visit was a big surprise to us.
exampleChinese: 她的来访让我们非常惊讶。

meaning: n. 雪人
example: We built a snowman in the yard.
exampleChinese: 我们在院子里堆了一个雪人。

meaning: v. 搜寻

exampleChinese: 警察在夜里搜寻这个地区。

meaning: n. 牙痛
example: I stayed home because I had a toothache.
exampleChinese: 因为牙痛，我待在家里。

meaning: n. 洗涤

exampleChinese: 这件衬衫需要快洗一下。

meaning: n. 教室
example: Our classroom is clean and bright.
exampleChinese: 我们的教室干净又明亮。

meaning: n. 侄子
example: My nephew is coming to visit this weekend.
exampleChinese: 我侄子这个周末要来拜访。

meaning: n. 盖 v. 脱帽致意
example: Put the cap back on the bottle.
exampleChinese: 把瓶盖盖回瓶子上。

meaning: n. 侵略

exampleChinese: 那个国家对邻国表现出侵略行为。

exampleChinese: 我晚饭后看了电视。

meaning: n. 笔记本，笔记簿
example: She wrote my phone number in her notebook.
exampleChinese: 她把我的电话号码写在她的笔记本里。

meaning: n. 奖金

exampleChinese: 她因为努力工作而得到了一笔奖金。

meaning: v. 滴

exampleChinese: 一滴眼泪开始从她眼中落下。

exampleChinese: 我们星期六去了马戏团。

meaning: v. 总计，合计 n. 数量 vi. 总计
example: The total amount was higher than we expected.
exampleChinese: 总额比我们预想的更高。

meaning: n. 跳 v. 弹跳

exampleChinese: 球开始在地板上弹跳。

meaning: adj. 已婚的，有配偶的 n. 已婚者 v. 结婚
example: My sister is married now.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐现在已经结婚了。

meaning: pron. 没有人 adj. 没有的 adv. 决不

exampleChinese: 这些答案没有一个是正确的。

meaning: v. 到达
example: They will arrive at the station soon.
exampleChinese: 他们很快就会到达车站。

meaning: adj. 稳定的 v. 稳固 adv. 稳定地
example: The chair is steady on the floor.
exampleChinese: 这把椅子在地上很稳。

meaning: n. 博物馆

exampleChinese: 我们星期六参观了博物馆。

meaning: adj. 快乐的
example: We had an enjoyable picnic in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里度过了一个愉快的野餐。

meaning: n. 头痛
example: I have a headache after reading too long.
exampleChinese: 看书太久后我头痛。

meaning: adj. 有希望的 n. 有希望成功的人
example: She felt hopeful after hearing the good news.
exampleChinese: 听到好消息后，她感到很有希望。

meaning: n. 事件，大事
example: The school event starts at nine.
exampleChinese: 学校活动九点开始。

meaning: v. 疼痛
example: My legs ache after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 走了很长一段路后，我的腿很疼。

meaning: adv. 沉重地
example: He walked heavily up the stairs.
exampleChinese: 他脚步沉重地走上楼梯。

meaning: n. 警告 adj. 警告的 v. 警告（warn的ing形式）
example: The sign gave us a warning about the ice.
exampleChinese: 这个标志提醒我们注意冰面。

meaning: n. 形式，形状 v. 构成，组成

exampleChinese: 傍晚时云在山丘上方形成。

meaning: adj. 坦率的

exampleChinese: 她对自己的想法很坦率。

meaning: adj. 饥饿的

exampleChinese: 篮球训练后我饿了。

meaning: n. 吨

exampleChinese: 这辆卡车可以运载一吨沙子。

meaning: adj. 害怕的

exampleChinese: 我害怕黑暗。

meaning: adj. 咸的

exampleChinese: 这汤尝起来很咸。

meaning: n. 需要，要求 v. 需要 vt. 需要modal

exampleChinese: 考试时我需要一支铅笔。

exampleChinese: 他每周六都打英式橄榄球。

meaning: n. 羔羊，小羊 v. 生小羊

exampleChinese: 小羊羔跟着它的妈妈。

meaning: n. 奶油，乳脂

exampleChinese: 她把奶油抹在蛋糕上。

meaning: adj. 喜欢的

exampleChinese: 我喜欢睡前读书。

meaning: v. 背诵
example: She can recite the poem from memory.
exampleChinese: 她能把这首诗背诵出来。

meaning: v. 违反

exampleChinese: 不要违反教室规则。

meaning: n. 领导者
example: Our class leader helped us plan the trip.
exampleChinese: 我们班的领导者帮我们安排了这次旅行。

meaning: n. 乐趣 adj. 供娱乐用的 vi. 开玩笑

meaning: adj. 徒劳的

exampleChinese: 他所有的努力都白费了。

meaning: n. 服务，服侍 adj. 服务性的 v. 维修，检修
example: The hotel offers friendly service to every guest.
exampleChinese: 这家酒店为每位客人提供友好的服务。

meaning: adj. 不锈的

exampleChinese: 这张桌子是用不锈钢做的。

meaning: n. 代理人，代理商 vt. 由…作中介 adj. 代理的

exampleChinese: 代理人为卖方签了文件。

meaning: n. 女仆 vt. 侍候 vi. 当女仆

exampleChinese: 女仆很快打扫了房间。

meaning: n. 照相机

exampleChinese: 他上周买了一台新照相机。

meaning: adv. 太

exampleChinese: 这个包对我来说太重了。

meaning: n. 九，九个 num. 九 adj. 九的

exampleChinese: 蛋糕上有九支蜡烛。

exampleChinese: 我们必须认真完成每一个步骤。

meaning: n. 怀疑

exampleChinese: 毫无疑问，他已经尽了全力。

meaning: v. 消化 n. 文摘

exampleChinese: 消化一顿大餐需要时间。

meaning: conj. 虽然 n. 一会儿 v. 消磨

exampleChinese: 我听了一会儿音乐。

meaning: adj. 漂亮的 adv. 相当地 n. 有吸引力的事物（尤指饰品）

exampleChinese: 你的新裙子很漂亮。

meaning: n. 工作室

exampleChinese: 她在一家小型音乐工作室工作。

meaning: n. 莫斯科（俄罗斯首都）

exampleChinese: 我叔叔去年冬天去了莫斯科。

meaning: adj. 令人不安的 v. 干扰

exampleChinese: 上课时噪音令人不安。

meaning: n. 同学

exampleChinese: 我的同学坐在我旁边。

meaning: adj. 成年的 n. 成年人

exampleChinese: 这张表格必须由成年人签字。

meaning: n. 女士 v. 错过
example: Be careful not to miss the target.
exampleChinese: 小心不要打偏目标。

meaning: n. 嗜好
example: My hobby is collecting stamps.
exampleChinese: 我的嗜好是收集邮票。

meaning: v. 不同意 vi. 意见不一致

exampleChinese: 我不同意你的答案。

meaning: adj. 有义务的 v. 束缚 n. 范围

exampleChinese: 她受学校规则约束。

meaning: v. 批准 vi. 赞成

exampleChinese: 经理今天会批准这个计划。

meaning: n. 便利

exampleChinese: 这家商店离这里很近，方便你。

meaning: pron. 谁

exampleChinese: 谁把这个包放在椅子上了？

meaning: n. 手臂 v. 武装起来
example: He raised his arm to ask a question.
exampleChinese: 他举起手臂来提问。

meaning: n. 商品

exampleChinese: 这些商品以低价出售。

meaning: n. 蝴蝶

exampleChinese: 一只黄色的蝴蝶落在花上。

exampleChinese: 我们不应该拿安全冒险。

meaning: adj. 非洲的 n. 非洲人

exampleChinese: 非洲象可以非常大。

meaning: n. 二十分之一 adj. 第二十的 num. 第二十

exampleChinese: 今天是她的二十岁生日。

meaning: n. 美洲（包括北美和南美洲）

exampleChinese: 美洲有很多不同的气候。

meaning: n. 瓶子 v. 控制

exampleChinese: 她把瓶子装满了水。

exampleChinese: 她喜欢读文学小说。

meaning: n. 自行车 v. 骑脚踏车

exampleChinese: 他每天骑自行车去上学。

meaning: n. 钱包

exampleChinese: 他把公交卡放在皮夹子里。

meaning: adj. 极好的

exampleChinese: 这些公司组成了联营来分摊成本。

exampleChinese: 法官对那个孩子表现出宽容。

meaning: n. 预览 vt. 预演

exampleChinese: 我们看了这部电影的预览。

meaning: n. 孵化 v. 孵

exampleChinese: 我们学校在公园附近。

meaning: n. 队，组 v. 一起工作

exampleChinese: 电影摄制组工作到深夜。

meaning: n. 预备

exampleChinese: 充分的预备能帮助你保持冷静。

exampleChinese: 明天是我弟弟的生日。

exampleChinese: 医生解释了堕胎的风险。

exampleChinese: 一只麻雀落在窗台上。

exampleChinese: 他们的友谊建立了牢固的联系。

exampleChinese: 他在三明治里加了芥末。

exampleChinese: 她用尺子画了一条直线。

meaning: n. 雨伞
example: She took an umbrella because it was raining.
exampleChinese: 因为下雨，她带了一把雨伞。

exampleChinese: 我们在酒馆见了朋友。

exampleChinese: 孩子们正在操场上跑步。

meaning: adj. 任意的

meaning: n. 转向 v. 旋转（turn的ing形式）

meaning: adv. 很

meaning: v. 醒来 n. 尾迹

exampleChinese: 上学日我通常六点醒来。

meaning: n. 同事
example: My workmate helped me finish the report.
exampleChinese: 我的同事帮我完成了报告。

meaning: n. 相簿

exampleChinese: 她把旧邮票收藏在一本粘贴簿里。

meaning: v. 取代，代替 vt. 取代， 代替

exampleChinese: 我不喜欢咖啡，我妹妹也不喜欢。

exampleChinese: 你真幸运，赶上了最后一班公交车。

meaning: n. 命令

exampleChinese: 队长下令移动。

meaning: adj. 可移动的 n. 运动物体

meaning: n. 门

exampleChinese: 她的名字在名单上的第一个。

meaning: n. 电视电话

exampleChinese: 我们用电视电话和奶奶通话。

meaning: adj. 空的 v. 使失去 n. 空车
example: The bottle is empty now.

meaning: n. 扶手椅 adj. 不切实际的

exampleChinese: 他坐在扶手椅上看书。

meaning: n. 自己，自我 adj. 同一的 vt. 使自花授精

exampleChinese: 每个学生都应该自己完成这项工作。

meaning: n. 自然

exampleChinese: 我们欣赏了大自然的美。

meaning: adj. 透明的

exampleChinese: 这个瓶子是用透明玻璃做的。

meaning: v. 使服从 vt. 提交
example: Please submit your homework before class.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前提交作业。

meaning: n. 农业

exampleChinese: 农业对这个县很重要。

meaning: adv. 恰好地
example: Please stand exactly here.
exampleChinese: 请就站在这里。

meaning: v. 取消
example: Press undo if you make a mistake.
exampleChinese: 如果你出错了，就按“取消”。

meaning: adj. 快乐的
example: She looked cheerful after the good news.
exampleChinese: 听到好消息后，她看起来很快乐。

meaning: v. 提醒
example: This note will remind me to call Dad.
exampleChinese: 这张便条会提醒我给爸爸打电话。

meaning: n. 灾难，灾祸

exampleChinese: 那场洪水是一场可怕的灾难。

meaning: adj. 日常的 n. 日报 adv. 日常地

meaning: v. 感谢 int. 干杯

exampleChinese: 大家干杯，谢谢你们的到来。

meaning: n. 时期 v. 给…调味
example: Spring is my favorite season.
exampleChinese: 春天是我最喜欢的季节。

meaning: v. 不喜欢 n. 嫌恶
example: I dislike rainy days in summer.
exampleChinese: 我不喜欢夏天的雨天。

meaning: n. 软件
example: This software helps me edit photos.
exampleChinese: 这个软件帮助我编辑照片。

meaning: n. 钢铁 v. 钢化 adj. 钢制的

exampleChinese: 这座桥是用钢铁建成的。

meaning: n. 产业

exampleChinese: 渔业支撑着这个小镇。

meaning: adv. 在那里 int. 你瞧 n. 那个地方
example: My school is over there by the park.
exampleChinese: 我的学校就在公园旁边那里。

meaning: n. 植物学

exampleChinese: 这学期我们在科学课上学习了植物学。

meaning: adv. 不幸地

exampleChinese: 不幸地，火车晚点了两个小时。

meaning: n. 增加 v. 获得
example: She worked hard to gain confidence before the speech.
exampleChinese: 她在演讲前努力获得自信。

meaning: adv. 一起 adj. 新潮的
example: We walked to school together.
exampleChinese: 我们一起走路去学校。

meaning: n. 访问
example: Her visit to the museum lasted two hours.
exampleChinese: 她参观博物馆的访问持续了两个小时。

meaning: v. 收集 n. 聚集
example: We gather leaves for the class project.
exampleChinese: 我们为班级项目收集树叶。

meaning: adv. 结束 prep. 越过 adj. 结束的
example: The game is over now.
exampleChinese: 比赛现在结束了。

meaning: n. 夫人
example: Excuse me, madam, you dropped your glove.
exampleChinese: 打扰了，夫人，您掉了手套。

meaning: n. 娱乐
example: The park is a good place for recreation.
exampleChinese: 这个公园是一个休闲娱乐的好地方。

meaning: v. 潜水 vi. 跳水
example: The kids dive into the pool after school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们放学后跳进游泳池。

meaning: n. 翼 v. 使飞
example: The bird hurt its wing on the fence.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟的翅膀在篱笆上弄伤了。

meaning: adj. 柠檬色的 n. 柠檬
example: She drank lemon water after the game.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛后喝了柠檬水。

meaning: v. 记录，记载 n. 档案，履历 adj. 创纪录的

exampleChinese: 请把会议时间记在你的笔记本上。

meaning: n. 海滩 v. 将…拖上岸

exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们沿着海滩散步。

meaning: n. 女主席

exampleChinese: 女主席用一段简短的讲话主持了会议。

meaning: n. 地下室

exampleChinese: 这些旧盒子存放在地下室里。

exampleChinese: 请把考试安排在下周五。

meaning: n. 木材 vi. 收集木材 vt. 植林于

exampleChinese: 这把椅子是木材做的。

example: My grandfather is deaf in one ear.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷一只耳朵聋了。

meaning: n. 建筑师

exampleChinese: 这位建筑师设计了一座现代化的校舍。

meaning: n. 胡桃 adj. 胡桃科植物的
example: She cracked a walnut with a small tool.
exampleChinese: 她用一个小工具敲开了一个胡桃。

meaning: adj. 爱尔兰的 n. 爱尔兰人
example: My Irish neighbor is very friendly.
exampleChinese: 我的爱尔兰邻居非常友好。

meaning: n. 方式
example: He spoke in a calm manner.
exampleChinese: 他说话的方式很平静。

meaning: v. 使成对 n. 双胞胎中一人 adj. 双胞胎的
example: Jane and her twin look very alike.
exampleChinese: 简和她的孪生姐妹看起来非常像。

meaning: adj. 强大的 adv. 很
example: The storm was powerful enough to shake the windows.
exampleChinese: 这场风暴强大到足以震动窗户。

meaning: adj. 频繁的 v. 常到，常去
example: We make frequent trips to the library.
exampleChinese: 我们经常去图书馆。

meaning: v. 控制 n. 水坝
example: They dam the river to create a small lake.
exampleChinese: 他们用坝拦住河水，形成一个小湖。

meaning: adj. 免费的 v. 使自由，解放 adv. 自由地
example: The museum is free on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆周日免费开放。

meaning: n. 九十 adj. 九十的
example: My grandfather is ninety years old.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷九十岁了。

meaning: n. 惊吓 v. 使惊恐
example: The loud noise gave her a fright.
exampleChinese: 那阵巨响把她吓了一跳。

meaning: n. 蛇 v. 迂回前进
example: A snake moved slowly through the grass.
exampleChinese: 一条蛇缓缓地穿过草地。

meaning: n. 版本
example: This app has a new version with better tools.
exampleChinese: 这个应用有一个带来更好工具的新版本。

meaning: adj. 残废的 v. 使…失去能力（disable的过去分词）
example: The school has ramps for disabled students.
exampleChinese: 学校为有残疾的学生设有坡道。

meaning: v. （坚定地向某地）前进 n. 行进，前进
example: The soldiers began to march at dawn.
exampleChinese: 士兵们在黎明时开始行军。

meaning: n. 真理
example: The truth is sometimes hard to hear.
exampleChinese: 真相有时很难让人接受。

meaning: n. 脚后跟 v. 倾侧
example: My new shoes hurt my heel.
exampleChinese: 我的新鞋磨脚后跟。

meaning: adj. 家具 v. 供应
example: The room was furnished with a bed and a desk.
exampleChinese: 这个房间配有一张床和一张书桌。

meaning: n. 巢，窝 v. 筑巢
example: A bird built a nest in the tree.
exampleChinese: 一只鸟在树上筑了巢。

meaning: v. 推断
example: From the evidence, we can conclude that he was there.
exampleChinese: 根据这些证据，我们可以推断他当时在那里。

meaning: n. 水池
example: She washed her face in the basin.
exampleChinese: 她在水池里洗了脸。

meaning: n. 梨树
example: The pear tree is full of fruit.
exampleChinese: 这棵梨树结满了果实。

meaning: adj. 尴尬的
example: It felt awkward to sit in silence.
exampleChinese: 安静地坐着让人觉得很尴尬。

meaning: n. 码表 vt. 用秒表测定时间
example: He used a stopwatch to time the race.
exampleChinese: 他用码表给比赛计时。

meaning: n. 羞耻，羞愧 v. 使丢脸
example: He felt shame after telling a lie.
exampleChinese: 撒谎后他感到羞愧。

meaning: n. 考查 v. 挖苦
example: The teacher gave us a short quiz.
exampleChinese: 老师给我们做了一次简短的考查。

meaning: n. 四十 adj. 四十的
example: There are forty students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有四十名学生。

meaning: adj. 笨拙的
example: I felt clumsy when I dropped the tray.
exampleChinese: 我把托盘弄掉了，感觉自己很笨拙。

meaning: n. 地面 v. 使接触地面 adj. 土地的
example: The ball rolled across the ground.
exampleChinese: 球从地面上滚了过去。

meaning: v. 显示
example: These numbers show the result clearly.
exampleChinese: 这些数字清楚地显示了结果。

meaning: v. 重建
example: They will rebuild the old bridge next year.
exampleChinese: 他们明年将重建那座旧桥。

meaning: n. 政治家
example: The politician spoke to the crowd after the vote.
exampleChinese: 那位政治家在投票后对人群发表了讲话。

meaning: n. 北，北方 adj. 北方的 adv. 在北方
example: Birds fly north in spring.
exampleChinese: 鸟在春天向北飞。

meaning: n. 鼠 v. 捕鼠
example: A rat ran across the old yard.
exampleChinese: 一只老鼠跑过了旧院子。

meaning: conj. 也不
example: He does not like coffee, nor does he drink tea.
exampleChinese: 他不喜欢咖啡，也不喝茶。

meaning: n. 队长，首领 v. 指挥
example: Our team captain gave a short speech before the game.
exampleChinese: 我们队长在比赛前做了简短的讲话。

meaning: adj. 谨慎的
example: Be cautious when you cross the busy street.
exampleChinese: 过繁忙的街道时要谨慎。

meaning: n. 客人，宾客 v. 款待 adj. 客人的
example: We made tea for our guest.
exampleChinese: 我们给客人泡了茶。

meaning: n. 头发 vt. 除去…的毛发 vi. 生长毛发
example: Her hair is very long.
exampleChinese: 她的头发很长。

meaning: n. 十二个 adj. 一打的
example: She bought a dozen eggs at the store.
exampleChinese: 她在商店买了一打鸡蛋。

meaning: v. 发给证明书 n. 证书
example: The school will certificate the course completion.
exampleChinese: 学校将发给这门课程的结业证书。

meaning: n. 恋爱 v. 爱，热爱 vt. 爱， 热爱
example: I love reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边读书。

meaning: n. 集装箱
example: The cargo was packed into a large container.
exampleChinese: 货物装进了一个大集装箱里。

meaning: n. 面粉 v. 撒粉于
example: She dusted the table with a little flour.
exampleChinese: 她在桌子上撒了一点面粉。

meaning: adj. 全部的 v. 总数达 n. 总数
example: The total cost was fifty dollars.
exampleChinese: 总费用是五十美元。

meaning: adj. 紫色的 n. 紫色 v. 变成紫色
example: She wore a purple dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条紫色的连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: v. 撤退
example: The soldiers had to withdraw before nightfall.
exampleChinese: 士兵们不得不在天黑前撤退。

meaning: v. 坚持
example: They insist on paying for the meal.
exampleChinese: 他们坚持为这顿饭付钱。

meaning: n. 玩笑，笑话 v. 开…的玩笑
example: That joke made the whole class laugh.
exampleChinese: 那个笑话把全班都逗笑了。

meaning: adj. 自治的
example: The village became an autonomous region.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄成了一个自治地区。

meaning: adj. 全部的 adv. 全然地 n. 全部
example: All the lights were on.
exampleChinese: 所有的灯都亮着。

meaning: n. 分数 v. 获得
example: Our team got a high score in the game.
exampleChinese: 我们队在比赛中得了高分。

meaning: v. 保护，防卫 vt. 保护
example: Trees protect the soil from heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 树木保护土壤不受大雨冲刷。

meaning: n. 笔迹 v. 亲手写（handwrite的ing形式）
example: I can read her handwriting clearly.
exampleChinese: 我能清楚地认出她的笔迹。

meaning: v. 唱歌 n. 演唱
example: The children sing after class.
exampleChinese: 孩子们课后唱歌。

meaning: v. 交付 n. 投球 vt. 投递
example: We will deliver the package this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我们今天下午会投递这个包裹。

meaning: n. 意义 adj. 意味深长的 v. 意味
example: I don't know the meaning of this word.
exampleChinese: 我不知道这个单词的意思。

meaning: n. 阳台
example: He stood on the balcony and watched the street below.
exampleChinese: 他站在阳台上看着下面的街道。

meaning: n. 冬眠
example: The bear disappeared into hibernation for the winter.
exampleChinese: 那只熊冬天进入了冬眠。

meaning: n. 瓶
example: She put fresh flowers in the vase.
exampleChinese: 她把鲜花插进花瓶里。

meaning: v. 类似，像 vt. 像， 类似
example: The twins resemble each other closely.
exampleChinese: 这对双胞胎长得非常像。

meaning: n. 驾驶室 v. 乘出租马车（或汽车）
example: The driver sat in the cab and checked the map.
exampleChinese: 司机坐在驾驶室里查看地图。

meaning: n. 决定，决心
example: It was a hard decision to leave home.
exampleChinese: 离开家是一个很难的决定。

meaning: n. 作文，作曲，作品
example: Our teacher asked us to write a composition about spring.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们写一篇关于春天的作文。

meaning: n. 帐篷 v. 用帐篷遮盖
example: We slept in a tent by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们睡在湖边的帐篷里。

meaning: n. 重绕 v. 倒回
example: Please rewind the video to the beginning.
exampleChinese: 请把视频倒回到开头。

meaning: n. 导体
example: Copper is a good conductor of electricity.
exampleChinese: 铜是良好的导体。

meaning: n. 版本
example: This is the latest edition of the book.
exampleChinese: 这是这本书的最新版本。

meaning: adj. 女性的 n. 女人
example: My sister is the only female in the club.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是俱乐部里唯一的女性。

meaning: n. 决心
example: Her determination helped her finish the race.
exampleChinese: 她的决心帮助她完成了比赛。

meaning: adj. 平等的 v. 等于 n. 对手
example: Both teams were equal in skill.
exampleChinese: 两支队伍的实力相当。

meaning: adj. 小的 adv. 完全不 n. 少许
example: The little dog ran to its owner.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗跑向它的主人。

meaning: v. 过冬
example: Some bears hibernate during the winter.
exampleChinese: 一些熊会在冬天冬眠。

meaning: n. 胡椒 v. 加胡椒粉于
example: She likes to pepper her soup with black pepper.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢在汤里加黑胡椒。

meaning: n. 手套 vt. 给…戴手套
example: I lost one glove on the bus.
exampleChinese: 我把一只手套落在公交车上了。

meaning: n. 日志，日记
example: She writes in her diary every evening.
exampleChinese: 她每天晚上都写日记。

meaning: n. 公民
example: Every citizen has the right to vote.
exampleChinese: 每个公民都有投票的权利。

meaning: v. 破坏
example: Strong winds can destroy old houses.
exampleChinese: 强风会破坏旧房子。

meaning: adv. 完全地 n. 整个
example: The project was altogether a success.
exampleChinese: 这个项目总体上是成功的。

meaning: n. 贡献
example: Her contribution made the team stronger.
exampleChinese: 她的贡献让团队更强大。

meaning: n. 装饰，装潢
example: We put up bright decoration for the party.
exampleChinese: 我们为派对挂上了鲜艳的装饰。

meaning: n. 观察
example: In my view, this plan is simple and useful.
exampleChinese: 在我看来，这个计划简单又实用。

meaning: n. 黑暗
example: The room was silent in the darkness.
exampleChinese: 房间在黑暗中一片寂静。

meaning: n. 条，棒 v. 禁止 prep. 除……外
example: This road is closed, bar emergency vehicles.
exampleChinese: 这条路封闭了，救护车等紧急车辆除外。

meaning: n. 餐后甜点
example: We had ice cream for dessert.
exampleChinese: 我们甜点吃了冰淇淋。

meaning: v. 摇摆
example: The dog's tail began to wag when it saw us.
exampleChinese: 狗看到我们时，尾巴开始摇摆。

meaning: n. 醋
example: Add a little vinegar to the salad.
exampleChinese: 在沙拉里加一点醋。

meaning: v. 实现 vt. 认识到
example: I did not realize the store was closed.
exampleChinese: 我没有认识到那家商店已经关门了。

meaning: n. 展览，显示
example: We visited an art exhibition on Saturday.
exampleChinese: 我们周六参观了一个艺术展览。

meaning: v. 播送，播放 n. 广播 adj. 广播的
example: The station will broadcast the news at noon.
exampleChinese: 电台将在中午播送新闻。

meaning: n. 鹦鹉 v. 机械地模仿
example: The green parrot can say a few words.
exampleChinese: 这只绿色的鹦鹉会说几句话。

meaning: n. 债务
example: He paid off his debt last month.
exampleChinese: 他上个月还清了债务。

meaning: n. 鸟笼
example: The birdcage stood near the window.
exampleChinese: 鸟笼放在窗边。

meaning: v. 惊吓 n. 恐慌 adj. （美）骇人的
example: The loud noise gave me a scare.
exampleChinese: 那巨大的噪音把我吓了一跳。

meaning: adv. 在哪里 pron. 哪里 conj. 在…的地方
example: Do you know where my glasses are?
exampleChinese: 你知道我的眼镜在哪里吗？

meaning: n. 救护车
example: An ambulance arrived in minutes.
exampleChinese: 救护车几分钟内就到了。

meaning: adj. 容易的 adv. 不费力地 vi. 停止划桨
example: This question is easy for me.
exampleChinese: 这道题对我来说很容易。

meaning: n. 家务事
example: We share the housework on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我们在周末分担家务。

meaning: adj. 混凝土的 v. 凝结 n. 具体物
example: They built the wall with concrete.
exampleChinese: 他们用混凝土砌了这堵墙。

meaning: v. 听（诊） n. 声音，语音 adj. 健全的，健康的
example: I heard a strange sound outside.
exampleChinese: 我听到外面有一种奇怪的声音。

meaning: n. 科学家
example: The scientist worked late in the lab.
exampleChinese: 那位科学家在实验室工作到很晚。

meaning: v. 建造，构造 n. 构想 vt. 构筑
example: They will construct a new bridge here.
exampleChinese: 他们将在这里建造一座新桥。

meaning: v. 使得 n. 生殖 vt. 得到
example: I need to get some milk after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我得去弄点牛奶。

meaning: adj. 高的 adv. 夸大地
example: That tall tree is over the roof.
exampleChinese: 那棵高大的树比屋顶还高。

meaning: n. 毕业证书，学位证书 vt. 发给…毕业文凭
example: She received her diploma at graduation.
exampleChinese: 她在毕业典礼上拿到了毕业证书。

meaning: prep. 在旁边
example: My bag is beside the chair.
exampleChinese: 我的包在椅子旁边。

meaning: n. 摄影师
example: The photographer took a picture of the class.
exampleChinese: 摄影师给全班拍了一张照片。

meaning: n. 锚 v. 抛锚 adj. 末棒的
example: The ship dropped anchor near the shore.
exampleChinese: 这艘船在岸边抛锚了。

meaning: n. 字母A abbr. 安（ampere）
example: Please write the letter a clearly.
exampleChinese: 请把字母 a 写清楚。

meaning: adj. 社会的，社交的 n. 联谊会
example: She is very social at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校里很善于交际。

meaning: adv. 容易地
example: She can easily solve this math problem.
exampleChinese: 她能轻松解出这道数学题。

meaning: n. 国际象棋
example: My grandfather taught me how to play chess.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷教我下国际象棋。

meaning: adj. 奇怪的 adv. 奇怪地
example: That noise sounds strange at night.
exampleChinese: 那种声音在夜里听起来很奇怪。

meaning: adj. 厌恶的 n. 病人 v. 使狗去咬
example: I feel sick after eating too much cake.
exampleChinese: 蛋糕吃太多后，我觉得不舒服。

meaning: adj. 俄国的 n. 俄语
example: She is learning Russian at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学学习俄语。

meaning: n. 内地 adj. 内陆的 adv. 在内地
example: We moved inland after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，我们向内地搬去。

meaning: n. 学院
example: My sister studies at an academy.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐在一所学院学习。

meaning: v. 发明
example: They want to invent a better bike lock.
exampleChinese: 他们想发明一种更好的自行车锁。

meaning: n. 财富
example: He spent his wealth helping poor families.
exampleChinese: 他把自己的财富用于帮助贫困家庭。

meaning: n. 小鸡 adj. 胆小的
example: The chick hid under its mother.
exampleChinese: 小鸡躲在妈妈下面。

meaning: n. 同伴 v. 陪伴
example: He was a good companion on the trip.
exampleChinese: 他是这次旅行中很好的同伴。

meaning: n. 口，嘴 v. 做作地说，装腔作势地说
example: The baby opened his mouth for a spoon of rice.
exampleChinese: 宝宝张开嘴吃一勺米饭。

meaning: v. 查找，找到 n. 发现 vt. 找到， 发现
example: I was happy to find my lost watch.
exampleChinese: 我很高兴找到了我丢失的手表。

meaning: n. 城镇，市镇
example: My grandparents live in a small town.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母住在一个小镇上。

meaning: n. 裤子
example: These trousers are too long for me.
exampleChinese: 这条裤子对我来说太长了。

meaning: n. 演出者
example: The performer bowed to the audience.
exampleChinese: 演出者向观众鞠躬。

meaning: n. （英）汽油
example: We filled the car with petrol.
exampleChinese: 我们给汽车加满了汽油。

meaning: adj. 固体的 n. 固体
example: Ice is a solid at low temperatures.
exampleChinese: 冰在低温下是固体。

meaning: adj. 不舒服的
example: These wet shoes feel uncomfortable.
exampleChinese: 这双湿鞋穿着很不舒服。

meaning: n. 损失，代价 vt. 向…收取费用 vi. 被花掉
example: The trip was worth the expense.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行值得付出的代价。

meaning: n. 滚木球戏 v. 打保龄球（bowl的现在分词）
example: He is bowling with his friends tonight.
exampleChinese: 他今晚要和朋友们去打保龄球。

meaning: n. 米
example: The room is six metre long.
exampleChinese: 这个房间有六米长。

meaning: n. 一段（文章）
example: Please read the passage aloud.
exampleChinese: 请大声朗读这段文章。

meaning: adv. 差不多，几乎
example: I am nearly ready to leave.
exampleChinese: 我差不多准备好要出发了。

meaning: v. 开始（调查） n. 学会，协会
example: The school will institute a new rule.
exampleChinese: 学校将开始实行一项新规定。

meaning: v. 画 n. 平局
example: My little sister likes to draw cats.
exampleChinese: 我妹妹喜欢画猫。

meaning: conj. 因为 prep. 如同 adv. 同样地
example: As it was raining, we stayed inside.
exampleChinese: 因为在下雨，我们待在室内。

meaning: n. 一餐，一顿饭 vi. 进餐
example: We eat our evening meal at six.
exampleChinese: 我们六点吃晚饭。

meaning: v. 打喷嚏 n. 喷嚏
example: I sneeze when I am near dust.
exampleChinese: 我一靠近灰尘就会打喷嚏。

meaning: n. 比特（二进位制信息单位） vt. 控制 adj. 很小的
example: My phone has only a small bit of free space left.
exampleChinese: 我的手机只剩下一点点可用空间。

meaning: conj. 但是 adv. 仅仅，只 prep. 除…以外
example: I wanted to go, but it started to rain.
exampleChinese: 我本来想去，但是开始下雨了。

meaning: n. 监视器 v. 监控
example: I use a large monitor for online classes.
exampleChinese: 我用一台大监视器上网课。

meaning: n. 激动 v. 使…颤动 vt. 使激动
example: She felt a thrill when the concert began.
exampleChinese: 音乐会开始时，她感到一阵兴奋。

meaning: n. 建议
example: Thank you for your advice.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你的建议。

meaning: v. 猛揍 n. 鲸
example: We saw a whale near the boat.
exampleChinese: 我们在船附近看到了一头鲸。

meaning: adj. 空虚的
example: There is a vacant seat by the window.
exampleChinese: 窗边有一个空座位。

meaning: adv. 在地下 adj. 地下的 n. 地下
example: The train goes underground after this station.
exampleChinese: 火车过了这一站后就在地下行驶。

meaning: v. 飞驰，飞快地移动 n. 火箭
example: Toy sales often rocket before the holiday season.
exampleChinese: 玩具销量常常在节日前迅速上升。

meaning: n. 试验 adj. 试验的
example: The new medicine is still in trial.
exampleChinese: 这种新药仍在试验中。

meaning: n. 上海（中国东部港市）
example: We visited Shanghai by train last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天我们坐火车去了上海。

meaning: n. 根 v. 生根
example: The plant began to root in the wet soil.
exampleChinese: 这种植物开始在湿润的土壤里生根。

meaning: adj. 全国范围的 adv. 在全国
example: The school held a nationwide reading contest.
exampleChinese: 这所学校举办了一场全国范围的阅读比赛。

meaning: n. 旅馆，饭店 vt. 使…在饭店下榻 vi. 进行旅馆式办公
example: Our hotel is near the train station.
exampleChinese: 我们的旅馆在火车站附近。

meaning: n. 专家 adj. 专家的
example: She asked a specialist for advice.
exampleChinese: 她向一位专家寻求建议。

meaning: adj. 任何的 pron. 任何 adv. 稍微
example: You can choose any seat in the room.
exampleChinese: 你可以选房间里的任何座位。

meaning: n. 三十年代 num. 三十 adj. 三十个的
example: There are thirty students in my class.
exampleChinese: 我们班有三十名学生。

meaning: adj. 吸引人的
example: The lake is attractive in every season.
exampleChinese: 这座湖一年四季都很吸引人。

meaning: n. 现象
example: The rainbow was a beautiful phenomenon after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨后出现的彩虹是一种美丽的现象。

meaning: n. 柜台 v. 反击，还击 adj. 相反的
example: Please pay at the counter.
exampleChinese: 请在柜台付款。

meaning: n. 围巾 v. 披嵌接
example: She wore a warm scarf in the snow.
exampleChinese: 她在下雪时围着一条暖和的围巾。

meaning: n. 尾巴 v. 尾随 adj. 从后面而来的
example: The dog wagged its tail.
exampleChinese: 那只狗摇了摇尾巴。

meaning: v. 发誓 n. 宣誓
example: I swear I told the truth.
exampleChinese: 我发誓我说的是实话。

meaning: adj. 高的 n. 高水平 adv. 高
example: The kite flew high in the sky.
exampleChinese: 风筝高高地飞在天空中。

meaning: n. 调整，调节
example: A small adjustment made the chair more comfortable.
exampleChinese: 一个小小的调整让这把椅子更舒服了。

meaning: v. 依靠 vi. 依赖， 依靠
example: You can rely on your team.
exampleChinese: 你可以依靠你的团队。

meaning: v. 应受
example: You deserve a rest after hard work.
exampleChinese: 你努力工作后应该休息一下。

meaning: n. 矿，矿藏 v. 开采，采掘 pron. 我的
example: That blue backpack is mine.
exampleChinese: 那个蓝色背包是我的。

meaning: abbr. 获得性免疫缺乏综合征
example: Doctors are working hard to fight AIDS.
exampleChinese: 医生们正在努力抗击 AIDS。

meaning: v. 处理 n. 交易
example: I can deal with this problem myself.
exampleChinese: 我可以自己处理这个问题。

meaning: n. 围裙 vt. 着围裙于
example: She tied an apron around her waist.
exampleChinese: 她在腰间系上一条围裙。

meaning: n. 数据（datum的复数）
example: The data show a clear increase in sales.
exampleChinese: 数据表明销售额明显增长。

meaning: n. 熟人
example: He is only an acquaintance, not a close friend.
exampleChinese: 他只是个熟人，不是亲密朋友。

meaning: adj. 伟大的，重大的 n. 大师
example: She is a great teacher.
exampleChinese: 她是一位伟大的老师。

meaning: n. 绷带 v. 用绷带包扎
example: The nurse put a bandage on his arm.
exampleChinese: 护士在他的手臂上缠了绷带。

meaning: adj. 口头的 n. 口试
example: The oral test starts at nine.
exampleChinese: 口试九点开始。

meaning: v. 投 n. 投掷
example: Do not throw paper on the ground.
exampleChinese: 不要把纸扔在地上。

meaning: n. 减少
example: The loss of sleep made him tired.
exampleChinese: 睡眠的减少让他感到疲倦。

meaning: n. 管理 adj. 规定的
example: The new regulation is for student safety.
exampleChinese: 这项新规定是为了学生安全。

meaning: v. 煮沸，沸腾 n. 沸腾，煮沸
example: Wait for the water to boil before adding the noodles.
exampleChinese: 等水沸腾后再下面条。

meaning: n. 希腊（欧洲南部国家）
example: My cousin lives in Greece.
exampleChinese: 我表亲住在希腊。

meaning: n. 图表 v. 绘制…的图表
example: The teacher showed a chart of the class's reading progress.
exampleChinese: 老师展示了一张全班阅读进步的图表。

meaning: n. 形状 v. 形成 vt. 使成形
example: The cloud has the shape of a heart.
exampleChinese: 那朵云有心形的形状。

meaning: n. 牛奶 v. 榨取
example: I drink a glass of milk every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上喝一杯牛奶。

meaning: n. 组 adj. 群的 v. 聚合
example: Our group meets after school every Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们小组每周五放学后见面。

meaning: v. 预防，防止
example: Warm clothes help prevent colds in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天穿暖和的衣服有助于预防感冒。

meaning: v. 交往 n. 同事，伙伴 adj. 副的
example: We often associate with our neighbors after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们常和邻居交往。

meaning: n. 插头 v. 塞住 vt. 把…塞住
example: Please plug the charger into the wall socket.
exampleChinese: 请把充电器插头插到墙上的插座里。

meaning: adj. 侦探的 n. 侦探
example: The detective asked the driver a few careful questions.
exampleChinese: 那个侦探仔细地问了司机几个问题。

meaning: n. 酒精
example: Alcohol can be dangerous if children drink it.
exampleChinese: 如果孩子喝了酒精，可能会很危险。

meaning: adj. 离岸的 adv. 向海面
example: The ship was working offshore all morning.
exampleChinese: 那艘船整个上午都在离岸海面上作业。

meaning: n. 雪茄
example: He lit a cigar after dinner.
exampleChinese: 他晚饭后点燃了一支雪茄。

meaning: n. 羽绒滑雪衫 v. 给…穿夹克
example: He zipped up his jacket before going outside.
exampleChinese: 他出门前拉上了夹克的拉链。

meaning: n. 红色，红颜料 adj. 红色的
example: She wore a red hat.
exampleChinese: 她戴了一顶红色的帽子。

meaning: n. 基督徒 adj. 基督教的
example: My Christian friend goes to church every Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我的基督徒朋友每周日都去教堂。

meaning: adj. 理论的
example: Her idea is still only theoretical.
exampleChinese: 她的想法目前仍然只是理论上的。

meaning: adv. 也 conj. 并且
example: She can sing and also play the piano.
exampleChinese: 她会唱歌，也会弹钢琴。

meaning: adj. 必要的 n. 必需品
example: A map is necessary for this hike.
exampleChinese: 这次徒步旅行有地图是必要的。

meaning: n. 金，黄金 adj. 金的，金制的
example: She wears a gold ring every day.
exampleChinese: 她每天都戴着一枚金戒指。

meaning: n. 同情
example: I felt sympathy for the injured boy.
exampleChinese: 我对那个受伤的男孩感到同情。

meaning: n. 番茄
example: She put a sliced tomato on the sandwich.
exampleChinese: 她在三明治里放了一片番茄。

meaning: v. 创造，创作 vt. 创造
example: Good teachers create a fun learning space.
exampleChinese: 好老师会创造一个有趣的学习环境。

meaning: adv. 总之
example: Anyhow, we need to finish the homework tonight.
exampleChinese: 总之，我们今晚得把作业做完。

meaning: v. 宣布，声明
example: The coach will declare the winner after the game.
exampleChinese: 教练会在比赛结束后宣布获胜者。

meaning: v. 推荐，介绍
example: Can you recommend a good book for me?
exampleChinese: 你能给我推荐一本好书吗？

meaning: n. 伦敦
example: My aunt lives in London now.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈现在住在伦敦。

meaning: adj. 沉溺于某种（尤其是不良的）嗜好的 v. 使…上瘾（addict的过去分词）
example: He became addicted to video games.
exampleChinese: 他沉溺于电子游戏。

meaning: n. 焦点 v. 使集中
example: The teacher helped me focus on the main idea.
exampleChinese: 老师帮我把注意力集中在中心思想上。

meaning: v. 忘记
example: Do not forget your homework at home.
exampleChinese: 不要把你的家庭作业忘在家里。

meaning: n. 航行，航海 adj. 航行的 v. 航行
example: Sailing was canceled because of the storm.
exampleChinese: 因为暴风雨，航海活动被取消了。

meaning: adj. 严肃的，严重的
example: This is a serious problem for our team.
exampleChinese: 这对我们团队来说是一个严重的问题。

meaning: n. 爸爸
example: My dad cooks breakfast every Sunday.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸每个星期天都做早餐。

meaning: v. 责骂
example: Don't scold the child for making a mistake.
exampleChinese: 不要因为孩子犯了错就责骂他。

meaning: n. 假期 v. 休假
example: We went to the beach during summer vacation.
exampleChinese: 我们暑假去了海边。

meaning: adj. 立即的
example: We need an immediate answer.
exampleChinese: 我们需要立即得到答复。

meaning: n. 时间表
example: Please check the timetable before you leave.
exampleChinese: 离开前请查看时间表。

meaning: v. 使再循环 n. 再生
example: We recycle paper and bottles at home.
exampleChinese: 我们在家回收利用纸张和瓶子。

meaning: v. 落下 n. 下降 adj. 秋天的
example: Leaves fall from the trees in autumn.
exampleChinese: 秋天树叶从树上落下。

meaning: v. 参加 n. 结合
example: Do you want to join the basketball team?
exampleChinese: 你想加入篮球队吗？

meaning: n. 粉红色 v. 扎，刺，戳 adj. 粉红的
example: She wore a pink sweater yesterday.
exampleChinese: 她昨天穿了一件粉红色的毛衣。

meaning: n. 欢乐，快乐 v. 欣喜
example: The children's laughter filled the room with joy.
exampleChinese: 孩子们的笑声让房间充满了欢乐。

meaning: adj. 泥泞的 v. 使污浊
example: The road was muddy after the rain.
exampleChinese: 下雨后这条路变得泥泞了。

meaning: v. 使休息，使轻松 n. 休息，静止 vi. 休息
example: You should rest after the long walk.
exampleChinese: 长时间步行后你应该休息。

meaning: n. 出口，通道 v. 退出
example: Take the exit on the right after the store.
exampleChinese: 过了商店后，走右边的出口。

meaning: n. 大标题 v. 给…加标题
example: The newspaper put a big headline on the story.
exampleChinese: 报纸给这篇报道加了一个醒目的大标题。

meaning: n. 流感
example: He stayed home because he had the flu.
exampleChinese: 他因为得了流感而待在家里。

meaning: n. 网络
example: Our school has a fast network for online classes.
exampleChinese: 我们学校有一个快速的网络，用于在线课程。

meaning: n. 车辆
example: That vehicle is too large for this road.
exampleChinese: 那辆车对这条路来说太大了。

meaning: v. 分派任务 n. 工作，作业
example: My first task is to clean the desk.
exampleChinese: 我的第一个任务是清理桌子。

meaning: adj. 难以忍受的
example: The noise from the next room was unbearable.
exampleChinese: 隔壁房间传来的噪音让人难以忍受。

meaning: adj. 迅速的，急促的 n. 急流
example: There was a rapid change in the weather.
exampleChinese: 天气发生了迅速的变化。

meaning: v. 集中 n. 浓缩，精选
example: Please concentrate on your homework for ten minutes.
exampleChinese: 请先全神贯注地做十分钟作业。

meaning: adj. 烦人的，无聊的
example: The long meeting was tiresome for everyone.
exampleChinese: 这场冗长的会议让每个人都觉得很烦人。

meaning: n. 市场 v. 在市场上出售
example: My mother bought fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈在市场买了水果。

meaning: v. 爆发，突发
example: The crowd began to burst into applause.
exampleChinese: 人群开始突然爆发出掌声。

meaning: n. 火山
example: The volcano sent smoke high into the sky.
exampleChinese: 这座火山把烟雾喷到了高空中。

meaning: n. 刷子 v. 刷
example: She uses a small brush to clean her shoes.
exampleChinese: 她用一把小刷子刷她的鞋。

meaning: n. 祖国
example: She promised to help build her motherland.
exampleChinese: 她承诺要帮助建设祖国。

meaning: n. 耳朵 vi. （美俚）听见
example: My left ear still hurts.
exampleChinese: 我的左耳还在疼。

meaning: n. 电路，回路 v. 环行
example: The circuit stopped working after the wire broke.
exampleChinese: 电线断了以后，这个电路就停止工作了。

meaning: prep. 按照（表示方式） adv. 进入 adj. 在里面的
example: Please write the answer in pencil.
exampleChinese: 请用铅笔写答案。

meaning: n. 大头针，别针，针 v. 钉住
example: Please pin the note to the board.
exampleChinese: 请把这张便条别在公告板上。

meaning: v. 属于，应归入 vi. 属， 附属
example: This blue bag does not belong to me.
exampleChinese: 这个蓝色的包不属于我。

meaning: n. 兄弟关系
example: The team spirit showed a strong brotherhood.
exampleChinese: 这个团队展现出很强的兄弟情谊。

meaning: n. 音乐
example: Soft music filled the room.
exampleChinese: 轻柔的音乐充满了房间。

meaning: n. 兄弟 int. 我的老兄！
example: My brother helps me with math homework.
exampleChinese: 我哥哥帮我做数学作业。

meaning: adj. 令人愉快的，舒适的
example: We had a pleasant walk by the river.
exampleChinese: 我们在河边愉快地散了步。

meaning: adj. 担心的
example: My mother was worried about my exam results.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈很担心我的考试成绩。

meaning: n. 鸡肉 adj. 鸡肉的
example: We had chicken and rice for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午饭吃了鸡肉和米饭。

meaning: v. 争论，辩论
example: Don't argue over small things.
exampleChinese: 不要为小事争吵。

meaning: v. 给…穿衣 n. 连衣裙
example: She wore a red dress to the party.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条红色连衣裙去参加聚会。

meaning: v. 说服 vt. 使确信
example: The teacher tried to convince me to join the club.
exampleChinese: 老师试图说服我参加这个社团。

meaning: n. 记者
example: The reporter asked many questions at the press conference.
exampleChinese: 记者在新闻发布会上问了很多问题。

meaning: n. 天空 v. 把…投向空中
example: The sky is clear after the rain.
exampleChinese: 雨后天空很晴朗。

meaning: adj. 自愿的 n. 志愿者
example: She did voluntary work at the animal shelter.
exampleChinese: 她在动物收容所做志愿工作。

meaning: n. 药 v. 使服麻醉药
example: The doctor gave him a drug for the pain.
exampleChinese: 医生给了他一种止痛药。

meaning: n. 询问
example: I made an enquiry about the train schedule.
exampleChinese: 我询问了火车时刻表。

meaning: v. 浸，泡，蘸 n. 下沉，下降
example: Dip the apple slices into the yogurt.
exampleChinese: 把苹果片蘸进酸奶里。

meaning: n. 烹饪
example: This restaurant serves Italian cuisine.
exampleChinese: 这家餐馆供应意大利菜。

meaning: n. 女儿 adj. 女儿的
example: His daughter started school this year.
exampleChinese: 他的女儿今年开始上学了。

meaning: n. 产品
example: This product is easy to use.
exampleChinese: 这个产品很容易使用。

meaning: n. 混合
example: The cake is a mixture of flour, eggs, and sugar.
exampleChinese: 这个蛋糕是面粉、鸡蛋和糖的混合物。

meaning: n. 名称，名字 v. 命名，任命 adj. 姓名的
example: Please name your new cat.
exampleChinese: 请给你的小猫起个名字。

meaning: n. 公升（米制容量单位）
example: The bottle holds one litre of water.
exampleChinese: 这个瓶子能装一公升水。

meaning: n. 台风
example: The typhoon damaged several boats near the coast.
exampleChinese: 台风损坏了海边的几艘船。

meaning: adj. 有帮助的
example: Your notes were very helpful before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前，你的笔记很有帮助。

meaning: v. 预报，预言
example: No one can predict the future exactly.
exampleChinese: 没有人能准确预言未来。

meaning: adj. 无常的
example: The weather is uncertain this week, so bring an umbrella.
exampleChinese: 这周天气无常，所以带把伞吧。

meaning: n. 面条
example: I ate a bowl of noodle soup for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了一碗汤面。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的
example: It was foolish to leave the door open at night.
exampleChinese: 晚上把门开着是愚蠢的。

meaning: v. 转动，使旋转 n. 转弯
