example: Turn the key slowly.
exampleChinese: 慢慢转动钥匙。

meaning: adj. 可怕的
example: The noise from the factory was horrible.
exampleChinese: 工厂传来的噪音很可怕。

meaning: n. 细胞 vi. 住在牢房或小室中
example: A cell can grow and divide inside the body.
exampleChinese: 细胞可以在人体内生长并分裂。

meaning: v. 解散
example: The teacher will dismiss the class at noon.
exampleChinese: 老师将在中午解散这堂课。

meaning: adj. 无聊的 n. 钻孔
example: The movie was so boring that I checked the time twice.
exampleChinese: 这部电影太无聊了，我看了两次时间。

meaning: adj. 明显的
example: The answer was obvious to everyone in the class.
exampleChinese: 这个答案对班里每个人来说都很明显。

meaning: adj. 下雨的
example: It was a cold and rainy morning.
exampleChinese: 那是一个寒冷又下雨的早晨。

meaning: n. 暴力
example: Violence should never be used to solve problems.
exampleChinese: 暴力绝不应用来解决问题。

meaning: adj. 古老的，年代久远的 n. 古董，古玩 v. 觅购古玩
example: We saw an antique clock in the museum.
exampleChinese: 我们在博物馆里看到了一只古董钟。

meaning: v. 尝试 n. 实验，试验
example: We did a simple experiment in science class.
exampleChinese: 我们在科学课上做了一个简单的实验。

meaning: n. 领域 v. 担任场外队员 adj. 扫描场
example: She wants to work in the medical field.
exampleChinese: 她想在医疗领域工作。

meaning: n. 手提包
example: She put her phone in her handbag.
exampleChinese: 她把手机放进了手提包里。

meaning: v. 包含
example: The price include tax and service.
exampleChinese: 这个价格包含税和服务费。

meaning: adj. 熟的，成熟的 vt. 搜查 vi. 进行搜查
example: The peaches are ripe and ready to eat.
exampleChinese: 这些桃子熟了，可以吃了。

meaning: n. 农民
example: The peasant worked hard in the field all day.
exampleChinese: 那个农民整天在田里辛勤劳作。

meaning: n. 竞技
example: She won three medals in athletics.
exampleChinese: 她在田径比赛中赢得了三枚奖牌。

meaning: v. 发现
example: We may discover a better way.
exampleChinese: 我们可能会发现一个更好的办法。

meaning: n. 泄漏 v. 使渗漏
example: There is a leak in the roof above the kitchen.
exampleChinese: 厨房上方的屋顶有个漏水处。

meaning: n. 降雨
example: The rainfall was heavy last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚的降雨很大。

meaning: n. 工具，用具 v. 使用工具
example: This tool helps me open the box safely.
exampleChinese: 这个工具帮助我安全地打开盒子。

meaning: v. 咬 abbr. 机内测试设备（Built-In Test Equipment）
example: The dog tried to bite my shoe.
exampleChinese: 那只狗试图咬我的鞋。

meaning: n. 赞扬 v. 赞美，歌颂
example: The teacher gave her praise for the neat homework.
exampleChinese: 老师因她作业整洁而表扬了她。

meaning: n. 活动
example: Drawing is my favorite classroom activity.
exampleChinese: 画画是我最喜欢的课堂活动。

meaning: v. 拿，扛 n. 运载
example: Can you carry this box for me?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我拿这个箱子吗？

meaning: v. 拿，取 n. 捕获量
example: Please take an umbrella with you.
exampleChinese: 请随身带一把伞。

meaning: n. 方面; 维 adj. 规格的
example: The teacher explained every dimension of the project.
exampleChinese: 老师解释了这个项目的每个方面。

meaning: n. 格式 v. 使格式化
example: Please save the file in PDF format.
exampleChinese: 请把文件保存为 PDF 格式。

meaning: v. 开始
example: Let's start the game after class.
exampleChinese: 我们下课后开始游戏吧。

meaning: n. 周，星期
example: I visit my grandparents every week.
exampleChinese: 我每周都去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: v. 拒绝 n. 被弃之物或人
example: The company decided to reject the poor design.
exampleChinese: 公司决定拒绝这个糟糕的设计。

meaning: adj. 人造的
example: The flowers looked artificial, not real.
exampleChinese: 这些花看起来是人造的，不是真的。

meaning: adj. 受欢迎的 n. 欢迎
example: Your ideas are always welcome here.
exampleChinese: 你的想法在这里总是受欢迎的。

meaning: n. 地球 v. 把（电线） 接地
example: The earth moves around the sun.
exampleChinese: 地球围绕太阳转。

meaning: n. 大街
example: Trees line the avenue in spring.
exampleChinese: 春天时，林荫道两旁种满了树。

meaning: n. 草莓
example: She put a strawberry on top of the cake.
exampleChinese: 她在蛋糕上放了一颗草莓。

meaning: v. 翻译
example: Can you translate this sentence into Chinese?
exampleChinese: 你能把这个句子翻译成中文吗？

meaning: n. 海
example: We saw the sun sink into the sea.
exampleChinese: 我们看见太阳落入海中。

meaning: n. 训练 v. 钻孔
example: The students practiced a fire drill at school.
exampleChinese: 学生们在学校进行了消防演练。

meaning: n. 页 v. 给…标页码
example: Please turn to page ten.
exampleChinese: 请翻到第十页。

meaning: n. 邮票 v. 铭记
example: I put a stamp on the envelope.
exampleChinese: 我在信封上贴了一张邮票。

meaning: adv. 一起 prep. 沿着
example: We walked along the river after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们沿着河边散步。

meaning: n. 风格 v. 设计
example: Her writing style is simple and clear.
exampleChinese: 她的写作风格简单而清晰。

meaning: n. 花园 v. 栽培花木
example: My grandparents garden in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我祖父母在春天栽培花木。

meaning: v. 反对
example: Many people oppose unfair rules.
exampleChinese: 许多人反对不公平的规则。

meaning: n. 国籍，国家
example: She wrote her nationality on the form.
exampleChinese: 她在表格上写了自己的国籍。

meaning: n. 顾问
example: The consultant gave us clear advice.
exampleChinese: 这位顾问给了我们清晰的建议。

meaning: n. 负载，负荷 v. 加载
example: The truck can carry a heavy load.
exampleChinese: 这辆卡车可以运载很重的货物。

meaning: n. 行为
example: His behavious in class was polite.
exampleChinese: 他在课堂上的行为很有礼貌。

meaning: n. 尼龙， 聚酰胺纤维
example: This bag is made of nylon.
exampleChinese: 这个包是尼龙做的。

meaning: n. 雕像 vt. 以雕像装饰
example: A statue stands in the middle of the park.
exampleChinese: 公园中央有一座雕像。

meaning: n. 证人 v. 目击
example: She was a witness to the accident.
exampleChinese: 她是那起事故的目击者。

meaning: adj. 困难的
example: This math problem is very difficult.
exampleChinese: 这道数学题很难。

meaning: adj. 道德的 n. 道德
example: It is a moral choice to tell the truth.
exampleChinese: 说实话是一个符合道德的选择。

meaning: n. 证据，证明 v. 证明
example: The police found evidence at the scene.
exampleChinese: 警方在现场找到了证据。

meaning: n. 倾泻 v. 灌，注
example: Please pour some milk into the cup.
exampleChinese: 请往杯子里倒一些牛奶。

meaning: v. 映射 n. 地图
example: I opened the map on my phone.
exampleChinese: 我在手机上打开了地图。

meaning: n. 宽松的上衣 vt. 使…宽松下垂 vi. 宽松下垂
example: She wore a blue blouse to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一件蓝色宽松上衣去上学。

meaning: n. 实验室
example: We did the test in the lab.
exampleChinese: 我们在实验室里做了这个测试。

meaning: n. 过道，门厅，走廊
example: Please wait in the hall near the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门边的门厅等一下。

meaning: v. 妥协 n. 妥协，和解
example: We had to compromise to finish the project.
exampleChinese: 为了完成项目，我们不得不妥协。

meaning: n. 动机
example: Her motivation comes from helping others.
exampleChinese: 她的动机来自帮助他人。

meaning: adj. 不适宜的 v. 使不合格
example: The old chair is unfit for use.
exampleChinese: 这把旧椅子不适合使用。

meaning: adj. 寂寞的 n. 孤独者
example: He felt lonely in the new city.
exampleChinese: 他在这座新城市里感到很寂寞。

meaning: adj. 有天赋的 v. 给予（gift的过去分词）
example: The gifted girl played the piano beautifully.
exampleChinese: 那个有天赋的女孩钢琴弹得很美。

meaning: adj. 体贴的
example: It was considerate of him to call first.
exampleChinese: 他先打电话来，真体贴。

meaning: n. 情节 v. 密谋
example: The plot of the movie was exciting.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的情节很精彩。

meaning: n. 胡萝卜
example: She put a carrot into the soup.
exampleChinese: 她把一根胡萝卜放进了汤里。

meaning: n. 无 adv. 毫不 pron. 无事
example: There is nothing in the box.
exampleChinese: 盒子里什么都没有。

meaning: n. 手册
example: Take this brochure for more information.
exampleChinese: 拿这本手册了解更多信息。

meaning: n. 重量，重力 v. 加重量于
example: The box was light in weight.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子重量很轻。

meaning: n. 希望
example: There is still hope for success.
exampleChinese: 成功仍然有希望。

meaning: n. （英）卡车
example: The lorry blocked the road for an hour.
exampleChinese: 那辆卡车把路堵了一个小时。

meaning: adv. 吵闹地
example: The children were talking noisily in the hall.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在大厅里吵闹地说着话。

meaning: n. 云 v. 使混乱
example: A dark cloud moved across the sky.
exampleChinese: 一朵乌云飘过天空。

meaning: n. 主题（等于theme）
example: Our teacher gave us a new topic to discuss.
exampleChinese: 老师给了我们一个新的话题来讨论。

meaning: v. 拥抱
example: She gave her little brother a hug.
exampleChinese: 她拥抱了她的小弟弟。

meaning: n. 大小 adj. 一定尺寸的 v. 依大小排列
example: What size shoes do you wear?
exampleChinese: 你穿多大码的鞋？

meaning: n. 阶梯 v. 成名
example: The fire truck had a long ladder.
exampleChinese: 消防车上有一架很长的梯子。

meaning: n. 民族 adj. 民间的
example: The folk song was easy to sing.
exampleChinese: 这首民歌很容易唱。

meaning: adj. 精力充沛的
example: She is always energetic in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上总是精力充沛。

meaning: v. 擦干 n. 拖把
example: Please mop the floor before dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭前把地板擦干。

meaning: n. 假定
example: It is only an assumption, not a fact.
exampleChinese: 这只是一个假定，不是事实。

meaning: n. 肉 v. 喂肉给…
example: The chef will flesh the fish carefully.
exampleChinese: 厨师会小心地给鱼肉去骨取肉。

meaning: n. 马拉松赛跑 adj. 马拉松式的 vi. 参加马拉松赛跑
example: She is training for a marathon this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年正在为马拉松长跑训练。

meaning: v. 移动，迁移 n. 移动 vt. 移动， 拿走
example: Please remove your shoes at the door.
exampleChinese: 请在门口把鞋子脱掉。

meaning: n. 太阳 v. 使晒
example: The sun was warm on my face.
exampleChinese: 太阳照在我脸上，暖洋洋的。

meaning: v. 期望
example: I expect good news from her soon.
exampleChinese: 我期待很快收到她的好消息。

meaning: n. 病房 v. 避开 vt. 保卫
example: The patient is resting in Ward 3.
exampleChinese: 病人正在3号病房休息。

meaning: adj. 舒适的 n. 盖被
example: This chair is soft and comfortable.
exampleChinese: 这把椅子柔软又舒适。

meaning: n. 昨天
example: Yesterday was rainy and cold.
exampleChinese: 昨天又下雨又冷。

meaning: n. 感觉，触觉 adj. 有感觉的 v. 感觉
example: I had a strange feeling before the test.
exampleChinese: 考试前我有一种奇怪的感觉。

meaning: n. 意大利式细面条
example: We ate spaghetti for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午饭吃了意大利式细面条。

meaning: pron. 他的
example: That blue bicycle is his.
exampleChinese: 那辆蓝色自行车是他的。

meaning: n. 媒体
example: The media reported the news quickly.
exampleChinese: 媒体很快报道了这条新闻。

meaning: n. 主任，主管
example: The director checked every report.
exampleChinese: 主管检查了每一份报告。

meaning: v. 生产 n. 农产品
example: This farm can produce fresh milk every day.
exampleChinese: 这个农场每天都能生产新鲜牛奶。

meaning: n. 腰，腰部
example: He tied a belt around his waist.
exampleChinese: 他在腰上系了一条皮带。

meaning: n. 门房
example: The porter carried our bags to the room.
exampleChinese: 门房把我们的行李送到了房间。

meaning: n. 螺母，螺帽 v. 采坚果
example: I tightened the nut with a wrench.
exampleChinese: 我用扳手拧紧了螺帽。

meaning: adv. 向西 adj. 向西的
example: The truck moved westwards after sunrise.
exampleChinese: 卡车在日出后向西行驶。

meaning: n. 犯罪
example: He was charged with a serious offence.
exampleChinese: 他被指控犯了一项严重罪行。

meaning: n. 词汇
example: Reading daily can improve your vocabulary.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读能提高你的词汇量。

meaning: v. 目的在于 n. 目的
example: Aim at the basket before you throw the ball.
exampleChinese: 投球前先瞄准篮筐。

meaning: n. 接待员
example: The receptionist gave me a room key.
exampleChinese: 接待员给了我一把房间钥匙。

meaning: n. 蔬菜水果商
example: The greengrocer sells fresh apples and carrots.
exampleChinese: 这位蔬菜水果商出售新鲜的苹果和胡萝卜。

meaning: n. 箱，盒子 v. 拳击
example: She put the old photos in a box.
exampleChinese: 她把旧照片放进一个盒子里。

meaning: n. 颌 v. 教训
example: He clenched his jaw when he was angry.
exampleChinese: 他生气时咬紧了下颌。

meaning: n. 电影
example: We watched an old film at the cinema.
exampleChinese: 我们在电影院看了一部老电影。

meaning: v. 除草 n. 杂草，野草
example: Weed the garden before the flowers grow.
exampleChinese: 在花长大前先给花园除草。

meaning: adj. 愉快的 n. 甜樱桃
example: The children felt merry at the party.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在聚会上很愉快。

meaning: n. 事故
example: There was a small accident on the road.
exampleChinese: 路上发生了一起小事故。

meaning: adj. 适当的
example: These shoes are suitable for a long walk.
exampleChinese: 这双鞋适合长时间步行。

meaning: n. 飞行员 adj. 试点的 v. 驾驶
example: The pilot landed the plane safely.
exampleChinese: 飞行员安全地让飞机着陆了。

meaning: n. 友谊
example: Their friendship grew stronger over time.
exampleChinese: 他们的友谊随着时间变得更加深厚。

meaning: n. 地板，地面 v. 铺地板
example: The kids sat on the floor to play cards.
exampleChinese: 孩子们坐在地板上打牌。

meaning: n. 巫术 adj. 不可思议的
example: The trick looked like magic to me.
exampleChinese: 那个戏法在我看来像魔术一样。

meaning: v. 打开
example: She will unfold the map on the table.
exampleChinese: 她会在桌上把地图打开。

meaning: n. 十月
example: The trees turn red in October.
exampleChinese: 树木在十月变红。

meaning: n. 音乐家
example: The musician played the piano beautifully.
exampleChinese: 那位音乐家把钢琴弹得很优美。

meaning: n. 休息室 v. 闲逛
example: We waited in the airport lounge.
exampleChinese: 我们在机场休息室等候。

meaning: adj. 狭窄的 n. 海峡
example: A strait path led up the hill.
exampleChinese: 一条狭窄的小路通向山上。

meaning: n. （一套）家具
example: The suite in our guest room is old but comfortable.
exampleChinese: 我们客房里的这套家具又旧又舒适。

meaning: adj. 活泼的
example: The lively girl told us a funny story.
exampleChinese: 那个活泼的女孩给我们讲了一个有趣的故事。

meaning: n. 香烟
example: He threw the cigarette into the bin.
exampleChinese: 他把香烟扔进了垃圾桶。

meaning: n. 家乡
example: My hometown is famous for its old bridges.
exampleChinese: 我的家乡因古老的桥而闻名。

meaning: adv. 立刻
example: The bus will leave shortly.
exampleChinese: 公交车很快就会出发。

meaning: n. 箭，箭头 vt. 以箭头指示
example: He drew an arrow on the sign.
exampleChinese: 他在标志上画了一个箭头。

meaning: n. 五月
example: My birthday is in May this year.
exampleChinese: 我今年的生日在五月。

meaning: v. 使依附 vt. 系上
example: Please attach the label to the box.
exampleChinese: 请把标签系在盒子上。

meaning: n. 两星期
example: We will visit my aunt in a fortnight.
exampleChinese: 我们两星期后会去看望我姑妈。

meaning: v. 揭露，揭发 vt. 暴露
example: The report will expose the truth.
exampleChinese: 这份报告将揭露真相。

meaning: v. 污染
example: Factories can pollute the river.
exampleChinese: 工厂会污染河流。

meaning: v. 感谢 int. 谢谢
example: I want to thank you for your help.
exampleChinese: 我想感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 滑雪橇 v. 滑雪 adj. 滑雪（用）的
example: They went to ski in the mountains.
exampleChinese: 他们去山里滑雪了。

meaning: n. 阳光
example: Warm sunshine filled the garden.
exampleChinese: 温暖的阳光洒满了花园。

meaning: v. 设计 n. 工程
example: This lamp can project a bright circle on the wall.
exampleChinese: 这盏灯能把一个明亮的圆投射到墙上。

meaning: n. 西南方 adj. 西南的 adv. 往西南
example: The village lies to the southwest of the city.
exampleChinese: 这个村庄位于城市的西南方。

meaning: adj. 非法的 n. 非法移民
example: It is illegal to park here.
exampleChinese: 在这里停车是违法的。

meaning: n. 统计
example: The teacher checked the statistics carefully.
exampleChinese: 老师仔细检查了这些统计数据。

meaning: n. 水平 adj. 水平的 v. 瞄准
example: The water level rose after the rain.
exampleChinese: 下雨后水位上升了。

meaning: adj. 舒适的 n. 保温罩
example: The small room felt cosy in winter.
exampleChinese: 这间小房间在冬天里很舒适。

meaning: adj. 紧的 adv. 紧紧地
example: Keep the rope tight.
exampleChinese: 把绳子拉紧。

meaning: n. 阴影 v. 遮蔽 adj. 影子内阁的
example: The tree cast a long shadow.
exampleChinese: 那棵树投下了长长的影子。

meaning: n. 大陆 adj. 自制的
example: Asia is the largest continent.
exampleChinese: 亚洲是最大的大陆。

meaning: n. 细菌
example: Scientists studied the bacterium under a microscope.
exampleChinese: 科学家在显微镜下研究了这种细菌。

meaning: adj. 迂回的，绕道的 n. 迂回路线
example: We took a roundabout way to avoid the traffic.
exampleChinese: 我们绕了一条迂回的路来避开交通拥堵。

meaning: n. 连接
example: There is a strong connection between exercise and health.
exampleChinese: 锻炼和健康之间有紧密的联系。

meaning: n. 底部 adj. 底部的 v. 装底
example: The coins are at the bottom of the bag.
exampleChinese: 硬币在包的底部。

meaning: n. 打印机
example: The printer is out of paper again.
exampleChinese: 打印机又没纸了。

meaning: adv. 在飞机上 prep. 在…上
example: Please stay aboard until the plane stops.
exampleChinese: 请一直待在飞机上，直到飞机停下。

meaning: n. 书写 v. 书写（write的ing形式）
example: Her writing is clear and easy to read.
exampleChinese: 她的书写清晰，容易辨认。

meaning: v. 使出血
example: He cut his finger, but it did not bleed much.
exampleChinese: 他割破了手指，但没流多少血。

meaning: v. 侦察 n. 间谍
example: The spy hid the camera in a bag.
exampleChinese: 间谍把相机藏在包里。

meaning: n. 军人 v. 当兵
example: The soldier wrote a letter to his family.
exampleChinese: 那名军人给家人写了一封信。

meaning: n. 温度
example: The temperature dropped last night.
exampleChinese: 昨晚气温下降了。

meaning: adj. 两个的 adv. 并 pron. 双方都
example: Both answers are correct.
exampleChinese: 两个答案都对。

meaning: adj. 新鲜的 n. 开始 adv. 刚刚，才
example: The bread is still fresh this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上这面包还是新鲜的。

meaning: n. 王国
example: The old kingdom once ruled this land.
exampleChinese: 这个古老的王国曾统治这片土地。

meaning: n. 划船 adj. 划船的 v. 划船（boat的ing形式）
example: We went boating on the lake after school.
exampleChinese: 放学后我们去湖上划船了。

meaning: n. 倾向，趋势
example: She has a tendency to arrive early.
exampleChinese: 她有早到的倾向。

meaning: n. 音乐会 v. 使协调 adj. 音乐会用的
example: We went to a concert in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们去公园听了一场音乐会。

meaning: v. 消耗，消费 vt. 消耗
example: These machines consume a lot of electricity.
exampleChinese: 这些机器消耗很多电。

meaning: num. 六，六个
example: There are six apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有六个苹果。

meaning: v. 更新
example: Please refresh the page to see the latest news.
exampleChinese: 请刷新页面查看最新消息。

meaning: adj. 宽的，辽阔的 n. 宽阔部分 adv. 宽阔地
example: The road is broad enough for two cars.
exampleChinese: 这条路宽到足以容纳两辆车并行。

meaning: v. 露营 vi. 野营
example: We plan to camp by the lake tonight.
exampleChinese: 我们打算今晚在湖边露营。

meaning: n. 大风，狂风
example: A strong gale shook the trees all night.
exampleChinese: 一整夜的狂风摇晃着树木。

meaning: v. 借
example: Can I borrow your pencil for a minute?
exampleChinese: 我能借用一下你的铅笔吗？

meaning: v. 要求 n. 需求
example: Students demand a quiet place to study.
exampleChinese: 学生们要求有一个安静的学习场所。

meaning: v. 敲
example: Please knock before you enter the room.
exampleChinese: 进房间前请先敲门。

meaning: adj. 酸的 v. 发酵 n. 酸味
example: The lemon tastes very sour.
exampleChinese: 这个柠檬吃起来很酸。

meaning: n. 爷爷
example: My grandpa tells the best stories.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷最会讲故事。

meaning: n. 拉链 v. 拉开或拉上
example: Pull the zip up before you go outside.
exampleChinese: 出门前把拉链拉上。

meaning: n. 排 adj. 讨厌的 v. 排列
example: The teacher asked us to rank the books by size.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们按大小排列这些书。

meaning: v. 屠杀 n. 屠夫 vt. 屠宰
example: The butcher cut the meat into small pieces.
exampleChinese: 屠夫把肉切成了小块。

meaning: adj. 准备好 n. 现款 adv. 迅速地
example: I am ready for the math test.
exampleChinese: 我准备好参加数学考试了。

meaning: n. 猪 v. 生小猪
example: The pig is sleeping under the tree.
exampleChinese: 那头猪正在树下睡觉。

meaning: v. 诱捕 n. 陷阱 vt. 使陷入困境
example: The net was set to trap the rabbit.
exampleChinese: 网被设好，用来捕捉兔子。

meaning: n. 癌症
example: His grandmother is receiving cancer treatment.
exampleChinese: 他的祖母正在接受癌症治疗。

meaning: n. 恶习 prep. 代替 vt. 钳住
example: A bad vice can hurt a person's health.
exampleChinese: 坏习惯会损害一个人的健康。

meaning: n. 伤害
example: The fall caused no harm.
exampleChinese: 这次摔倒没有造成伤害。

meaning: adj. 稀有的 adv. 非常 vi. 用后腿站起
example: Snow is rare in this city.
exampleChinese: 这个城市很少下雪。

meaning: n. 啤酒厂
example: The brewery makes beer every day.
exampleChinese: 这家啤酒厂每天都酿造啤酒。

meaning: v. 完成 n. 结束
example: I need to finish this book today.
exampleChinese: 我今天需要读完这本书。

meaning: n. 公鸡 v. 使竖起
example: The cock crowed at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 公鸡在日出时打鸣。

meaning: adv. 相当地
example: She was fairly tired after the trip.
exampleChinese: 旅行后她相当累。

meaning: n. 祖父母（grandparent的复数）
example: My grandparents live near us.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母住在我们附近。

meaning: adj. 立即的 n. 瞬间
example: We got an instant reply.
exampleChinese: 我们立刻得到了回复。

meaning: v. 看见
example: I can see the mountains from my window.
exampleChinese: 我从窗户能看见群山。

meaning: n. 后面 v. 支持 adv. 以前
example: My grandparents moved back to the village.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母以前搬回了村子。

meaning: n. 区域，地区
example: This area is quiet at night.
exampleChinese: 这个地区在晚上很安静。

meaning: n. 牺牲
example: He made a sacrifice for his team.
exampleChinese: 他为了团队做出了牺牲。

meaning: n. 非洲
example: Africa is home to many wild animals.
exampleChinese: 非洲是许多野生动物的家园。

meaning: n. 碰撞
example: The collision damaged both cars.
exampleChinese: 碰撞损坏了两辆车。

meaning: n. 祖国
example: He hopes to return to his homeland one day.
exampleChinese: 他希望有一天回到祖国。

meaning: adj. 工艺的，科技的
example: This machine needs technical support.
exampleChinese: 这台机器需要技术支持。

meaning: v. 签署 n. 墨水，墨汁
example: There is blue ink on my finger.
exampleChinese: 我的手指上有蓝色墨水。

meaning: n. 信仰
example: Her faith helped her through hard times.
exampleChinese: 她的信仰帮助她度过了艰难时期。

meaning: adv. 从未
example: I have never seen snow in July.
exampleChinese: 我从未在七月见过雪。

meaning: v. 吵架 vi. 争吵
example: The children quarrel over small things.
exampleChinese: 孩子们会为小事争吵。

meaning: adj. 专心的 v. 未分开（undivide的过去式和过去分词）
example: He gave the teacher his undivided attention.
exampleChinese: 他全神贯注地听老师讲课。

meaning: n. 分离，分开
example: The separation was hard for both of them.
exampleChinese: 这次分离对他们两人来说都很难。

meaning: v. 表明
example: The results Indicate a clear improvement.
exampleChinese: 结果表明有明显的改善。

meaning: n. 意志 v. 决心要 aux. 将
example: I will finish my homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 我会在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: v. 表达 adj. 明确的 n. 快车，快递，专使
example: It is hard to express my feelings in English.
exampleChinese: 用英语表达我的感受很难。

meaning: adj. 快速的，迅速的 adv. 迅速地 v. 禁食
example: This train is very fast.
exampleChinese: 这列火车非常快。

meaning: adj. 公开的 v. 开始 n. 公开
example: The museum is open to the public on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 这家博物馆在星期天对公众开放。

meaning: n. 口袋 v. 隐藏 adj. 小型的，袖珍的
example: She put the key in her pocket.
exampleChinese: 她把钥匙放进了口袋里。

meaning: n. 灵魂 adj. 美国黑人文化的
example: Music can touch the soul.
exampleChinese: 音乐可以触动灵魂。

meaning: v. 分支 n. 树枝，分枝
example: The road branch into two paths.
exampleChinese: 这条路分成了两条小路。

meaning: v. 给小费 n. 小费 vt. 告诫，提示
example: Please tip the waiter after dinner.
exampleChinese: 请在晚饭后给服务员小费。

meaning: n. 羊肉
example: We ate mutton for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们午餐吃了羊肉。

meaning: v. 使兴旺 n. 繁荣
example: A small online shop can boom after a few good reviews.
exampleChinese: 一家小网店在几条好评后就可能兴旺起来。

meaning: n. 杂志
example: She read a travel magazine on the train.
exampleChinese: 她在火车上看了一本旅行杂志。

meaning: n. 医院
example: She works at the city hospital.
exampleChinese: 她在市医院工作。

meaning: n. 短袜 v. 重击 adv. 正着地
example: The boxer tried to sock his opponent in the arm.
exampleChinese: 那名拳击手试图重击对手的手臂。

meaning: n. 物理学
example: She studies physics at school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校学习物理学。

meaning: v. 乘出租车 n. 出租汽车
example: We took a taxi to the train station.
exampleChinese: 我们乘出租车去了火车站。

meaning: adj. 面部的，表面的 n. 美容，美颜
example: She booked a facial at the spa before the wedding.
exampleChinese: 她在婚礼前在水疗中心预约了美容。

meaning: adj. 著名的
example: This writer is famous around the world.
exampleChinese: 这位作家在全世界都很著名。

meaning: n. 中国 adj. 中国的
example: China is a large country in Asia.
exampleChinese: 中国是亚洲的一个大国。

meaning: n. 考试
example: I have a math exam tomorrow morning.
exampleChinese: 我明天早上有一场数学考试。

meaning: n. 旅客
example: Every passenger showed a ticket.
exampleChinese: 每位旅客都出示了车票。

meaning: n. 海鸥
example: A seagull landed on the dock near our boat.
exampleChinese: 一只海鸥落在了我们船附近的码头上。

meaning: conj. 考虑到 adv. 什么时候，何时 pron. 那时
example: Tell me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家时告诉我。

meaning: n. 诡计 v. 欺骗 adj. 特技的
example: The boy played a trick on his sister and hid her pen.
exampleChinese: 那个男孩对妹妹耍了个诡计，把她的笔藏了起来。

meaning: v. 使固定 n. 困境
example: Can you fix this broken chair?
exampleChinese: 你能修好这把坏椅子吗？

meaning: prep. 在…之上 adj. 映射的
example: He stepped onto the stage and began to sing.
exampleChinese: 他走到舞台上，开始唱歌。

meaning: v. 犯罪，做错事
example: They can commit a crime if they ignore the law.
exampleChinese: 如果他们无视法律，就可能犯罪。

meaning: adj. 椭圆的 n. 椭圆形 adv. 椭圆
example: The teacher drew an oval on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师在黑板上画了一个椭圆形。

meaning: n. 建筑
example: That building is very old.
exampleChinese: 那座建筑很古老。

meaning: n. 演变
example: The evolution of cars has made travel safer.
exampleChinese: 汽车的演变让出行更安全了。

meaning: adj. 令人厌恶的
example: The smell from the trash was disgusting.
exampleChinese: 垃圾发出的气味令人厌恶。

meaning: adj. 未婚的 v. 离婚（unmarry的过去分词）
example: My aunt is unmarried and lives alone.
exampleChinese: 我姑妈未婚，独自生活。

meaning: n. 椅子 v. 担任（会议的）主席
example: There is a chair by the window.
exampleChinese: 窗边有一把椅子。

meaning: adj. 合理的，公道的
example: It is reasonable to ask for help when you are stuck.
exampleChinese: 当你遇到困难时，寻求帮助是合理的。

meaning: v. 隐藏 n. 躲藏
example: Please hide the gift under the bed.
exampleChinese: 请把礼物藏在床底下。

meaning: int. 再见 n. 轮空 adj. 次要的
example: I waved and said bye to my teacher.
exampleChinese: 我挥手向老师说再见。

meaning: v. 削尖
example: Please sharpen this pencil before class.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前把这支铅笔削尖。

meaning: adj. 奇异的 n. 古怪的人
example: The story has a fantastic creature in it.
exampleChinese: 这个故事里有一个奇异的生物。

meaning: n. 橡皮
example: May I borrow your eraser?
exampleChinese: 我可以借一下你的橡皮吗？

meaning: n. 化学制品 adj. 化学的
example: This chemical is used to clean metal.
exampleChinese: 这种化学制品用于清洁金属。

meaning: n. （政府的）部门
example: The ministry announced a new education plan.
exampleChinese: 该部门公布了一项新的教育计划。

meaning: n. 赞助者 v. 赞助
example: A local business agreed to sponsor the school team.
exampleChinese: 一家当地企业同意赞助校队。

meaning: n. 鼻子 v. 嗅
example: My nose gets cold in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天我的鼻子会变冷。

meaning: n. 储备，储存 v. 储备 vt. 保留， 储备
example: We should reserve some water for the hike.
exampleChinese: 我们应该为徒步旅行留些水作储备。

meaning: prep. 在…的时候
example: No one talked during the movie.
exampleChinese: 看电影的时候没有人说话。

meaning: n. （美）玉米 v. 腌
example: The farmer planted corn in the field.
exampleChinese: 农民在田里种了玉米。

meaning: adj. 不公平的
example: It is unfair to punish her for a mistake she did not make.
exampleChinese: 因为她没犯的错误惩罚她是不公平的。

meaning: v. 教育
example: Good teachers educate students with patience.
exampleChinese: 好老师耐心地教育学生。

meaning: v. 安排
example: They arrange the desks in a circle for group work.
exampleChinese: 他们把桌子摆成一个圆圈方便小组活动。

meaning: v. 上升
example: The sun will rise at about six tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天太阳大约六点升起。

meaning: n. 月，一个月的时间
example: I will visit my grandparents next month.
exampleChinese: 我下个月会去看望我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 能力，胜任
example: Her competence made her the best choice for the job.
exampleChinese: 她的能力让她成为这份工作的最佳人选。

meaning: n. 中午
example: We usually eat lunch at noon.
exampleChinese: 我们通常在中午吃午饭。

meaning: n. 温室
example: The tomatoes grow well in the glasshouse.
exampleChinese: 这些番茄在温室里长得很好。

meaning: n. 水 v. 使湿
example: Please water the plants every two days.
exampleChinese: 请每两天给这些植物浇一次水。

meaning: n. （打字机等的）键 v. 键入 adj. 关键的
example: Trust is key to good teamwork.
exampleChinese: 信任是良好团队合作的关键。

meaning: n. 肺
example: My lung hurt when I coughed.
exampleChinese: 我咳嗽时肺部疼痛。

meaning: num. 六十
example: My grandfather is sixty this year.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷今年六十岁。

meaning: n. 一月
example: School starts again in January.
exampleChinese: 学校在一月又开学了。

meaning: adj. 油炸的，油煎的 v. 油炸（fry的过去分词）
example: She ate fried chicken for dinner.
exampleChinese: 她晚餐吃了炸鸡。

meaning: n. 公斤
example: This box weighs two kilogram.
exampleChinese: 这个盒子重两公斤。

meaning: adj. 顺利的 v. 使光滑 n. 平滑部分
example: The road was smooth after the repair.
exampleChinese: 修好以后，这条路变得很平整。

meaning: n. 评论者
example: The reviewer wrote a fair report.
exampleChinese: 这位评论者写了一份公正的报告。

meaning: n. 里面 adj. 里面的 adv. 在里面
example: The keys are inside the drawer.
exampleChinese: 钥匙在抽屉里面。

meaning: n. 秒 v. 支持 adj. 第二的
example: She came in second in the race.
exampleChinese: 她在比赛中得了第二名。

meaning: v. 控制 n. 硕士 adj. 主人的
example: She worked hard to master English grammar.
exampleChinese: 她努力掌握英语语法。

meaning: adj. 健康的，健全的
example: He eats healthy food every day.
exampleChinese: 他每天吃健康的食物。

meaning: n. 文件 v. 提出
example: Please file the papers on my desk.
exampleChinese: 请把我桌上的文件归档。

meaning: n. 第七 adj. 第七的 adv. 居第七位地
example: Her birthday is on the seventh of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月七日。

meaning: n. 大学
example: My sister hopes to go to college next year.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐希望明年上大学。

meaning: n. 自由
example: The children enjoyed their liberty.
exampleChinese: 孩子们享受着自由。

meaning: n. 吹 v. 风吹
example: Strong winds blow across the lake in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天强风会吹过湖面。

meaning: n. 问卷
example: Please fill out the questionnaire.
exampleChinese: 请填写这份问卷。

meaning: n. 圣诞节
example: We visit our grandparents at Christmas.
exampleChinese: 我们在圣诞节去看望祖父母。

meaning: n. 父亲，爸爸 v. 发明，创立
example: My father drives me to school every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸每天早上开车送我去上学。

meaning: pron. 每个人
example: Everyone in our class likes the new teacher.
exampleChinese: 我们班每个人都喜欢这位新老师。

meaning: adj. 温和的 n. （英国的一种）淡味麦芽啤酒
example: We had a mild winter this year.
exampleChinese: 今年我们经历了一个温和的冬天。

meaning: aux. 能够 v. 能（can的过去式） modal verb. 能，会，可以〔can 的过去式〕
example: She could swim at age six.
exampleChinese: 她六岁时就会游泳了。

meaning: adj. 自动的 n. 自动机械
example: The door has an automatic lock.
exampleChinese: 这扇门有自动锁。

meaning: n. 文章 v. 订约将…收为学徒或见习生
example: I read an interesting article this morning.
exampleChinese: 我今天早上读了一篇有趣的文章。

meaning: n. 链环，环节 v. 连接，连结
example: This bridge will link the two towns.
exampleChinese: 这座桥将把这两个城镇连接起来。

meaning: abbr. 光盘，激光唱片（Compact Disc）
example: My father found an old CD in the drawer.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸在抽屉里找到了一张旧光盘。

meaning: prep. 关于 adj. 在附近的 adv. 大约
example: She knows a lot about plants.
exampleChinese: 她对植物了解很多。

meaning: n. 局部 adj. 当地的
example: We bought fresh fruit from the local market.
exampleChinese: 我们从当地市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: n. 氢
example: Hydrogen is the lightest gas.
exampleChinese: 氢是最轻的气体。

meaning: n. 背痛
example: She stayed home because of a backache.
exampleChinese: 她因为背痛待在家里。

meaning: n. 引诱
example: He resisted the temptation to lie.
exampleChinese: 他抵住了说谎的诱惑。

meaning: n. 蜡笔 v. 以蜡笔作画
example: The child used a red crayon to draw a sun.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子用一支红色蜡笔画了一个太阳。

meaning: n. 水果 v. 结果实
example: We bought fresh fruit at the market.
exampleChinese: 我们在市场买了新鲜水果。

meaning: adj. 博学的
example: The learned professor answered every question.
exampleChinese: 这位博学的教授回答了每个问题。

meaning: adv. 宁可，宁愿 int. 当然啦（回答问题时用）
example: I would rather stay home tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚我宁愿待在家里。

meaning: n. 工作 v. 承包
example: My first job was in a small shop.
exampleChinese: 我的第一份工作是在一家小商店。

meaning: n. 数学
example: Mathematics is my favorite subject.
exampleChinese: 数学是我最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 职业
example: Her occupation is a nurse.
exampleChinese: 她的职业是护士。

meaning: n. 结果
example: Missing the bus was a bad consequence.
exampleChinese: 错过公交车是一个不好的结果。

meaning: n. 增加，增长 v. 增加，增大
example: The price will increase next month.
exampleChinese: 价格下个月会上涨。

meaning: v. 植树于 n. 森林
example: A small path goes through the forest.
exampleChinese: 一条小路穿过森林。

meaning: adj. 相对的 n. 亲戚
example: We visited a relative during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假期里我们拜访了一位亲属。

meaning: n. 学生
example: Each pupil has a desk in the classroom.
exampleChinese: 每个学生在教室里都有一张课桌。

meaning: n. 签证 v. 签发签证
example: I need a visa to enter the country.
exampleChinese: 我需要签证才能进入这个国家。

meaning: n. 限制
example: The new rule caused a restriction on travel.
exampleChinese: 新规定导致了旅行限制。

meaning: n. 电冰箱
example: The milk is in the fridge.
exampleChinese: 牛奶在冰箱里。

meaning: prep. 落后于 adv. 在后地 n. 屁股
example: She sat behind me in class.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上坐在我后面。

meaning: n. 摇摆 adj. 旋转的
example: The swing in the park moves in the wind.
exampleChinese: 公园里的秋千在风中摇摆。

meaning: n. 方法 v. 接近
example: Our teacher showed us a new approach to solving the math problem.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师向我们展示了解决这道数学题的新方法。

meaning: v. 改正 adj. 正确的
example: Please correct the mistake in this sentence.
exampleChinese: 请改正这个句子里的错误。

meaning: prep. 在（表示存在或出现的地点、场所、位置、空间） n. 阿特（老挝货币基本单位att） abbr. 密封的（airtight）
example: She is waiting at the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 她正在公交车站等候。

meaning: n. 药丸 v. 把…制成丸剂
example: Take one pill after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后吃一粒药丸。

meaning: v. 强调 n. 下划线 vt. 在…下面划线
example: Please underline the key words in your notebook.
exampleChinese: 请在笔记本里把关键词划出来。

meaning: n. 队 v. 使合作
example: Our team won the school match.
exampleChinese: 我们队赢了学校的比赛。

meaning: n. 奖学金
example: She won a scholarship to study music abroad.
exampleChinese: 她获得了去国外学习音乐的奖学金。

meaning: n. 委员会
example: The committee met to plan the school fair.
exampleChinese: 委员会开会筹划学校集市。

meaning: v. 刺，戳 n. 棍
example: Please stick the photo on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把这张照片贴在墙上。

meaning: n. 牛仔
example: The cowboy rode across the open field.
exampleChinese: 那个牛仔骑马穿过开阔的田野。

meaning: n. 期待
example: His expectation was that the team would win.
exampleChinese: 他期待球队会获胜。

meaning: adj. 无条件的
example: Her love for her family was unconditional.
exampleChinese: 她对家人的爱是无条件的。

meaning: n. 干燥机
example: The drier in the laundry room stopped working.
exampleChinese: 洗衣房里的干燥机坏了。

meaning: n. 结束 v. 结束，终止
example: The movie will end at nine.
exampleChinese: 电影将在九点结束。

meaning: n. 允许
example: You need permission to enter the lab.
exampleChinese: 进入实验室需要许可。

meaning: n. 使用 v. 利用
example: We use this room for music class.
exampleChinese: 我们用这个房间上音乐课。

meaning: n. 听力 v. 听见（hear的ing形式）
example: My hearing is better than it was last year.
exampleChinese: 我的听力比去年好多了。

meaning: n. 熨斗 v. 熨 adj. 铁的
example: I need to iron my shirt before school.
exampleChinese: 上学前我得熨一下我的衬衫。

meaning: n. 报酬 v. 奖励
example: Hard work will reward you in the end.
exampleChinese: 努力工作最终会给你回报。

meaning: n. 信号 v. 标志 adj. 显著的
example: The red signal told the cars to stop.
exampleChinese: 红色信号示意汽车停下。

meaning: pron. 自己
example: One should believe in oneself.
exampleChinese: 一个人应该相信自己。

meaning: n. 论证
example: The argument was supported by several facts.
exampleChinese: 这个论证有几个事实支持。

meaning: n. 性格，品质 v. 印，刻
example: Her kind character makes everyone trust her.
exampleChinese: 她善良的性格让大家都信任她。

meaning: adv. 向北
example: We walked northwards toward the river.
exampleChinese: 我们向北朝河边走去。

meaning: n. 帽子 v. 给……戴上帽子
example: He wore a black hat in the rain.
exampleChinese: 他下雨时戴着一顶黑帽子。

meaning: v. 改善，增进
example: Reading every day can improve your English.
exampleChinese: 每天阅读可以提高你的英语水平。

meaning: v. 失败，不及格 n. 不及格
example: Don't fail the test because of carelessness.
exampleChinese: 不要因为粗心而考试不及格。

meaning: n. 学者
example: The scholar wrote a book about ancient art.
exampleChinese: 这位学者写了一本关于古代艺术的书。

meaning: v. 需要 vt. 需求
example: This job will require more time.
exampleChinese: 这项工作将需要更多时间。

meaning: v. 提到，谈到 n. 提及 vt. 提到
example: She did not mention the change in plans.
exampleChinese: 她没有提到计划的变动。

meaning: num. 八 adj. 八的 n. 八字形
example: There are eight apples in the bowl.
exampleChinese: 碗里有八个苹果。

meaning: n. 注意力
example: Please pay attention to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请注意听老师讲课。

meaning: n. 下降
example: There was a decline in train delays this month.
exampleChinese: 本月火车晚点有所下降。

meaning: adv. 巧妙地
example: She skillfully fixed the broken toy.
exampleChinese: 她巧妙地修好了坏掉的玩具。

meaning: n. 猫，猫科动物
example: The cat is sleeping on the sofa.
exampleChinese: 那只猫正在沙发上睡觉。

meaning: n. 末尾，最后 adj. 最后的 v. 持续
example: The movie will last two hours.
exampleChinese: 这部电影将持续两个小时。

meaning: pron. 你自己
example: You should trust yourself more.
exampleChinese: 你应该更相信你自己。

meaning: v. 喜欢 prep. 像 adj. 同样的
example: I like this song very much.
exampleChinese: 我非常喜欢这首歌。

meaning: n. 西 adj. 西方的 adv. 在西方
example: The sun sets in the west.
exampleChinese: 太阳从西边落下。

meaning: n. 外科医生
example: The surgeon explained the operation to the family.
exampleChinese: 外科医生向家属解释了这次手术。

meaning: v. 流动，涌流 n. 流动
example: Water began to flow through the pipe.
exampleChinese: 水开始通过管道流动。

meaning: v. 祝贺
example: We congratulate you on your success.
exampleChinese: 我们祝贺你取得成功。

meaning: adj. 完整的 n. 整体
example: I read the whole book in one day.
exampleChinese: 我一天就读完了整本书。

meaning: n. 女士
example: Be careful not to miss the target.
exampleChinese: 小心不要打偏目标。

meaning: adj. 简短的，简洁的 n. 摘要，简报 v. 简报，摘要
example: Please give me a brief answer.
exampleChinese: 请简短地回答我。

meaning: n. 动物
example: The panda is a gentle animal.
exampleChinese: 熊猫是一种温和的动物。

meaning: n. 问题，疑问 v. 询问
example: I have a question about the last math problem.
exampleChinese: 我对最后一道数学题有个问题。

meaning: n. 客栈 vi. 住旅馆
example: We stayed at a small inn near the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们住在湖边一家小客栈里。

meaning: n. 磨光，擦亮 v. 擦亮 adj. 波兰的
example: He will polish the shoes before the meeting.
exampleChinese: 他会在会议前把鞋子擦亮。

meaning: n. 原理，原则
example: A good scientist follows the same principle every time.
exampleChinese: 一位优秀的科学家每次都遵循同样的原则。

meaning: n. 满意，满足
example: Her hard work gave her great satisfaction.
exampleChinese: 她的努力工作让她感到很满足。

meaning: adj. 清洁的，干净的 v. 使干净 adv. 完全地
example: Please keep your desk clean.
exampleChinese: 请保持你的书桌干净。

meaning: n. 名声，名誉
example: The school has a strong reputation.
exampleChinese: 这所学校有很好的名声。

meaning: n. 腹部 v. 涨满
example: My belly hurt after I ate too much candy.
exampleChinese: 我吃了太多糖后，肚子痛了。

meaning: v. 吸吮 n. 吮吸
example: The baby likes to suck a bottle.
exampleChinese: 这个婴儿喜欢吸奶瓶。

meaning: n. 厕所，盥洗室 vi. 梳妆 vt. 给…梳妆打扮
example: The toilet is next to the stairs.
exampleChinese: 厕所就在楼梯旁边。

meaning: n. 咸肉
example: We ate bacon and eggs for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我们早餐吃了咸肉和鸡蛋。

meaning: v. 污染 n. 毒药，毒物 adj. 有毒的
example: Dirty water can poison a river.
exampleChinese: 脏水会污染一条河。

meaning: n. 摩托车
example: He rode his motorbike to school.
exampleChinese: 他骑摩托车去上学。

meaning: v. 下沉 n. 水槽
example: The boat may sink in the storm.
exampleChinese: 这条船可能会在暴风雨中下沉。

meaning: n. 舌头 v. 舔
example: The doctor asked me to stick out my tongue.
exampleChinese: 医生让我把舌头伸出来。

meaning: n. 小提琴
example: My sister plays the violin every day.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐每天拉小提琴。

meaning: adj. 微妙的
example: The teacher asked a delicate question.
exampleChinese: 老师问了一个微妙的问题。

meaning: n. 大使馆
example: We waited outside the embassy.
exampleChinese: 我们在大使馆外面等着。

meaning: n. 误差
example: There is a small error in the measurement.
exampleChinese: 这个测量结果有一个小误差。

meaning: n. 缺点
example: One disadvantage of the trip is the long bus ride.
exampleChinese: 这次旅行的一个缺点是要坐很长时间的公交车。

meaning: adj. 绿色的 n. 绿色 v. 使…变绿色
example: The leaves turn green in spring.
exampleChinese: 树叶在春天变绿。

meaning: v. 寻求
example: Many students seek better ways to study.
exampleChinese: 许多学生寻找更好的学习方法。

meaning: adv. 也许 n. 可能性
example: Maybe it will rain this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 今天下午也许会下雨。

meaning: n. 图表 v. 用曲线图表示
example: The graph shows sales rising in summer.
exampleChinese: 这张图表显示销售额在夏季上升。

meaning: n. 食谱
example: This recipe uses only five simple ingredients.
exampleChinese: 这个食谱只用五种简单的食材。

meaning: n. 激光
example: Doctors use laser tools in some surgeries.
exampleChinese: 医生在一些手术中使用激光工具。

meaning: n. 入口 v. 使出神
example: The main entrance is on the left.
exampleChinese: 正门在左边。

meaning: n. 租金 v. 出租
example: My family will rent a small apartment near the school.
exampleChinese: 我家要在学校附近租一套小公寓。

meaning: v. 使比赛 n. 比赛，竞赛
example: Our team won the match yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们队昨天赢了比赛。

meaning: adj. 恰好是，正是 adv. 非常，很
example: This is the very book I wanted.
exampleChinese: 这正是我想要的那本书。

meaning: adj. 生的 n. 擦伤处 vt. 擦伤
example: She ate raw carrots as a snack.
exampleChinese: 她把生胡萝卜当零食吃。

meaning: adj. 荒谬的 n. 荒诞
example: His excuse sounded absurd.
exampleChinese: 他的借口听起来很荒谬。

meaning: n. 可能性
example: There is a possibility of rain tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 明天有下雨的可能性。

meaning: n. 车库 v. 把……送入车库
example: My father keeps his tools in the garage.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸把工具放在车库里。

meaning: n. 氧气， 氧
example: Plants need oxygen to live.
exampleChinese: 植物需要氧气才能生存。

meaning: n. 山羊
example: The goat is eating grass by the fence.
exampleChinese: 那只山羊正在栅栏旁吃草。

meaning: n. 辐射
example: The doctor warned us about radiation.
exampleChinese: 医生提醒我们注意辐射。

meaning: n. 雾 v. 使模糊
example: A thick fog covered the road.
exampleChinese: 浓雾笼罩了道路。

meaning: n. 主机 v. 主持 vt. 招待
example: The host welcomed us at the door.
exampleChinese: 主人在门口欢迎了我们。

meaning: adj. 令人惊异的 v. 使吃惊（amaze的ing形式）
example: The view from the mountain is amazing.
exampleChinese: 山上的景色令人惊异。

meaning: adv. 在户外 n. 户外 adj. 户外的（等于outdoor）
example: We ate lunch outdoors in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们在公园里户外吃了午餐。

meaning: n. 进步，发展 v. 前进，进步 vi. 进展
example: The class made good progress this term.
exampleChinese: 这个班这学期取得了很大进步。

meaning: adj. 真正的，真实的
example: The museum displayed an authentic painting.
exampleChinese: 博物馆展出了一幅真迹。

meaning: n. 煎蛋卷
example: She made an omelette for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 她做了一个煎蛋卷当早餐。

meaning: n. 女校长
example: The headmistress welcomed the new students.
exampleChinese: 女校长欢迎了新生。

meaning: v. 绊倒 n. 旅行
example: We took a short trip to the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们去湖边进行了短途旅行。

meaning: n. 运输
example: The transport of goods was delayed by rain.
exampleChinese: 货物运输因下雨而延误了。

meaning: v. 爆发
example: The volcano can erupt without warning.
exampleChinese: 火山可能会毫无预警地爆发。

meaning: adj. 健忘的
example: My forgetful brother lost his keys again.
exampleChinese: 我健忘的哥哥又把钥匙弄丢了。

meaning: n. 先生
example: Yes, sir, I understand the question.
exampleChinese: 是的，先生，我明白这个问题。

meaning: n. 朋友
example: My best friend sits next to me at school.
exampleChinese: 我最好的朋友在学校坐在我旁边。

meaning: n. 假日 v. 外出度假
example: We will visit my grandparents during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假日期间我们要去看望祖父母。

meaning: v. 喝，饮 n. 酒，饮料
example: I usually drink milk in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我通常早上喝牛奶。

meaning: adj. 商业的 n. 商业广告
example: We saw a commercial on TV last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚在电视上看到了一个商业广告。

meaning: conj. 每当 adv. 不论何时
example: Whenever I feel tired, I take a short walk.
exampleChinese: 每当我感到累的时候，我就会短暂散步。

meaning: n. 皇帝
example: The emperor lived in a great palace.
exampleChinese: 皇帝住在一座宏伟的宫殿里。

meaning: n. 宾戈游戏
example: We played bingo after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭后玩了宾戈游戏。

meaning: n. 经营者
example: The operator runs a small family hotel.
exampleChinese: 这位经营者经营着一家小型家庭旅馆。

meaning: n. 道歉
example: Please accept my apology for being late.
exampleChinese: 请接受我迟到的道歉。

meaning: adj. 纯的
example: The water in the bottle is pure.
exampleChinese: 瓶子里的水是纯净的。

meaning: n. 献身，奉献
example: Her devotion to teaching inspired everyone.
exampleChinese: 她对教学的奉献精神鼓舞了每个人。

meaning: n. 年级 v. 评分
example: My sister is in the seventh grade.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐上七年级。

meaning: adv. 现在 adj. 现在的 conj. 由于
example: I need to leave now.
exampleChinese: 我现在得走了。

meaning: adj. 受伤的 n. 受伤者 v. 使受伤（wound的过去分词）
example: The wounded soldier was taken to the hospital.
exampleChinese: 受伤的士兵被送往医院。

meaning: n. 母鸡
example: The hen laid an egg this morning.
exampleChinese: 那只母鸡今天早上下了一个蛋。

meaning: adj. 相反的 n. 对立面 prep. 在…的对面
example: The bank is opposite the post office.
exampleChinese: 银行在邮局对面。

meaning: n. 利润 v. 获利
example: The company hopes to make a bigger profit this year.
exampleChinese: 公司希望今年获得更大的利润。

meaning: n. 勇气
example: It took courage to speak in front of the class.
exampleChinese: 在全班同学面前发言需要勇气。

meaning: adj. 杰出的 n. 未偿贷款
example: She did an outstanding job on the science project.
exampleChinese: 她在科学项目中做得非常出色。

meaning: n. 庇护 v. 保护
example: The tree gave us shelter from the wind.
exampleChinese: 那棵树为我们挡住了风。

meaning: v. 看 vi. 看， 瞧
example: Look at the blackboard, please.
exampleChinese: 请看黑板。

meaning: v. 滑行 n. 海岸
example: We walked along the coast at sunset.
exampleChinese: 日落时我们沿着海岸散步。

meaning: v. 驳回诉讼 vt. 不理睬
example: The judge may ignore the case if it lacks evidence.
exampleChinese: 如果缺乏证据，法官可能会驳回这起诉讼。

meaning: adj. 不同的
example: The two bags are different in color.
exampleChinese: 这两个包颜色不同。

meaning: adj. 实际的 adv. 真正地 n. 现实
example: This is the real reason I came early.
exampleChinese: 这才是我早来的真正原因。

meaning: adj. 典型的
example: Her shoes are typical of the school uniform.
exampleChinese: 她的鞋子很典型，符合校服的样式。

meaning: adj. 便利的
example: This small bag is handy for travel.
exampleChinese: 这个小包旅行时很方便。

meaning: adj. 破碎的 v. 折断
example: My phone screen is broken.
exampleChinese: 我的手机屏幕碎了。

meaning: adv. 大声地
example: Please read the story aloud to the class.
exampleChinese: 请把这个故事大声读给全班听。

meaning: v. 出现
example: Stars appear in the night sky.
exampleChinese: 星星出现在夜空中。

meaning: n. 理发店 adj. 有男声合唱之和声的
example: We got our hair cut at the barbershop.
exampleChinese: 我们在理发店理了发。

meaning: n. 学生
example: Each student needs a notebook.
exampleChinese: 每个学生都需要一个笔记本。

meaning: adj. 好吃的 n. 美味的东西
example: The cake is yummy and sweet.
exampleChinese: 这个蛋糕又好吃又甜。

meaning: n. 午夜 adj. 半夜的
example: It was midnight when we went to bed.
exampleChinese: 我们上床睡觉时已经是午夜了。

meaning: n. 添加
example: We need an addition to the list.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在名单上再添加一项。

meaning: n. 气象员
example: The weatherman said it would rain tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 气象员说，明天会下雨。

meaning: v. 许可 n. 许可证
example: You must permit visitors to enter.
exampleChinese: 你必须允许访客进入。

meaning: n. 手，手艺 v. 传递，交给 vt. 交付
example: Please hand me the red pen.
exampleChinese: 请把那支红笔递给我。

meaning: v. 获得
example: You can obtain a library card with your student ID.
exampleChinese: 你可以用学生证获得一张图书馆卡。

meaning: n. 奖品 v. 珍视 adj. 获奖的
example: She won first prize in the art contest.
exampleChinese: 她在美术比赛中获得了一等奖。

meaning: n. 内容，目录 adj. 满意的 v. 使满足
example: The book has a long content page at the front.
exampleChinese: 这本书在前面有一页很长的目录。

meaning: adv. 坚定地，坚决地
example: She held the bag firmly with both hands.
exampleChinese: 她用双手坚定地抓着那个包。

meaning: v. 把…涂颜色，粉饰 n. 颜色
example: They colour the walls blue every summer.
exampleChinese: 他们每年夏天都把墙涂成蓝色。

meaning: adj. 疲倦的 v. 疲倦
example: After the long walk, I felt tired.
exampleChinese: 走了很长一段路后，我觉得很疲倦。

meaning: adj. 模糊的
example: His explanation was too vague to understand.
exampleChinese: 他的解释太模糊了，无法理解。

meaning: adj. 经典的 n. 名著
example: This song is a classic that many people still love.
exampleChinese: 这首歌是一首经典作品，很多人至今仍然喜爱。

meaning: v. 涉及，关系到 n. 关系 vt. 涉及
example: The new rule does not concern only teachers.
exampleChinese: 这条新规定不仅涉及老师。

meaning: n. 才能
example: Music is her greatest talent.
exampleChinese: 音乐是她最大的天资。

meaning: adj. 几个的 pron. 几个
example: Several students stayed after class.
exampleChinese: 几个学生课后留了下来。

meaning: adv. 简单地
example: She simply smiled and said nothing.
exampleChinese: 她只是简单地笑了笑，什么也没说。

meaning: n. 印度（南亚国家）
example: My uncle traveled to India last year.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔去年去了印度。

meaning: n. 土地，地产
example: My uncle owns an acre near the river.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔在河边拥有一英亩土地。

meaning: n. 土豆
example: I put a potato in the soup.
exampleChinese: 我把一个土豆放进汤里。

meaning: v. 采取 vt. 采用
example: The school will adopt a new reading plan.
exampleChinese: 学校将采用一个新的阅读计划。

meaning: n. 膝盖，膝 v. 用膝盖碰
example: He hurt his knee during the race.
exampleChinese: 他在比赛中伤到了膝盖。

meaning: n. 报纸
example: My grandpa reads the newspaper every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷每天早上都看报纸。

meaning: adj. 统一的 n. 制服 v. 使穿制服
example: Every student wears a school uniform on Monday.
exampleChinese: 每个学生周一都穿校服。

meaning: v. 支持，支撑，支援 n. 支持，维持
example: Strong walls support the roof.
exampleChinese: 坚固的墙支撑着屋顶。

meaning: n. 保存，保持
example: The park’s conservation program protects local birds.
exampleChinese: 公园的保存计划保护了当地的鸟类。

meaning: adj. 基本的 n. 基本原理
example: A solid breakfast is fundamental to a busy school day.
exampleChinese: 一顿扎实的早餐对忙碌的上学日来说是基本的。

meaning: n. 路旁 adj. 路旁的
example: We left the broken chair by the wayside.
exampleChinese: 我们把坏椅子丢在路旁。

meaning: n. 请求 v. 要求
example: She sent a request for more time on the project.
exampleChinese: 她发出了延长项目时间的请求。

meaning: n. 焦炭 v. 焦化
example: The factory uses coke as fuel.
exampleChinese: 这家工厂用焦炭作燃料。

meaning: prep. 在…之间 adv. 在中间
example: The ball rolled between the chairs.
exampleChinese: 球滚到了两把椅子之间。

meaning: n. 开启工具
example: Use the opener to open the can.
exampleChinese: 用开启工具把罐头打开。

meaning: n. 信用，信誉 v. 相信，信任
example: The teacher gave him credit for his honest answer.
exampleChinese: 老师对他诚实的回答表示信任。

meaning: v. 吸收
example: Sponges absorb water quickly.
exampleChinese: 海绵会很快吸收水分。

meaning: v. 乘 adv. 多样地 adj. 多层的
example: If you multiply three by four, you get twelve.
exampleChinese: 三乘以四等于十二。

meaning: n. 巧克力，巧克力糖 adj. 巧克力色的
example: I bought a bar of chocolate at the store.
exampleChinese: 我在商店买了一块巧克力。

meaning: n. 球 v. 成团块
example: He kicked the ball into the goal.
exampleChinese: 他把球踢进了球门。

meaning: n. 支票
example: She wrote the cheque for the rent.
exampleChinese: 她开了这张房租支票。

meaning: n. 俄罗斯
example: My history teacher once traveled to Russia.
exampleChinese: 我的历史老师曾去过俄国。

meaning: adj. 西藏的 n. 藏语
example: Tibetan songs sound very beautiful.
exampleChinese: 藏族歌曲听起来很美。

meaning: n. 庙宇
example: We visited an old temple on the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们参观了山上的一座古老庙宇。

meaning: n. 火 v. 点燃 vt. 点火
example: We sat near the fire to keep warm.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在火旁边取暖。

meaning: v. 激起 vt. 刺激
example: Good news can excite the whole class.
exampleChinese: 好消息能让全班兴奋起来。

meaning: n. 包裹 v. 打包
example: He carried the parcel to the front door.
exampleChinese: 他把包裹送到前门。

meaning: n. 能力，能耐
example: Her ability to draw surprised us.
exampleChinese: 她的绘画能力让我们很惊讶。

meaning: v. 离开 n. 许可，同意
example: We should leave home early for the train.
exampleChinese: 我们应该早点离家去赶火车。

meaning: n. 把手 v. 处理
example: Please handle the glass jar carefully.
exampleChinese: 请小心拿这个玻璃罐。

meaning: n. 手电筒
example: I used a flashlight when the power went out.
exampleChinese: 停电时我用了手电筒。

meaning: n. 键盘 v. 键入
example: I spilled juice on my keyboard.
exampleChinese: 我把果汁洒在了我的键盘上。

meaning: n. 候选人，候补者
example: The candidate answered every question clearly.
exampleChinese: 候选人清楚地回答了每个问题。

meaning: v. 为…拍照 n. 照片
example: I want to photograph the mountains at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 我想在日出时拍下群山。

meaning: n. 玻璃 v. 反映
example: The glass on the door is very clean.
exampleChinese: 门上的玻璃非常干净。

meaning: n. 惯例，传统
example: It is a family tradition to eat together on Sundays.
exampleChinese: 周日全家一起吃饭是个传统。

meaning: pron. 这些 adj. 这些的
example: These apples are very sweet.
exampleChinese: 这些苹果很甜。

meaning: adj. 不同的 prep. 和…不同
example: Unlike her brother, she likes quiet music.
exampleChinese: 和她哥哥不同，她喜欢安静的音乐。

meaning: adv. 很少
example: He seldom eats fast food.
exampleChinese: 他很少吃快餐。

meaning: v. 使喜欢 int. 请（礼貌用语）
example: Please close the window.
exampleChinese: 请把窗户关上。

meaning: v. 克服
example: She worked hard to overcome her fear of public speaking.
exampleChinese: 她努力克服了公开演讲的恐惧。

meaning: v. 不计 prep. 除…之外 conj. 除了
example: Everyone came except Tom.
exampleChinese: 除了汤姆，大家都来了。

meaning: v. 提倡 n. 提倡者
example: Many parents advocate reading every day.
exampleChinese: 许多家长提倡每天阅读。

meaning: adj. 多山的
example: They live in a mountainous area.
exampleChinese: 他们住在一个多山的地区。

meaning: num. 四 adj. 四的
example: We saw four birds in the tree.
exampleChinese: 我们看见树上有四只鸟。

meaning: v. 满足 n. 集会 adj. 合适的
example: I often meet my teacher on the bus.
exampleChinese: 我经常在公交车上碰到老师。

meaning: n. 王朝
example: The ancient Dynasty ruled the land for hundreds of years.
exampleChinese: 这个古老的王朝统治这片土地已有几百年。

meaning: v. 达到 n. 范围
example: Our school hopes to reach 1,000 students next year.
exampleChinese: 我们学校希望明年达到1000名学生。

meaning: adj. 普通的 n. 普通
example: Her life seemed ordinary, but she had a kind heart.
exampleChinese: 她的生活看起来很普通，但她有一颗善良的心。

meaning: adj. 挑战的 v. 要求
example: This math problem is challenging, but I can solve it.
exampleChinese: 这道数学题很有挑战性，但我能解出来。

meaning: v. 超速，加速 n. 速度，速率
example: Please slow down and do not speed.
exampleChinese: 请慢一点，不要超速。

meaning: adv. 一次 conj. 一旦
example: I go to the library once a week.
exampleChinese: 我每周去一次图书馆。

meaning: n. 类型，品种 v. 打字
example: What type of fruit do you like?
exampleChinese: 你喜欢哪种水果？

meaning: adj. 甜的 n. 糖果
example: This tea is too sweet for me.
exampleChinese: 这杯茶对我来说太甜了。

meaning: int. 天哪 n. 善良，优秀
example: Goodness, I forgot my homework at home!
exampleChinese: 天哪，我把作业忘在家里了！

meaning: n. 灌溉
example: The farm uses irrigation to help the crops grow.
exampleChinese: 这个农场用灌溉来帮助庄稼生长。

meaning: n. 旅行者 adj. 旅游的 vt. 在旅行参观
example: The tourist took photos of the old bridge.
exampleChinese: 那位游客拍了那座老桥的照片。

meaning: n. 自助餐 v. 与…搏斗 adj. 自助的
example: We ate lunch at a buffet near the hotel.
exampleChinese: 我们在酒店附近的一家自助餐厅吃了午饭。

meaning: v. 分享，分担 n. 份额
example: Please share your notes with me after class.
exampleChinese: 请在课后和我分享你的笔记。

meaning: n. 智力
example: Her intelligence helps her learn new things quickly.
exampleChinese: 她的智力帮助她很快学会新事物。

meaning: adj. 意识到的
example: He was aware of the noise outside the window.
exampleChinese: 他意识到了窗外的噪音。

meaning: adj. 青春期的 n. 青少年
example: The adolescent boy was taller than his father.
exampleChinese: 那个青春期的男孩比他父亲还高。

meaning: v. 扫描
example: Please scan the QR code to pay.
exampleChinese: 请扫描二维码付款。

meaning: n. 轶事
example: She told an anecdote about her first day at school.
exampleChinese: 她讲了一个关于自己第一天上学的轶事。

meaning: adj. 从前的，前者的 n. 模型，样板
example: My former teacher still sends me postcards.
exampleChinese: 我从前的老师还会给我寄明信片。

meaning: v. 取来 n. 取得
example: Can you fetch my notebook from the desk?
exampleChinese: 你能帮我把我的笔记本从书桌上取来吗？

meaning: n. 牙刷
example: My toothbrush is blue.
exampleChinese: 我的牙刷是蓝色的。

meaning: adj. 埃及的 n. 埃及人
example: The Egyptian museum has many old statues.
exampleChinese: 这家埃及博物馆有许多古老的雕像。

meaning: n. 改革，改良 v. 改革，革新 adj. 改革的
example: The city plans to reform the public transport system.
exampleChinese: 这座城市计划改革公共交通系统。

meaning: n. 长凳 v. 给…以席位
example: We sat on a bench and watched the sunset.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在长凳上看日落。

meaning: n. 最好的人，最好的事物 adj. 最好的 adv. 最好地
example: She sings best when she feels relaxed.
exampleChinese: 她放松时唱得最好。

meaning: n. 背心 v. 授予
example: He wore a life vest on the boat.
exampleChinese: 他在船上穿着救生背心。

meaning: n. 弱点
example: One weakness of the plan is its high cost.
exampleChinese: 这个计划的一个弱点是成本太高。

meaning: n. 运气 v. 靠运气，走运
example: I had the luck to find my lost keys.
exampleChinese: 我很走运，找到了丢失的钥匙。

meaning: n. 星期五
example: We have a music class on Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期五有一节音乐课。

meaning: n. 直升飞机 vi. 乘直升飞机 vt. 由直升机运送
example: A helicopter flew over the river this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上，一架直升机飞过了河面。

meaning: n. 挑战 v. 敢冒
example: I dare to try the high diving board.
exampleChinese: 我敢尝试那个高跳板。

meaning: adj. 机密的
example: The report is confidential and must not be shared.
exampleChinese: 这份报告是机密的，不能外传。

meaning: adj. 轻微的，少量的 v. 轻视，忽略 n. 怠慢
example: She gave only a slight smile.
exampleChinese: 她只是微微一笑。

meaning: v. 等候 n. 等待
example: Thank you for your wait at the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 谢谢你在公交车站的等待。

meaning: n. 旅行
example: Our train journey to Beijing started early in the morning.
exampleChinese: 我们去北京的火车旅程一大早就开始了。

meaning: adj. 懒惰的
example: He is lazy on Sunday mornings.
exampleChinese: 他在星期天早上很懒。

meaning: n. 谅解，理解 adj. 了解的 v. 理解
example: We finally reached an understanding after talking for hours.
exampleChinese: 我们谈了几个小时后，终于达成了谅解。

meaning: n. 喇叭，扬声器
example: The loudspeaker announced the train’s arrival.
exampleChinese: 扬声器通知了火车到站的消息。

meaning: n. 烟囱
example: Smoke rose from the chimney.
exampleChinese: 烟从烟囱里升了起来。

meaning: v. 扫除 n. 打扫，扫除
example: Please sweep the floor after class.
exampleChinese: 请在下课后扫地。

meaning: adj. 无止境的
example: We had an endless wait for the bus.
exampleChinese: 我们等公交车等了好久，似乎无止境。

meaning: n. 仪器
example: My favorite instrument is the piano.
exampleChinese: 我最喜欢的乐器是钢琴。

meaning: n. 急速上升
example: The company’s profits saw a zoom this year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司今年的利润急速上升。

meaning: n. 监狱 vt. 监禁
example: The man was sent to prison.
exampleChinese: 那个男人被送进了监狱。

meaning: n. 钢琴家
example: The pianist played a soft song for the class.
exampleChinese: 那位钢琴家为全班弹了一首柔和的曲子。

meaning: n. 圆珠笔
example: She wrote the answer with a blue ballpoint.
exampleChinese: 她用一支蓝色圆珠笔写下了答案。

meaning: n. 公鸡
example: The rooster crowed at sunrise.
exampleChinese: 公鸡在日出时啼叫。

meaning: n. 胶囊 adj. 压缩的 v. 压缩
example: Take one capsule after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后服用一粒胶囊。

meaning: n. 破布 v. 戏弄
example: He used a rag to clean the window.
exampleChinese: 他用一块破布擦窗户。

meaning: n. 游戏 adj. 勇敢的 v. 赌博
example: We played a game after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们玩了一个游戏。

meaning: n. 港口，口岸 v. 转向左舷
example: The ship entered the port at noon.
exampleChinese: 这艘船在中午驶入港口。

meaning: n. 叶子 v. 生叶
example: A yellow leaf fell onto my book.
exampleChinese: 一片黄叶落在我的书上。

meaning: n. 服务员
example: The waiter brought us some water.
exampleChinese: 侍者给我们端来了一些水。

meaning: n. 花 v. 成熟，发育
example: This flower smells very sweet.
exampleChinese: 这朵花闻起来很香。

meaning: adj. 落满灰尘的
example: The attic was dusty and dark.
exampleChinese: 阁楼里落满灰尘，又黑又暗。

meaning: n. 吸引，吸引力
example: The old bridge is a major attraction here.
exampleChinese: 这座古老的桥是这里的一大吸引力。

meaning: n. 姐妹 adj. 姐妹般的
example: My sister helps me with my homework.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐帮我做作业。

meaning: n. 蔬菜 adj. 蔬菜的
example: We grow vegetable plants in the yard.
exampleChinese: 我们在院子里种蔬菜。

meaning: n. 蜂窝
example: The bees returned to the beehive.
exampleChinese: 蜜蜂回到了蜂窝里。

meaning: v. 欺骗 n. 傻瓜 adj. 傻的
example: You cannot fool me with that simple trick.
exampleChinese: 你不能用那个简单的把戏骗我。

meaning: n. 烟火
example: We watched the firework burst over the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们看着烟火在湖面上空绽放。

meaning: n. 黄昏，薄暮 adj. 微暗的 v. 使变微暗
example: At dusk, the park became quiet.
exampleChinese: 到了黄昏，公园安静了下来。

meaning: adv. 在某处 n. 某个地方
example: My keys must be somewhere in the room.
exampleChinese: 我的钥匙一定在房间里的某个地方。

meaning: adj. 低的，浅的 adv. 低声地 n. 低
example: The shelf is too low for the books.
exampleChinese: 这个架子对这些书来说太低了。

meaning: n. 座右铭，格言
example: Her motto is “Never give up.”.
exampleChinese: 她的座右铭是“永不放弃”。

meaning: n. 联盟，协会
example: The two clubs formed a union.
exampleChinese: 这两个俱乐部组成了一个联盟。

meaning: adv. 最 adj. 大部分的，多数的 n. 大部分
example: Most students walk to school.
exampleChinese: 大多数学生步行去上学。

meaning: n. 摩天楼，超高层大楼
example: A skyscraper towered above the city.
exampleChinese: 一座摩天楼耸立在城市上空。

meaning: n. 化学家
example: The chemist mixed the liquids carefully.
exampleChinese: 那位化学家小心地混合了这些液体。

meaning: n. 苹果，苹果树，苹果似的东西
example: She put an apple in her school bag.
exampleChinese: 她把一个苹果放进书包里。

meaning: v. 传达 vt. 搬运
example: Please convey my thanks to your teacher.
exampleChinese: 请代我向你的老师转达谢意。

meaning: n. 浴衣
example: She put on a warm bathrobe after her shower.
exampleChinese: 她洗完澡后穿上了一件暖和的浴衣。

meaning: v. 欣赏，享受
example: I enjoy reading by the window on rainy days.
exampleChinese: 我喜欢在下雨天坐在窗边看书。

meaning: n. 平台
example: The children stood on the platform and waited for the train.
exampleChinese: 孩子们站在平台上等火车。

meaning: n. 牙科医生
example: I have an appointment with the dentist tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天约了牙科医生。

meaning: n. 火鸡
example: We ate roast turkey for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了烤火鸡。

meaning: adv. 向东方地 adj. 向东方的
example: The bus moved eastwards toward the sea.
exampleChinese: 公共汽车向东方开向海边。

meaning: v. 确认 vt. 确定
example: Please confirm your name before you leave.
exampleChinese: 请在离开前确认你的名字。

meaning: n. 擦伤 adj. 打草稿用的 v. 抓
example: He had a small Scratch on his arm.
exampleChinese: 他的胳膊上有一道小擦伤。

meaning: n. 喷雾 v. 喷射
example: The nurse used a spray to clean the wound.
exampleChinese: 护士用喷雾清洗伤口。

meaning: n. 幸福
example: Her happiness made the whole family smile.
exampleChinese: 她的幸福让全家都笑了。

meaning: n. 沙 v. 撒沙于
example: The children played in the sand.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在沙子里玩耍。

meaning: n. 挂钩 v. 钩住
example: Hang your bag on the hook by the door.
exampleChinese: 把你的包挂在门边的挂钩上。

meaning: n. 丛林，密林 adj. 丛林的
example: We heard birds in the dense jungle.
exampleChinese: 我们在茂密的丛林里听到了鸟叫声。

meaning: n. 清洁剂
example: This cleaner removes grease from the table.
exampleChinese: 这种清洁剂可以去除桌子上的油污。

meaning: v. 开发
example: The company plans to develop a new app.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划开发一款新应用。

meaning: n. 标准 adj. 标准的
example: This product meets the safety standard.
exampleChinese: 这个产品符合安全标准。

meaning: v. 授予专利 adj. 专利的 n. 专利权
example: The company will patent its new device next year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司明年将为它的新设备申请专利。

meaning: adj. 谦虚的，谦逊的
example: She is modest about her success.
exampleChinese: 她对自己的成功很谦虚。

meaning: n. 饼干
example: He ate a chocolate cookie after dinner.
exampleChinese: 他晚饭后吃了一块巧克力饼干。

meaning: adj. 德国的 n. 德语
example: My German teacher speaks very clearly.
exampleChinese: 我的德语老师说得很清楚。

meaning: adj. 流行的，通俗的
example: That singer is very popular with teenagers.
exampleChinese: 那位歌手很受青少年欢迎。

meaning: n. 领导 adj. 带头的
example: She took the lead in the class project.
exampleChinese: 她在班级项目中起了带头作用。

meaning: n. 劳动力，人工 v. 劳动
example: Farm labour is hard work.
exampleChinese: 农场劳动力工作很辛苦。

meaning: n. 教科书
example: We opened the textbook to page ten.
exampleChinese: 我们把教科书翻到第十页。

meaning: n. 羽毛 v. 用羽毛装饰
example: The bird lost a feather in the yard.
exampleChinese: 那只鸟在院子里掉了一根羽毛。

meaning: n. 额，前额
example: He wiped the sweat from his forehead.
exampleChinese: 他擦掉了额头上的汗。

meaning: n. 障碍物，屏障 vt. 把…关入栅栏
example: A wall formed a barrier between the two fields.
exampleChinese: 一堵墙在两块田地之间形成了屏障。

meaning: v. 提供
example: The school will provide free lunch today.
exampleChinese: 学校今天将提供免费午餐。

meaning: adv. 自始至终，到处 prep. 贯穿
example: The rain fell throughout the night.
exampleChinese: 雨下了一整夜。

meaning: adj. 乐观的
example: She felt optimistic about her test results.
exampleChinese: 她对自己的考试结果感到乐观。

meaning: adj. 仔细的
example: Be careful when you cross the street.
exampleChinese: 过马路时要小心。

meaning: n. 玫瑰 adj. 玫瑰花的 vt. 使成玫瑰色，使（面颊）发红
example: She put a red rose in a glass.
exampleChinese: 她把一朵红玫瑰放进玻璃杯里。

meaning: n. 滑动
example: The kids love to slide down the playground slide.
exampleChinese: 孩子们喜欢从操场上的滑梯滑下来。

meaning: n. 悲哀
example: There was sadness in his voice.
exampleChinese: 他的声音里带着悲伤。

meaning: n. 炊具
example: This rice cooker is easy to clean.
exampleChinese: 这个电饭煲很容易清洗。

meaning: n. 跑步者
example: The runner finished the race in first place.
exampleChinese: 那名跑步者获得了比赛第一名。

meaning: v. 打猎 n. 狩猎
example: The fox was hard to hunt in the forest.
exampleChinese: 那只狐狸在森林里很难打猎到。

meaning: n. 庭院，院子
example: We sat in the courtyard and ate lunch.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在庭院里吃午饭。

meaning: num. 七个，七 adj. 七的
example: There are seven days in a week.
exampleChinese: 一周有七天。

meaning: n. 芭蕾舞剧
example: She danced in the ballet last night.
exampleChinese: 她昨晚在那部芭蕾舞剧中跳舞。

meaning: adj. 生气的
example: She was angry about the broken cup.
exampleChinese: 她因为杯子打碎了而生气。

meaning: n. 宝石 v. 镶以宝石
example: She wore a jewel on her necklace.
exampleChinese: 她在项链上戴着一颗宝石。

meaning: adj. 到期的 n. 应付款 adv. 正（置于方位词前）
example: The bill is due today.
exampleChinese: 这张账单今天到期。

meaning: adv. 在国外 adj. 往国外的 n. 海外
example: Her sister studies abroad in Canada.
exampleChinese: 她姐姐在加拿大留学。

meaning: v. 啜泣，呜咽 n. 啜泣
example: The little boy began to sob after he fell.
exampleChinese: 那个小男孩摔倒后开始啜泣。

meaning: adj. 阳光充足的，和煦的
example: It is warm and sunny today.
exampleChinese: 今天天气温暖又晴朗。

meaning: adj. 黑色的 n. 黑色 v. 使变黑
example: He wore a black coat to school.
exampleChinese: 他穿着一件黑色外套去学校。

meaning: v. 包含
example: This box can contain all my books.
exampleChinese: 这个箱子可以装下我所有的书。

meaning: n. 安慰
example: Her words brought me great comfort.
exampleChinese: 她的话给了我很大的安慰。

meaning: n. 观光 adj. 观光的 v. 观光（sightsee的ing形式）
example: We went sightseeing in Beijing during the holiday.
exampleChinese: 假期里我们去北京观光了。

meaning: n. 会议
example: The meeting will start in ten minutes this session.
exampleChinese: 这次会议将在十分钟后开始。

meaning: n. 玩具 v. 玩弄 adj. 作为玩具的
example: The child hugged his new toy.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子抱着他的新玩具。

meaning: n. 理解
example: The reading test checked our comprehension.
exampleChinese: 这次阅读测试考查了我们的理解能力。

meaning: adj. 不成功的
example: Their plan was unsuccessful.
exampleChinese: 他们的计划没有成功。

meaning: adj. 年度的 n. 年刊，年鉴
example: We buy a new calendar every annual.
exampleChinese: 我们每年都买一本新日历。

meaning: adj. 晒黑的 v. 晒黑（sunburn的过去式和过去分词）
example: His sunburnt face felt hot and red.
exampleChinese: 他晒黑的脸又热又红。

meaning: n. 方法 adj. 使用体验派表演方法的
example: This method helps me learn new words faster.
exampleChinese: 这个方法帮助我更快地学习新单词。

meaning: n. 财富，财产 v. 珍爱
example: I treasure the photo from my first school trip.
exampleChinese: 我很珍爱第一次学校旅行的那张照片。

meaning: n. 片刻，瞬间，时刻
example: For a moment, the whole room became quiet.
exampleChinese: 有那么一瞬间，整个房间都安静了下来。

meaning: v. 赞同
example: The audience began to applaud his idea.
exampleChinese: 观众开始赞同他的想法。

meaning: n. 语法
example: Good grammar makes your writing clear.
exampleChinese: 好的语法会让你的写作更清楚。

meaning: adv. 永远
example: This is the best cake I have ever eaten.
exampleChinese: 这是我吃过的最好吃的蛋糕。

meaning: v. 捕鱼，钓鱼 n. 鱼，鱼类
example: We fish in the lake every summer.
exampleChinese: 我们每年夏天都在湖里钓鱼。

meaning: adj. 明亮的，鲜明的 adv. 明亮地 n. 车头灯光
example: The classroom is bright and clean.
exampleChinese: 教室明亮又干净。

meaning: n. 火焰 v. 焚烧
example: A flame rose from the candle.
exampleChinese: 火焰从蜡烛上升起。

meaning: n. 光 adj. 轻的 v. 点着
example: The bag is light and easy to carry.
exampleChinese: 这个包很轻，容易携带。

meaning: pron. 无人，没有人 n. 无名小卒
example: Nobody answered the phone.
exampleChinese: 没有人接电话。

meaning: n. 目标 v. 提出…作为反对的理由
example: The main object of the game is to score points.
exampleChinese: 这个游戏的主要目标是得分。

meaning: n. 工作日 adj. 日常的，工作日的
example: I finish my homework on a workday.
exampleChinese: 我在工作日完成作业。

meaning: n. 电影 v. 在…上覆以薄膜
example: We watched a funny film last night.
exampleChinese: 我们昨晚看了一部有趣的电影。

meaning: adv. 立即，立刻 conj. 一…就
example: She replied to my message immediately.
exampleChinese: 她立刻回复了我的消息。

meaning: v. 激发
example: Good teachers inspire students to try new things.
exampleChinese: 好老师能激发学生尝试新事物。

meaning: v. 尖叫 n. 尖叫声
example: The child let out a loud scream.
exampleChinese: 那个孩子发出了一声大尖叫。

meaning: n. 桌子 v. 制表 adj. 桌子的
example: The cups are on the table.
exampleChinese: 杯子在桌子上。

meaning: adj. 焦虑的
example: She felt anxious before the final exam.
exampleChinese: 期末考试前她感到很焦虑。

meaning: n. 议程
example: The teacher wrote the agenda on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师把议程写在了黑板上。

meaning: n. 政策，方针
example: The school has a strict no-phone policy.
exampleChinese: 学校有严格的禁用手机政策。

meaning: n. 熊猫
example: The panda is eating bamboo.
exampleChinese: 那只熊猫正在吃竹子。

meaning: n. 粘土 vt. 用黏土处理
example: The artist shaped the vase from soft clay.
exampleChinese: 那位艺术家用柔软的粘土塑成了那个花瓶。

meaning: n. 援助，帮助
example: We need your assistance with this project.
exampleChinese: 我们需要你在这个项目上的帮助。

meaning: adj. 昂贵的
example: This bag is too expensive for me.
exampleChinese: 这个包对我来说太贵了。

meaning: n. 远足 adj. 远足适用的 v. 出来
example: Our class went on an outing to the zoo.
exampleChinese: 我们班去动物园远足了。

meaning: n. 佛教徒 adj. 佛教的
example: The Buddhist monk spoke quietly to the visitors.
exampleChinese: 那位佛教徒僧人安静地对游客们说话。

meaning: abbr. （拉）下午（Post Meridiem，等于afternoon）
example: The meeting starts at 3 PM.
exampleChinese: 会议下午3点开始。

meaning: n. 代数学
example: We studied algebra in math class today.
exampleChinese: 我们今天在数学课上学习了代数学。

meaning: adj. 整齐的 v. 整理 n. 椅子的背罩
example: Please keep your desk tidy.
exampleChinese: 请保持你的书桌整齐。

meaning: n. 经理
example: The manager called a short meeting.
exampleChinese: 经理召开了一个简短的会议。

meaning: adj. 有趣的，好笑的，滑稽的 n. 滑稽人物
example: The monkey in the video looks funny.
exampleChinese: 视频里的猴子看起来很滑稽。

meaning: v. 遭受
example: Many people suffer from the cold in winter.
exampleChinese: 很多人在冬天受寒冷之苦。

meaning: n. 课程
example: Our new curriculum includes more science lessons.
exampleChinese: 我们的新课程包括更多科学课。

meaning: v. 剃，用剃刀刮 n. 剃刀
example: He used a razor to shave this morning.
exampleChinese: 他今天早上用剃刀刮胡子。

meaning: n. 宇宙
example: The universe is full of stars and planets.
exampleChinese: 宇宙中充满了恒星和行星。

meaning: n. 手提箱
example: Her suitcase was too heavy to carry upstairs.
exampleChinese: 她的手提箱太重了，搬不上楼。

meaning: n. 警察，警方 v. 监督 adj. 警察的
example: The police arrived a few minutes later.
exampleChinese: 几分钟后警察到了。

meaning: n. 天花板
example: A lamp hangs from the ceiling.
exampleChinese: 一盏灯挂在天花板上。

meaning: n. 理论
example: Her theory explains why the plant grew so fast.
exampleChinese: 她的理论解释了这株植物为什么长得这么快。

meaning: adj. 直接的 v. 管理 adv. 直接地
example: This is the most direct way home.
exampleChinese: 这是回家最直接的路。

meaning: adj. 一些 adv. 非常
example: I need some paper for my homework.
exampleChinese: 我做作业需要一些纸。

meaning: adj. 美味的 n. 可口的东西
example: These noodles are really tasty.
exampleChinese: 这些面条真的很美味。

meaning: n. 同时代的人 adj. 当代的
example: My contemporary in college now works as a doctor.
exampleChinese: 我在大学时的同龄人现在当医生。

meaning: adj. 准时的，守时的
example: She is always punctual for school.
exampleChinese: 她上学总是很准时。

meaning: aux. 必须，一定 n. 绝对必要的事物 modal verb. 必须
example: You must finish your homework before dinner.
exampleChinese: 你必须在晚饭前完成作业。

meaning: v. 吸引
example: Bright colors attract many visitors to the store.
exampleChinese: 鲜艳的颜色吸引了许多顾客来到这家商店。

meaning: n. 智慧，才智
example: His wisdom helped us solve the problem.
exampleChinese: 他的智慧帮助我们解决了这个问题。

meaning: n. 短裤
example: He wears shorts in hot weather.
exampleChinese: 天气热时他穿短裤。

meaning: v. 谈判，商议
example: The two companies will negotiate the contract tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 两家公司明天将商议这份合同。

meaning: v. 享受 n. 筵席，宴会
example: We feast on fruit after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我们尽情享用水果。

meaning: adj. 实际的
example: This is a practical way to save time.
exampleChinese: 这是一个节省时间的实际办法。

meaning: adj. 私人的 n. 列兵
example: This is a private room.
exampleChinese: 这是一个私人房间。

meaning: n. 技巧，技术
example: Practice improved her drawing technique.
exampleChinese: 练习提高了她的绘画技巧。

meaning: n. 小圆面包
example: I ate a warm bun for breakfast.
exampleChinese: 我早餐吃了一个热乎乎的小圆面包。

meaning: n. 兔子 v. 让…见鬼去吧
example: The rabbit is eating a carrot.
exampleChinese: 这只兔子正在吃胡萝卜。

meaning: adv. 还 conj. 但是
example: I haven't finished my homework yet.
exampleChinese: 我还没有完成作业。

meaning: n. 德国
example: Germany is famous for its rich history.
exampleChinese: 德国以其悠久的历史而闻名。

meaning: n. 裁判员 v. 仲裁
example: The referee blew the whistle to stop the game.
exampleChinese: 裁判员吹哨暂停了比赛。

meaning: n. 警察，警员
example: A policeman helped the lost child find his mother.
exampleChinese: 一名警察帮助走失的孩子找到了他的妈妈。

meaning: adj. 正常的 n. 正常
example: It is normal to feel nervous before a test.
exampleChinese: 考试前感到紧张是正常的。

meaning: n. 两个 adj. 两个的 num. 二
example: Two students answered the question correctly.
exampleChinese: 两名学生正确回答了这个问题。

meaning: n. 逗号
example: Please put a comma after this word.
exampleChinese: 请在这个单词后面加一个逗号。

meaning: n. 对 v. 结合
example: A couple sat quietly by the window.
exampleChinese: 一对夫妻安静地坐在窗边。

meaning: pron. 我们的
example: These books are ours.
exampleChinese: 这些书是我们的。

meaning: v. 烹调，煮 n. 厨师
example: My father can cook simple meals.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸会做简单的饭菜。

meaning: adj. 苗条的 v. 使…体重减轻
example: The dress makes her look slim.
exampleChinese: 这条连衣裙让她看起来很苗条。

meaning: v. 记住，背熟
example: We must memorize these new words before the test.
exampleChinese: 我们必须在考试前把这些新单词记住。

meaning: v. 复制 n. 副本
example: Please make a copy of this page.
exampleChinese: 请把这一页复印一份。

meaning: adj. 薄的 v. 使瘦 adv. 稀疏地
example: The ice on the lake is very thin.
exampleChinese: 湖上的冰非常薄。

meaning: n. 九月
example: Our new term starts in September.
exampleChinese: 我们的新学期在九月开始。

meaning: v. 燃烧 n. 灼伤，烧伤
example: Be careful not to burn the toast.
exampleChinese: 小心别把吐司烤糊了。

meaning: adv. 在旁边 prep. 在……旁边
example: She stood alongside her best friend in the photo.
exampleChinese: 照片里她站在最好的朋友旁边。

meaning: n. 教育家
example: The educator gave the class a clear lesson.
exampleChinese: 这位教育家给全班上了一堂清晰的课。

meaning: n. 薄片，纸张 v. 覆盖 adj. 片状的
example: He wrote the answer on a sheet of paper.
exampleChinese: 他把答案写在一张纸上。

meaning: n. 行李
example: Please put your baggage on the cart.
exampleChinese: 请把你的行李放到推车上。

meaning: n. 摔跤
example: The boys wrestle after school on the mat.
exampleChinese: 男孩们放学后在垫子上摔跤。

meaning: n. 考试成绩 v. 得分（score的第三人称单数形式）
example: Her scores improved after she studied harder.
exampleChinese: 她更加努力学习后，成绩提高了。

meaning: adv. 否则 adj. 另外的 conj. 其他
example: Hurry up, otherwise we will miss the bus.
exampleChinese: 快点，否则我们会错过公交车。

meaning: adj. 积极的 n. 主动语态
example: She is active in class and asks many questions.
exampleChinese: 她在课堂上很积极，还会问很多问题。

meaning: v. 连接
example: Please connect the printer to the computer.
exampleChinese: 请把打印机连接到电脑上。

meaning: n. 桶，水桶 v. 倾盆而下
example: He carried the water in a bucket.
exampleChinese: 他用一个水桶装水。

meaning: n. 篮球
example: We play basketball after school.
exampleChinese: 我们放学后打篮球。

meaning: v. 贷
example: Could you lend me your ruler for a minute?
exampleChinese: 你能把你的尺子借给我一分钟吗？

meaning: n. 蘑菇，伞菌 adj. 蘑菇的 v. 迅速增加
example: Mushroom soup is my favorite lunch.
exampleChinese: 蘑菇汤是我最喜欢的午餐。

meaning: adj. 二手的 adv. 间接地
example: I bought a secondhand bike from my cousin.
exampleChinese: 我从表哥那里买了一辆二手自行车。

meaning: n. 神 vt. 膜拜
example: In the story, the sea god protects the island.
exampleChinese: 在这个故事里，海神保护着这座岛。

meaning: n. 纪念品
example: We bought souvenirs for our family.
exampleChinese: 我们给家人买了纪念品。

meaning: v. 旋转 vt. 纺纱
example: The wheel started to spin quickly.
exampleChinese: 轮子开始快速旋转。

meaning: n. 橡胶 adj. 橡胶制成的 v. 涂橡胶于
example: This ball is made of rubber.
exampleChinese: 这个球是橡胶制成的。

meaning: adv. 真诚地
example: Thank you sincerely for your help.
exampleChinese: 真诚地感谢你的帮助。

meaning: n. 接待
example: We waited at the hotel reception.
exampleChinese: 我们在酒店接待处等候。

meaning: n. 酱油 v. 使增加趣味
example: This pasta tastes better with tomato sauce.
exampleChinese: 这意大利面配番茄沙司更好吃。

meaning: n. 地点 v. 认出 adj. 现场的
example: This spot under the tree is nice for a picnic.
exampleChinese: 树下这个地方很适合野餐。

meaning: n. 五，五个 adj. 五的
example: There are five apples on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有五个苹果。

meaning: n. 劳动力
example: The company needs more workers in its workforce.
exampleChinese: 这家公司需要更多劳动力。

meaning: n. 观念
example: She explained the concept with a simple drawing.
exampleChinese: 她用一幅简单的图画解释了这个观念。

meaning: v. 钓鱼 n. 角度
example: He tried to angle the hook toward the fish.
exampleChinese: 他试着把鱼钩朝鱼那边引。

meaning: adj. 垂直的，直立的 n. 垂直线
example: The shelf must stay vertical to hold the books.
exampleChinese: 书架必须保持垂直才能承受这些书。

meaning: v. 确保，保证
example: We must insure that every door is locked.
exampleChinese: 我们必须确保每扇门都上锁了。

meaning: n. 咖啡
example: My dad drinks coffee every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爸爸每天早上都喝咖啡。

meaning: n. 气体 v. 加油
example: The car ran out of gas on the highway.
exampleChinese: 汽车在高速公路上没油了。

meaning: n. 镭（88号元素符号Ra）
example: Scientists once studied radium carefully in laboratories.
exampleChinese: 科学家过去曾在实验室里仔细研究镭。

meaning: v. 开车 n. 驱动器
example: My uncle will drive us to the station.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔会开车送我们去车站。

meaning: v. 吻 vt. 吻， 亲吻
example: The baby tried to kiss her mother.
exampleChinese: 那个宝宝试着亲吻她的妈妈。

meaning: v. 出席
example: I will attend the meeting after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我会出席会议。

meaning: n. 设备，装备
example: The campers checked their equipment before the hike.
exampleChinese: 徒步前，露营者检查了他们的装备。

meaning: n. 女主角
example: The heroine saved the village at the end of the story.
exampleChinese: 故事结尾，女主角拯救了那个村庄。

meaning: n. 先生
example: That gentleman held the door for us.
exampleChinese: 那位先生为我们扶住了门。

meaning: n. 困难
example: She had difficulty opening the jar.
exampleChinese: 她打开那个罐子有困难。

meaning: v. 跟随
example: The little dog likes to follow me home.
exampleChinese: 那只小狗喜欢跟着我回家。

meaning: pron. 他（宾格）
example: I saw him at the school gate.
exampleChinese: 我在校门口看见了他。

meaning: adj. 陈旧的，古老的 n. 古时
example: The old bridge is still strong.
exampleChinese: 这座古老的桥仍然很坚固。

meaning: adj. 大的 adv. 大量地
example: They live in a big house near the park.
exampleChinese: 他们住在公园附近的一所大房子里。

meaning: adv. 无论如何，不管怎样
example: I was tired, but I went anyway.
exampleChinese: 我很累，但我还是去了。

meaning: n. 鱼苗 v. 油炸
example: My mother will fry the fish for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭会煎鱼。

meaning: n. 承诺，保证
example: Her hard work showed great commitment to the team.
exampleChinese: 她的努力体现了对团队的坚定承诺。

meaning: v. 站立 vt. 承担
example: Please stand near the window.
exampleChinese: 请站在窗户旁边。

meaning: n. 澳大利亚
example: My uncle moved to Australia last year.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔去年搬到了澳大利亚。

meaning: v. 恢复 n. 还原至预备姿势 vi. 痊愈
example: He needs time to recover after the long illness.
exampleChinese: 他在长时间生病后需要时间恢复。

meaning: n. 品脱
example: Please buy a pint of milk on your way home.
exampleChinese: 请你回家路上买一品脱牛奶。

meaning: n. 狼 v. 大吃
example: The wolf disappeared into the dark forest.
exampleChinese: 那只狼消失在黑暗的森林里。

meaning: n. 动物，生物
example: The panda is a gentle creature.
exampleChinese: 熊猫是一种温和的生物。

meaning: n. 句子，命题 v. 判决
example: Please write one sentence about your family.
exampleChinese: 请写一个关于你家庭的句子。

meaning: n. 街道 adj. 街道的
example: There is a small cafe on this street.
exampleChinese: 这条街上有一家小咖啡馆。

meaning: v. 使闪光 n. 闪光，闪现 adj. 闪光的
example: A flash lit up the sky during the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨期间，一道闪光照亮了天空。

meaning: n. 平等
example: The class discussed equality and fair treatment.
exampleChinese: 全班讨论了平等和公平对待。

meaning: v. 叙述
example: Can you relate the story in your own words?
exampleChinese: 你能用自己的话叙述这个故事吗？

meaning: n. 独立性，自立性
example: The country values independence and self-reliance.
exampleChinese: 这个国家重视独立性和自立性。

meaning: adv. 欣然地
example: She willingly helped me clean the classroom.
exampleChinese: 她欣然帮我打扫了教室。

meaning: adj. 基本的 n. 基础
example: We learned the basic rules first.
exampleChinese: 我们先学了基本规则。

meaning: v. 由…组成
example: Our breakfast usually consist of eggs and toast.
exampleChinese: 我们的早餐通常由鸡蛋和吐司组成。

meaning: n. 国土 v. 使…登陆
example: The pilot will land the plane at noon.
exampleChinese: 飞行员将在中午让飞机降落。

meaning: n. 用户
example: Every user must create a strong password.
exampleChinese: 每个用户都必须创建一个强密码。

meaning: n. 头脑，智力 v. 猛击…的头部
example: Regular reading is good for the brain.
exampleChinese: 经常阅读对大脑有好处。

meaning: n. 选择 adj. 精选的
example: It was a hard choice between the two books.
exampleChinese: 在这两本书之间做选择很难。

meaning: v. 介绍
example: Let me introduce my new classmate.
exampleChinese: 让我来介绍一下我的新同学。

meaning: v. 骑马 n. 骑
example: I ride my bike to the park on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我周末骑自行车去公园。

meaning: v. 传播，流传 vt. 使流通
example: People circulate the rumor very quickly online.
exampleChinese: 人们在网上很快就传播了这个谣言。

meaning: n. 人
example: Each person got a free ticket.
exampleChinese: 每个人都得到了一张免费票。

meaning: n. 苗圃
example: The nursery has many young trees and flowers.
exampleChinese: 苗圃里有许多小树和花。

meaning: n. 致意 v. 视为
example: She sent her regards to our teacher after the trip.
exampleChinese: 旅行结束后，她向我们的老师致意。

meaning: n. 邮递员
example: The postman brought a letter this morning.
exampleChinese: 邮递员今天早上送来了一封信。

meaning: adj. 怀疑的
example: He was sceptical about the new plan at first.
exampleChinese: 起初他对这个新计划持怀疑态度。

meaning: adj. 残酷的，残忍的
example: It was cruel to laugh at the lost child.
exampleChinese: 嘲笑那个走失的孩子很残忍。

meaning: v. 似乎
example: He doesn't seem tired today.
exampleChinese: 他今天似乎不累。

meaning: v. 使用 n. 进入
example: Students can access the library with their cards.
exampleChinese: 学生可以用卡进入图书馆。

meaning: n. 声明
example: The company released a short statement this morning.
exampleChinese: 公司今天早上发布了一份简短的声明。

meaning: adj. 模糊不清的
example: The instructions were ambiguous, so we asked for help.
exampleChinese: 说明很模糊，所以我们去寻求帮助。

meaning: n. 岛 adj. 岛的 vt. 孤立
example: The small island is full of birds.
exampleChinese: 这座小岛上满是鸟。

meaning: n. 蜂蜜 adj. 甘美的 v. 对…说甜言蜜语
example: She put honey in her tea.
exampleChinese: 她在茶里加了蜂蜜。

meaning: adv. 无论什么地方 conj. 无论在哪里
example: Wherever you go, take your umbrella with you.
exampleChinese: 无论你去哪里，都要带上雨伞。

meaning: adv. 是, 是的 n. 是（表示肯定）
example: She smiled and said yes.
exampleChinese: 她笑着说是的。

meaning: adj. 喘不过气来的
example: After the race, I was breathless and needed water.
exampleChinese: 跑完比赛后，我喘不过气来，需要喝水。

meaning: n. 高尔夫球 v. 打高尔夫球
example: He likes to golf with his grandfather on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢周末和祖父一起打高尔夫球。

meaning: n. 危险
example: The thin ice is a real danger.
exampleChinese: 薄冰是真正的危险。

meaning: n. 兴趣，爱好 v. 使……感兴趣 vt. 使产生兴趣
example: Music can interest young children.
exampleChinese: 音乐可以使小孩子感兴趣。

meaning: adj. 燃烧的 v. 燃烧
example: The flaming campfire warmed us on the cold night.
exampleChinese: 熊熊燃烧的营火在寒冷的夜晚给我们带来了温暖。

meaning: adj. 暂时的 n. 临时工
example: This is only a temporary job for the summer.
exampleChinese: 这只是一份夏天的临时工作。

meaning: v. 完成
example: We worked hard to accomplish our goal on time.
exampleChinese: 我们努力工作，按时完成了目标。

meaning: adj. 愚蠢的 n. 傻瓜
example: It was stupid to leave my bag there.
exampleChinese: 把我的包落在那里真是太愚蠢了。

meaning: v. 粘合 n. 胶
example: Use glue to fix the torn page back in the book.
exampleChinese: 用胶把撕破的页面粘回书里。

meaning: n. 运动 v. 锻炼
example: I exercise for thirty minutes every morning.
exampleChinese: 我每天早上锻炼三十分钟。

meaning: n. 胜利者
example: The winner held up the gold cup.
exampleChinese: 获胜者举起了金杯。

meaning: v. 夹入 n. 三明治
example: I ate a sandwich for lunch.
exampleChinese: 我午饭吃了一个三明治。

meaning: n. 堆
example: There was a heap of books on the desk.
exampleChinese: 桌子上有一堆书。

meaning: n. 趋势，倾向 v. 趋向
example: Many stores trend toward online sales now.
exampleChinese: 现在许多商店都趋向于在线销售。

meaning: n. 地窖 vt. 把…藏入地窖
example: Grandpa kept old photos in the cellar.
exampleChinese: 爷爷把旧照片藏在地窖里。

meaning: n. 访问者，参观者
example: Every visitor must sign their name here.
exampleChinese: 每位来访者都必须在这里签名。

meaning: n. 种子 v. 播种
example: Farmers seed the field in early spring.
exampleChinese: 农民在早春给田地播种。

meaning: adv. 出现 adj. 外面的 n. 出局
example: The stars came out after the rain stopped.
exampleChinese: 雨停后，星星出来了。
