example: Her appreciation of music grew after the concert.
exampleChinese: 看完音乐会后，她对音乐的欣赏能力提高了。

meaning: n. 主席，会长
example: The chairman opened the meeting on time.
exampleChinese: 主席准时宣布会议开始。

meaning: n. 褐雨燕 adj. 快的 adv. 迅速地
example: The swift bird flew across the river.
exampleChinese: 那只褐雨燕飞过了河。

meaning: n. 厕所
example: Please show me where the lavatory is.
exampleChinese: 请告诉我洗手间在哪里。

meaning: v. 判断 n. 法官
example: You should judge the result by the facts.
exampleChinese: 你应该根据事实来判断结果。

meaning: adj. 艰苦的，困难的 n. 恶棍 v. 坚持
example: The hike was tough, but we finished it.
exampleChinese: 这次徒步很艰苦，但我们完成了。

meaning: n. 生物化学
example: She wants to study biochemistry at university.
exampleChinese: 她想在大学学习生物化学。

meaning: adj. 钝的 v. 使迟钝
example: The movie was dull, so I almost fell asleep.
exampleChinese: 这部电影很乏味，所以我差点睡着了。

meaning: n. 国王 vi. 统治 vt. 立…为王
example: The king lived in a large stone castle.
exampleChinese: 国王住在一座巨大的石头城堡里。

meaning: n. 撞碎 v. 摔碎
example: The car will crash if the road is too slippery.
exampleChinese: 如果路面太滑，汽车就会撞毁。

meaning: n. 教堂 adj. 教会的 v. 领…到教堂接受宗教仪式
example: The old church stands near the river.
exampleChinese: 那座古老的教堂矗立在河边。

meaning: n. 语言
example: English is an international language.
exampleChinese: 英语是一种国际语言。

meaning: n. 边界
example: A white line marked the boundary of the field.
exampleChinese: 一条白线标出了球场的边界。

meaning: v. 欺骗 n. 欺骗，作弊
example: Do not cheat in the exam.
exampleChinese: 考试时不要作弊。

meaning: n. 可可粉
example: He drank a cup of cocoa before bed.
exampleChinese: 他睡前喝了一杯可可粉。

meaning: n. 想法
example: That is a great idea.
exampleChinese: 那是个很棒的想法。

meaning: v. 爬
example: The kids love to climb trees in the park.
exampleChinese: 孩子们喜欢在公园里爬树。

meaning: v. 使心烦 adj. 心烦的 n. 混乱
example: She felt upset after losing her keys.
exampleChinese: 丢了钥匙后，她感到很苦恼。

meaning: n. 星期四
example: Our music class is on Thursday.
exampleChinese: 我们的音乐课在星期四。

meaning: n. 性能
example: The new phone has better performance.
exampleChinese: 这部新手机的性能更好。

meaning: v. 呼吁，恳求 n. 呼吁，请求
example: She made an appeal for help after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，她发出了求助请求。

meaning: adj. 国家的 n. 国民
example: The national flag is flying above the school.
exampleChinese: 国旗正在学校上空飘扬。

meaning: n. 插座 vt. 给…配插座
example: The lamp was not working because the socket was broken.
exampleChinese: 台灯不亮了，因为插座坏了。

meaning: n. 夜贼
example: The burglar entered through the back door.
exampleChinese: 夜贼从后门闯了进来。

meaning: n. 所有者
example: The owner of the shop knows my father.
exampleChinese: 这家商店的所有者认识我父亲。

meaning: v. 发展
example: The town will grow as more families move in.
exampleChinese: 随着更多家庭搬来，这个城镇会发展起来。

meaning: adj. 美丽的
example: The garden looks beautiful in spring.
exampleChinese: 花园在春天看起来很美丽。

meaning: adj. 凶猛的
example: The fierce dog barked at the gate.
exampleChinese: 那只凶猛的狗在大门口叫。

meaning: adj. 徒步的 n. 行人
example: The pedestrian waited for the light to turn green.
exampleChinese: 那位行人等着绿灯亮起。

meaning: n. 法院 v. 招致（失败、危险等）
example: The court will hear the case tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 法院将于明天审理这个案件。

meaning: n. 羽毛球
example: We played badminton after school.
exampleChinese: 我们放学后打了羽毛球。

meaning: n. 邮箱
example: I dropped the letter into the postbox.
exampleChinese: 我把信投入了邮箱。

meaning: n. 照片
example: I put your photo on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我把你的照片放在我的桌子上。

meaning: n. 洋葱
example: She chopped an onion for the soup.
exampleChinese: 她切了一个洋葱做汤。

meaning: n. 肉，肉类（食用）
example: We had meat and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚饭吃了肉和米饭。

meaning: n. 大西洋 adj. 大西洋的
example: They sailed across the Atlantic last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天他们航行穿越了大西洋。

meaning: n. 航行
example: The voyage took three weeks across the sea.
exampleChinese: 这次航行横跨大海花了三周。

meaning: adj. 卓越的
example: She did an excellent job on the project.
exampleChinese: 她在这个项目上做得非常出色。

meaning: n. 电报机 v. 电汇
example: The captain used the telegraph to send a message.
exampleChinese: 船长用电报机发送了一条消息。

meaning: n. 突破
example: The new battery was a major breakthrough.
exampleChinese: 这块新电池是一次重大突破。

meaning: n. 原因 v. 引起 vt. 促使
example: Too much rain can cause flooding.
exampleChinese: 过多的雨水会引起洪水。

meaning: n. 交换 v. 与交换
example: We made a swap of seats after lunch.
exampleChinese: 午饭后我们交换了座位。

meaning: adj. 神经的
example: I felt nervous before my speech.
exampleChinese: 演讲前我感到很紧张。

meaning: adj. 彻底的
example: Please read the instructions carefully and be thorough.
exampleChinese: 请仔细阅读说明，并做到彻底。

meaning: n. 密封
example: Please seal the bag before you put it away.
exampleChinese: 请先把袋子密封好再收起来。

meaning: n. 组织 v. 饰以薄纱
example: This tissue is too thin to use as a bandage.
exampleChinese: 这种纸巾太薄，不能当绷带用。

meaning: v. 使潮湿 n. 潮湿 adj. 潮湿的
example: The floor was damp after the rain.
exampleChinese: 下雨后，地板是潮湿的。

meaning: v. 谴责
example: Many people condemn violence.
exampleChinese: 许多人谴责暴力。

meaning: n. 哈欠 v. 打哈欠
example: She gave a big yawn before bed.
exampleChinese: 她在睡前打了一个大哈欠。

meaning: n. （一个地区全部的）生物
example: Biology is her favorite subject this term.
exampleChinese: 生物学是她这学期最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 公告
example: The announcement was posted on the school door.
exampleChinese: 公告贴在了学校门口。

meaning: v. 惩罚
example: Teachers should not punish students unfairly.
exampleChinese: 老师不应该不公平地惩罚学生。

meaning: n. 陆军
example: Her brother joined the army at eighteen.
exampleChinese: 她哥哥十八岁时参了军。

meaning: n. 饿，饥饿 v. 渴望
example: After the long hike, we all felt hunger.
exampleChinese: 长途步行后，我们都感到饥饿。

meaning: n. 女商人
example: The businesswoman opened a new store downtown.
exampleChinese: 那位女商人在市中心开了一家新店。

meaning: adv. 很好地 adj. 良好的 n. 井
example: She sings well even without a microphone.
exampleChinese: 即使没有麦克风，她也唱得很好。

meaning: n. 飞机
example: The airplane landed safely in the rain.
exampleChinese: 飞机在雨中安全降落了。

meaning: n. 老板 v. 指挥，调遣
example: My boss asked me to finish the report today.
exampleChinese: 我的老板让我今天完成这份报告。

meaning: adj. 温暖的 v. 同情 n. 取暖
example: The sun feels warm on my face.
exampleChinese: 阳光照在我脸上，感觉很温暖。

meaning: n. 数字 v. 计算
example: I can't figure the answer without a calculator.
exampleChinese: 没有计算器，我算不出答案。

meaning: n. 条件 v. 决定
example: A good condition for joining the team is regular practice.
exampleChinese: 加入这个队的一个好条件是定期训练。

meaning: n. 公共汽车
example: We take the bus to school every day.
exampleChinese: 我们每天坐公共汽车去上学。

meaning: n. 作品
example: Her works are displayed in the museum.
exampleChinese: 她的作品陈列在博物馆里。

meaning: n. 交易 v. 讨价还价
example: We made a bargain for the last bike.
exampleChinese: 我们就最后一辆自行车讨价还价。

meaning: adj. 动态的 n. 动态
example: The app has a dynamic layout that changes with the screen.
exampleChinese: 这个应用有一个会随屏幕变化的动态布局。

meaning: n. 歌曲
example: This song makes me feel happy.
exampleChinese: 这首歌曲让我感到快乐。

meaning: n. 目标 vi. 攻门
example: My goal is to learn English well.
exampleChinese: 我的目标是学好英语。

meaning: n. 粮食 v. 成谷粒
example: The field is full of grain.
exampleChinese: 田里长满了粮食。

meaning: v. 加 n. 加法
example: Add some sugar to the tea.
exampleChinese: 在茶里加一些糖。

meaning: adj. 第一的 n. 总理
example: The premier opened the new hospital today.
exampleChinese: 总理今天为这家新医院揭幕。

meaning: v. 饿死
example: Without water, the plants will starve.
exampleChinese: 没有水，这些植物会饿死。

meaning: pron. 他自己
example: He made the model airplane himself.
exampleChinese: 他自己做了这架飞机模型。

meaning: n. 馅饼 vt. 使杂乱
example: Grandma baked an apple pie for dessert.
exampleChinese: 奶奶烤了一个苹果馅饼当甜点。

meaning: n. 奴隶 v. 苦干
example: The children were forced to slave all day in the fields.
exampleChinese: 孩子们被迫在田里整天苦干。

meaning: n. 十二月
example: School ends in late December.
exampleChinese: 学校在十二月下旬放假。

meaning: n. 预算 v. 安排，预定 adj. 廉价的
example: We set a small budget for the school trip.
exampleChinese: 我们为学校旅行设了一个小预算。

meaning: n. 晚餐，晚宴
example: We had fish and rice for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐吃了鱼和米饭。

meaning: n. 耐性，耐心
example: She showed great patience while teaching the child to read.
exampleChinese: 她教孩子读书时表现出极大的耐心。

meaning: aux. 应该 modal verb. 应当
example: You should drink more water.
exampleChinese: 你应该多喝水。

meaning: adj. 错误的 v. 弄错（mistake的过去分词）
example: I was mistaken about the time of the meeting.
exampleChinese: 我把会议时间弄错了。

meaning: v. 调整，使…适合
example: Please adjust your seat so you can see the screen.
exampleChinese: 请调整一下你的座位，这样你就能看清屏幕。

meaning: n. 拥有
example: The bike is now in my possession.
exampleChinese: 这辆自行车现在归我所有。

meaning: n. 毛毯，毯子 adj. 总括的，全体的 v. 覆盖，掩盖
example: She wrapped herself in a warm blanket.
exampleChinese: 她把自己裹在一条温暖的毯子里。

meaning: adj. 惭愧的，感到难为情的
example: He felt ashamed after lying to his friend.
exampleChinese: 他对自己对朋友撒谎感到惭愧。

meaning: adj. 拥挤的 v. 拥挤（crowd的过去分词）
example: The bus station was crowded this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上公交车站很拥挤。

meaning: n. 长时间 adj. 长的 v. 渴望
example: I long to see my grandparents again.
exampleChinese: 我渴望再次见到我的祖父母。

meaning: n. 回顾 vt. 复习
example: Before the test, I did a quick review of my notes.
exampleChinese: 考试前，我快速回顾了一下笔记。

meaning: v. 发出光 n. 光亮，光泽
example: The sun began to shine through the clouds.
exampleChinese: 太阳开始穿过云层照耀。

meaning: v. 使摆脱 vt. 使…摆脱
example: I want to rid my room of old junk.
exampleChinese: 我想把房间里的旧杂物清理掉。

meaning: v. 学习 vi. 学，学习
example: I want to learn how to swim this summer.
exampleChinese: 我想在今年夏天学习游泳。

meaning: n. 不一致
example: There was a disagreement about the rules.
exampleChinese: 关于规则，大家意见不一致。

meaning: v. 浪费 vt. 失去
example: Be careful not to lose your keys.
exampleChinese: 小心别把钥匙弄丢了。

meaning: v. 授予…学位 n. 研究生 adj. 毕业的
example: She will graduate from college next year.
exampleChinese: 她明年将从大学毕业。

meaning: pron. 每个人
example: Everybody smiled at the good news.
exampleChinese: 每个人听到这个好消息都笑了。

meaning: v. 描述，形容 vt. 描写
example: Can you describe your new teacher?
exampleChinese: 你能描述一下你的新老师吗？

meaning: adv. 特别
example: I especially like this picture.
exampleChinese: 我特别喜欢这张图片。

meaning: n. 星期二
example: We have art class on Tuesday.
exampleChinese: 我们星期二有美术课。

meaning: n. 十字路口
example: We stopped at the crossroads to check the map.
exampleChinese: 我们在十字路口停下来查看地图。

meaning: adv. 快
example: The bus will be here soon.
exampleChinese: 公交车很快就会到。

meaning: v. 检查
example: The teacher will inspect our science project.
exampleChinese: 老师会检查我们的科学项目。

meaning: n. 保护
example: Helmets give riders extra protection.
exampleChinese: 头盔能给骑车人额外的保护。

meaning: v. 使固定
example: Fasten your seat belt before the car starts.
exampleChinese: 汽车启动前，请系好安全带。

meaning: adv. 深刻地
example: The lesson was deeply meaningful to me.
exampleChinese: 这堂课对我意义深远。

meaning: n. 油轮
example: The tanker moved slowly through the harbor.
exampleChinese: 油轮缓缓驶过港口。

meaning: n. 狮子
example: The lion slept in the shade.
exampleChinese: 狮子在阴凉处睡觉。

meaning: n. 技能，技巧
example: Cooking is a useful skill.
exampleChinese: 做饭是一项有用的技能。

meaning: adj. 熟悉的 n. 常客
example: This song sounds familiar to me.
exampleChinese: 这首歌我听着很熟悉。

meaning: n. 沉默 v. 使沉默 int. 安静！
example: The room fell into silence after the bell rang.
exampleChinese: 铃响后，房间里陷入了沉默。

meaning: v. 发送，寄 n. 上升运动 vt. 打发， 派遣
example: I will send the letter tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会寄这封信。

meaning: n. 生日，诞辰
example: We made a cake for Mom's birthday.
exampleChinese: 我们为妈妈的生日做了一个蛋糕。

meaning: n. 比较 v. 比拟，喻为
example: It is hard to compare the two paintings.
exampleChinese: 很难比较这两幅画。

meaning: n. 病
example: His illness kept him in bed.
exampleChinese: 他的病让他卧床不起。

meaning: adj. 普遍的 n. 一般概念
example: Water is universal in every country.
exampleChinese: 水在每个国家都普遍存在。

meaning: v. 出现 vi. 起来， 升起
example: New questions will arise in the discussion.
exampleChinese: 讨论中会出现新的问题。

meaning: n. 理由 v. 推论
example: The main reason for the delay was heavy rain.
exampleChinese: 延误的主要原因是大雨。

meaning: n. 照片，图画 v. 画
example: She drew a picture of her house.
exampleChinese: 她画了一张自己房子的图画。

meaning: v. 缺乏
example: We lack time to finish the project today.
exampleChinese: 我们今天缺乏时间完成这个项目。

meaning: n. 西方人，欧美人
example: As a westerner, she enjoyed trying local food.
exampleChinese: 作为一名西方人，她喜欢尝试当地食物。

meaning: conj. 除非 prep. 除…之外
example: You will miss the bus unless you hurry.
exampleChinese: 除非你快点，否则你会错过公交车。

meaning: adj. 每天的 n. 平时
example: Walking is part of my everyday routine.
exampleChinese: 散步是我日常生活的一部分。

meaning: n. 礼物 v. 赋予
example: This gift is for your birthday.
exampleChinese: 这份礼物是送给你生日的。

meaning: n. 肥皂 v. 将肥皂涂在……上
example: He used soap to wash his hands.
exampleChinese: 他用肥皂洗手。

meaning: n. 绘画 v. 绘画（paint的ing形式）
example: Her painting hangs in the school hallway.
exampleChinese: 她的绘画挂在学校走廊里。

meaning: n. 发展 v. 提出 adj. 预先的
example: The company plans to advance next year.
exampleChinese: 这家公司计划在明年发展。

meaning: n. 性 v. 引起…的性欲
example: The film does not include sex scenes.
exampleChinese: 这部电影没有性场景。

meaning: n. 雷暴
example: A strong thunderstorm hit the city at night.
exampleChinese: 一场强雷暴在夜里袭击了这座城市。

meaning: n. 特权 v. 给与…特权
example: She had the privilege of meeting the writer.
exampleChinese: 她有幸见到了那位作家。

meaning: adj. 个人的 n. 人事消息栏
example: Please keep your personal diary private.
exampleChinese: 请把你的私人日记保密。

meaning: n. 介绍
example: His introduction was short and clear.
exampleChinese: 他的介绍简短而清楚。

meaning: v. 在…上铺地毯，把地毯铺在…上 n. 地毯
example: We will carpet the room before winter.
exampleChinese: 我们会在冬天前给这个房间铺上地毯。

meaning: n. 化学
example: Chemistry is my favorite science subject.
exampleChinese: 化学是我最喜欢的理科科目。

meaning: v. 听到，听
example: Can you hear the birds outside the window?
exampleChinese: 你能听见窗外的鸟叫声吗？

meaning: v. 使化合 n. 联合收割机
example: We can combine sugar and water in this cup.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把糖和水混合在这个杯子里。

meaning: adj. 有臭味的
example: The garbage bag smells smelly.
exampleChinese: 这个垃圾袋闻起来有臭味。

meaning: n. 旅游业
example: Tourism is important to this small town.
exampleChinese: 旅游业对这个小镇很重要。

meaning: n. 日本（东亚国家名）
example: My uncle works in Japan now.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔现在在日本工作。

meaning: n. 喜爱，感情
example: He showed great affection for his little sister.
exampleChinese: 他对小妹妹表现出很深的喜爱。

meaning: n. 蝗虫
example: The locust ate the young leaves.
exampleChinese: 那只蝗虫吃掉了嫩叶。

meaning: v. 控告，指控 vt. 控告
example: The driver will accuse the company of cheating.
exampleChinese: 这位司机将指控这家公司作弊。

meaning: n. 横梁 v. 发送
example: A steel beam supports the roof.
exampleChinese: 一根钢横梁支撑着屋顶。

meaning: v. 使局促不安 vt. 使困窘
example: Please do not embarrass me in front of the class.
exampleChinese: 请不要在全班面前让我难堪。

meaning: n. 商人
example: The businessman signed the contract yesterday.
exampleChinese: 那位商人昨天签了合同。

meaning: n. 蝙蝠 v. 用球棒击球
example: The bat flew out of the cave at dusk.
exampleChinese: 蝙蝠在黄昏时飞出了洞穴。

meaning: adj. 英国人的 n. 英语 vt. 把…译成英语
example: English is my favorite subject at school.
exampleChinese: 英语是我在学校最喜欢的科目。

meaning: n. 参考，参照 v. 引用
example: The teacher asked for a reference from my last school.
exampleChinese: 老师要了一封我上一所学校的推荐信。

meaning: n. 啤酒 vi. 喝啤酒
example: He likes to drink beer with friends on weekends.
exampleChinese: 他喜欢周末和朋友一起喝啤酒。

meaning: adj. 公众的 n. 公众
example: The park is open to the public on weekends.
exampleChinese: 这个公园周末向公众开放。

meaning: v. 呼吸
example: It was hard to breathe in the smoky room.
exampleChinese: 在那个烟雾弥漫的房间里很难呼吸。

meaning: n. 茄子 adj. 深紫色的
example: We cooked eggplant for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐做了茄子。

meaning: n. 堂兄弟姊妹
example: My cousin visits us every summer.
exampleChinese: 我的堂兄弟姐妹每年夏天都会来看我们。

meaning: v. 推动，增加 n. 推，决心
example: Please push the door gently.
exampleChinese: 请轻轻推门。

meaning: v. 忍受
example: We must tolerate small mistakes when we learn.
exampleChinese: 当我们学习时，必须忍受小错误。

meaning: adj. 金色的，黄金般的
example: The field turned golden in the autumn sun.
exampleChinese: 田野在秋日阳光下变成了金色。

meaning: n. 女服务员 v. 做女服务生
example: The waitress brought us soup and tea.
exampleChinese: 女服务员给我们端来了汤和茶。

meaning: adj. 高级的 n. 上司
example: My senior asked me to finish the report today.
exampleChinese: 我的上司让我今天完成报告。

meaning: adj. 错误的 adv. 欺诈地
example: The rumor was FALSE.
exampleChinese: 这个谣言是错误的。

meaning: n. 二月
example: My birthday is in February.
exampleChinese: 我的生日在二月。

meaning: n. 受难 adj. 受苦的 v. 受苦
example: The patient showed suffering after the accident.
exampleChinese: 这个病人在事故后表现出痛苦。

meaning: n. 和平
example: Everyone hopes for peace in the world.
exampleChinese: 每个人都希望世界和平。

meaning: n. 天文学家
example: An astronomer studied the stars through a telescope.
exampleChinese: 一位天文学家用望远镜研究星星。

meaning: n. 小点心
example: She ate a biscuit with her tea.
exampleChinese: 她喝茶时吃了一块小点心。

meaning: n. 重新使用 v. 再使用
example: We can reuse this box for storage.
exampleChinese: 我们可以把这个盒子重新使用来储物。

meaning: n. 绳，绳索 v. 捆，绑
example: Please tie the box with a rope.
exampleChinese: 请用绳子把这个箱子绑好。

meaning: n. 收音机 v. 用无线电进行通信
example: My grandpa listens to the radio every morning.
exampleChinese: 我爷爷每天早上听收音机。

meaning: n. 分
example: This candy costs fifty cent.
exampleChinese: 这块糖果值五十分。

meaning: n. 点心
example: The school offered refreshments after the concert.
exampleChinese: 音乐会结束后，学校提供了点心。

meaning: adj. 至关重要的
example: Sleep is vital for good health.
exampleChinese: 睡眠对健康至关重要。

meaning: n. 解决，处理
example: The settlement ended the long argument.
exampleChinese: 这个解决办法结束了这场长期争论。

meaning: n. 壶 v. 把…装罐
example: Please put the soup in the pot.
exampleChinese: 请把汤放进壶里。

meaning: n. 防风夹克
example: He wore a windbreaker on the cold morning.
exampleChinese: 他在寒冷的早晨穿了一件防风夹克。

meaning: n. 青蛙 v. 捕蛙
example: A green frog jumped into the pond.
exampleChinese: 一只绿色的青蛙跳进了池塘。

meaning: adj. 确信的 adv. 当然
example: I am sure this key opens the front door.
exampleChinese: 我确信这把钥匙能打开前门。

meaning: adj. 贫穷的
example: The poor family lived in a small house.
exampleChinese: 那个贫穷的家庭住在一间小房子里。

meaning: adj. 软的，柔软的 adv. 柔软地 n. 柔性
example: This pillow is soft and comfortable.
exampleChinese: 这个枕头又软又舒服。

meaning: adj. 相关的
example: Your question is relevant to our project.
exampleChinese: 你的问题与我们的项目相关。

meaning: n. 限制 vt. 限制， 限定
example: The school has a strict limit on phone use.
exampleChinese: 学校对手机使用有严格限制。

meaning: v. 播种 n. 母猪
example: Farmers sow seeds in spring.
exampleChinese: 农民在春天播种。

meaning: adj. 通常的，惯例的
example: He took his usual seat by the window.
exampleChinese: 他坐在窗边那个惯常的位置。

meaning: n. 爵士乐，爵士舞 v. 奏爵士乐，跳爵士舞 adj. 爵士乐的
example: My uncle listens to jazz on weekends.
exampleChinese: 我叔叔周末听爵士乐。

meaning: n. 世纪，百年
example: People in the last century traveled more slowly.
exampleChinese: 上个世纪的人出行更慢。

meaning: n. 茶叶 vt. 给…沏茶 vi. 喝茶
example: My grandma drinks tea every afternoon.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶每天下午都喝茶。

meaning: n. 角落，拐角处 v. 囤积
example: There is a small shop on the corner.
exampleChinese: 拐角处有一家小商店。

meaning: n. 小说
example: She likes reading historical fiction at night.
exampleChinese: 她喜欢在晚上读历史小说。

meaning: v. 理解
example: I understand your question now.
exampleChinese: 我现在懂你的问题了。

meaning: adj. 平均的 v. 意味 n. 平均值
example: What does this sign mean?
exampleChinese: 这个标志表示什么意思？

meaning: v. 抵抗，抗拒 n. 抗蚀剂 vt. 抵抗
example: She tried to resist the candy.
exampleChinese: 她努力抵抗糖果的诱惑。

meaning: n. 玩伴
example: My little brother is my best playmate.
exampleChinese: 我的小弟弟是我最好的玩伴。

meaning: n. 故障 v. 弄错
example: The fault was fixed before class began.
exampleChinese: 故障在上课前修好了。

meaning: n. 惊险小说
example: He read a thriller before bed.
exampleChinese: 他睡前读了一本惊险小说。

meaning: n. 消息 v. 报信，报告
example: Please message me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家后请给我报个信。

meaning: n. 主题 adj. 以奇想主题布置的
example: The theme of our class project is clean energy.
exampleChinese: 我们班级项目的主题是清洁能源。

meaning: abbr. 调频 v. （用于第一人称单数现在时） aux. （与v-ing连用构成现在进行时
example: I am ready for the test.
exampleChinese: 我准备好考试了。

meaning: n. 精确度
example: Accuracy matters in math tests.
exampleChinese: 在数学考试中，精确度很重要。

meaning: v. 激增 n. 气球 adj. 像气球般鼓起的
example: The price of eggs began to balloon last month.
exampleChinese: 鸡蛋的价格上个月开始激增。

meaning: pron. 你
example: I will help you with your homework.
exampleChinese: 我会帮你做作业。

meaning: n. 油 v. 加油
example: There is oil on the kitchen floor.
exampleChinese: 厨房地板上有油。

meaning: n. 离开
example: We said goodbye at the station before her departure.
exampleChinese: 我们在车站送别她启程前往别处。

meaning: adj. 第八的 num. 第八
example: Her birthday is on the eighth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月八日。

meaning: n. 公司
example: The corporation opened a new office in Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 这家公司在上海开设了一家新办事处。

meaning: n. 推销员
example: The salesman showed us a model of the new car.
exampleChinese: 那位推销员给我们看了新车的模型。

meaning: n. 合唱队 v. 合唱
example: The school chorus sang at the winter concert.
exampleChinese: 学校合唱队在冬季音乐会上演唱。

meaning: n. 竞争
example: The two teams are in strong competition for first place.
exampleChinese: 这两支队伍正在激烈竞争第一名。

meaning: n. 小船 v. 划船
example: The boat moved slowly across the lake.
exampleChinese: 那只小船慢慢地穿过湖面。

meaning: n. 皮，皮子 v. 用毛皮覆盖
example: The coat was lined with soft fur.
exampleChinese: 这件外套里衬着柔软的毛皮。

meaning: n. 助理教练
example: The trainer gave the team helpful advice.
exampleChinese: 助理教练给了球队很有帮助的建议。

meaning: v. 鼓励，怂恿 vt. 鼓励
example: Her teacher will encourage her to try again.
exampleChinese: 她的老师会鼓励她再试一次。

meaning: n. 公路，马路 vt. （狗）沿臭迹追逐（猎物） adj. （美）巡回的
example: There are many trees along this road.
exampleChinese: 这条马路两旁有很多树。

meaning: n. 惩罚
example: His late arrival brought punishment from the teacher.
exampleChinese: 他迟到受到了老师的惩罚。

meaning: n. 地方 v. 放置
example: Please place the cup on the table.
exampleChinese: 请把杯子放在桌子上。

meaning: n. 停车 adj. 停车的 v. 停车（park的ing形式）
example: Parking is not allowed on this street.
exampleChinese: 这条街不允许停车。

meaning: n. 机械，机器 v. 用机器制造
example: This machine can wash clothes quickly.
exampleChinese: 这台机器可以很快洗衣服。

meaning: v. 告诉，说
example: Please tell me your new phone number.
exampleChinese: 请告诉我你的新电话号码。

meaning: v. 想 adj. 思想的
example: I think this answer is correct.
exampleChinese: 我认为这个答案是对的。

meaning: adj. 附近的 adv. 在附近 prep. 在…附近
example: There is a nearby shop that sells snacks.
exampleChinese: 附近有一家卖零食的商店。

meaning: adj. 人的 n. 人
example: A human needs water to live.
exampleChinese: 人类生存需要水。

meaning: n. 范围 v. （在内）变动
example: The price range for the shoes is very wide.
exampleChinese: 这双鞋的价格范围很大。

meaning: adj. 复杂的 n. 复合体
example: The machine has a complex design.
exampleChinese: 这台机器的设计很复杂。

meaning: n. 发烧，发热 vt. 使发烧 vi. 发烧
example: He stayed home because he had a fever.
exampleChinese: 他因为发烧而待在家里。

meaning: adj. 皇家的 n. 王室
example: We visited the royal palace last summer.
exampleChinese: 去年夏天我们参观了王宫。

meaning: adj. 勇敢的 v. 勇敢地面对 n. 勇士
example: The brave girl spoke up first.
exampleChinese: 那个勇敢的女孩第一个发言。

meaning: v. 灌溉
example: Farmers irrigate the fields in the dry season.
exampleChinese: 农民在旱季给田地灌溉。

meaning: v. 遗弃 n. 沙漠 adj. 沙漠的
example: No one should desert a friend in trouble.
exampleChinese: 谁也不该在朋友有困难时抛弃他。

meaning: adj. 城市的
example: More people are moving to urban areas.
exampleChinese: 越来越多的人正在迁往城市地区。

meaning: adj. 辉煌的
example: The sunset over the lake was splendid.
exampleChinese: 湖上的落日辉煌而美丽。

meaning: n. 亚洲人 adj. 亚洲的
example: She is an Asian student in our class.
exampleChinese: 她是我们班的一名亚洲学生。

meaning: n. 交谈，会话
example: We had a long conversation after class.
exampleChinese: 我们课后进行了一次长谈。

meaning: v. 营救
example: Firefighters rushed in to rescue the child.
exampleChinese: 消防员冲进去营救那个孩子。

meaning: n. 微电脑
example: My father bought a microcomputer for his office.
exampleChinese: 我父亲为办公室买了一台微电脑。

meaning: n. 灯 vt. 照亮 vi. 发亮
example: There is a lamp on my desk.
exampleChinese: 我的书桌上有一盏灯。

meaning: n. 演讲
example: Her lecture on animals was very interesting.
exampleChinese: 她关于动物的演讲非常有趣。

meaning: n. 教师
example: Our teacher gave us a math quiz.
exampleChinese: 我们的老师给我们进行了数学小测验。

meaning: v. 乞讨
example: He went out to beg for food.
exampleChinese: 他出去乞讨食物。

meaning: n. 信任，信赖
example: Trust is important in a friendship.
exampleChinese: 信任在友谊中很重要。

meaning: v. 打，打击 n. 罢工
example: The workers will strike if their pay does not increase.
exampleChinese: 如果工资不涨，工人们就会罢工。

meaning: n. 热水瓶
example: She poured hot tea into a thermos before the trip.
exampleChinese: 她在旅行前把热茶倒进了热水瓶里。

meaning: n. 爱好者 adj. 业余的
example: He is an amateur photographer who takes pictures for fun.
exampleChinese: 他是一名业余摄影爱好者，拍照只是为了好玩。

meaning: n. 三月
example: The soldiers began to march at dawn.
exampleChinese: 士兵们在黎明时开始行军。

meaning: pron. 它的
example: The cat cleaned its paws.
exampleChinese: 那只猫清理了它的爪子。

meaning: n. 电话 v. 打电话
example: I will phone my mother after class.
exampleChinese: 下课后我会给妈妈打电话。

meaning: n. 省
example: This province is famous for its tea.
exampleChinese: 这个省以茶闻名。

meaning: n. 工作场所
example: Our workplace has a quiet room for breaks.
exampleChinese: 我们的工作场所设有一个安静的休息室。

meaning: v. 游戏
example: The children play in the park after school.
exampleChinese: 孩子们放学后在公园里玩。

meaning: v. 回答
example: She did not reply to my email.
exampleChinese: 她没有回复我的电子邮件。

meaning: n. 部
example: He works in the sales department.
exampleChinese: 他在销售部工作。

meaning: n. 意图
example: Her intention was to help the new student.
exampleChinese: 她的意图是帮助那位新同学。

meaning: v. 辅导 n. 导师
example: My sister works as a math tutor.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是一名数学导师。

meaning: n. 毕业
example: My family came to my graduation last week.
exampleChinese: 上周我的家人来参加了我的毕业典礼。

meaning: n. 矛，枪 v. 用矛刺
example: The hunter carried a spear through the forest.
exampleChinese: 猎人带着一支矛穿过森林。

meaning: n. 通讯， 通信
example: Good communication helps a team work well.
exampleChinese: 良好的沟通能帮助团队顺利合作。

meaning: n. 工厂，车间 v. 种植
example: We plant tomatoes in the spring.
exampleChinese: 我们在春天种西红柿。

meaning: v. 听，倾听 vi. 仔细听
example: Please listen to the teacher.
exampleChinese: 请听老师讲。

meaning: pron. 这 adv. 这样地
example: This is my favorite book.
exampleChinese: 这是我最喜欢的书。

meaning: v. 决定
example: We need to decide before Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们需要在星期五之前决定。

meaning: n. 帝国
example: The old empire ruled a large area.
exampleChinese: 那个古老的帝国统治着大片地区。

meaning: n. 工人
example: The worker fixed the broken door.
exampleChinese: 那位工人修好了坏掉的门。

meaning: n. 平日，普通日
example: The bus is crowded on weekday mornings.
exampleChinese: 平日早晨公交车很拥挤。

meaning: adj. 有争议的
example: The new law is highly controversial.
exampleChinese: 这项新法律争议很大。

meaning: n. 公司 v. 交往
example: She works for a food company in Shanghai.
exampleChinese: 她在上海一家食品公司工作。

meaning: adj. 西班牙的 n. 西班牙语
example: She speaks Spanish with her grandparents.
exampleChinese: 她和祖父母说西班牙语。

meaning: n. 英里
example: Our school is one mile from the park.
exampleChinese: 我们学校离公园有一英里。

meaning: adj. 干的 v. 把…弄干 n. 干涸
example: Please dry the dishes after washing them.
exampleChinese: 洗完碗后请把它们擦干。

meaning: n. 裙子 v. 绕过，回避
example: She wore a blue skirt to school.
exampleChinese: 她穿着一条蓝色裙子去上学。

meaning: n. 迹象 v. 签署
example: Please sign your name at the bottom.
exampleChinese: 请在底部签上你的名字。

meaning: n. 游戏室
example: The children played quietly in the playroom.
exampleChinese: 孩子们在游戏室里安静地玩耍。

meaning: n. 洞，孔 v. 凿洞，穿孔
example: There is a hole in my sock.
exampleChinese: 我的袜子上有个洞。

meaning: n. 手指甲
example: He bit his fingernail while waiting for the results.
exampleChinese: 他等待结果时咬着自己的手指甲。

meaning: n. 匙，勺子 v. 用匙舀
example: Use a spoon to eat the soup.
exampleChinese: 用勺子喝汤。

meaning: v. 评定 vt. 估定
example: The teacher will assess our projects tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 老师明天会评定我们的项目。

meaning: adj. 中间的，中部的 n. 中间，中央
example: She sat in the middle of the room.
exampleChinese: 她坐在房间中央。

meaning: n. 卡通片， 动画片 v. 为…画漫画
example: The artist will cartoon the story for the magazine.
exampleChinese: 这位艺术家将为这本杂志把这个故事画成漫画。

meaning: n. 邮件 v. 邮寄 vt. 〈美〉 邮寄
example: I will mail the card tomorrow.
exampleChinese: 我明天会把这张卡片寄出去。

meaning: n. 自助餐厅
example: We ate lunch in the school cafeteria.
exampleChinese: 我们在学校自助餐厅吃了午饭。

meaning: n. 小提琴演奏者
example: The violinist played a beautiful song.
exampleChinese: 那位小提琴演奏者演奏了一首优美的曲子。

meaning: adj. 讨厌的
example: The smell from the trash was unpleasant.
exampleChinese: 垃圾散发出的气味令人不愉快。

meaning: n. 关系
example: They have a good relationship with their neighbors.
exampleChinese: 他们和邻居关系很好。

meaning: n. 接收器
example: The receiver stopped working after the storm.
exampleChinese: 暴风雨过后，接收器停止工作了。

meaning: n. 健康
example: Fresh air and sleep are important for health.
exampleChinese: 新鲜空气和睡眠对健康很重要。

meaning: n. 豌豆
example: She added a pea to her salad.
exampleChinese: 她在沙拉里加了一颗豌豆。

meaning: v. 烧，烤 n. 烤架，铁格子
example: Dad will grill the fish for dinner.
exampleChinese: 爸爸会把鱼烤来当晚餐。

meaning: n. 垒球
example: Our class will play softball after school.
exampleChinese: 我们班放学后要打垒球。

meaning: n. 海藻
example: Seaweed washed up on the beach.
exampleChinese: 海藻被冲上了海滩。

meaning: n. 珊瑚 adj. 珊瑚的
example: The coral reef was full of colorful fish.
exampleChinese: 这片珊瑚礁里有很多色彩斑斓的鱼。

meaning: n. 冲进 adj. 急需的 v. 使冲
example: I had to rush to catch the early bus.
exampleChinese: 我不得不赶紧去赶早班公交车。

meaning: adj. 狭窄的，有限的 n. 海峡 v. 使变狭窄
example: We walked through a narrow street near the station.
exampleChinese: 我们走过了车站附近一条狭窄的街道。

meaning: v. 引导 n. 靴子
example: Please boot the computer before class starts.
exampleChinese: 请在上课前启动这台电脑。

meaning: n. 爪 v. 用爪抓（或挖）
example: The crab used its claw to पकड़?
exampleChinese: 螃蟹用它的爪子抓住了食物。

meaning: v. 回答
example: Can you answer my question now?
exampleChinese: 你现在能回答我的问题吗？

meaning: v. 拥有 adj. 自己的
example: They own a small shop near the school.
exampleChinese: 他们在学校附近拥有一家小商店。

meaning: n. 韵律 v. 使押韵
example: The teacher asked us to rhyme the last two lines.
exampleChinese: 老师让我们让最后两行押韵。

meaning: adj. 很可能的 adv. 很可能
example: It is likely to rain this afternoon.
exampleChinese: 今天下午很可能会下雨。

meaning: adj. 平的 n. 平原 adv. 清楚地
example: We walked across the plain for hours.
exampleChinese: 我们走过这片平原走了好几个小时。

meaning: n. 法国人
example: The Frenchman spoke English with a soft accent.
exampleChinese: 那位法国人说英语带着轻柔的口音。

meaning: n. 社会主义
example: She studied the history of socialism in school.
exampleChinese: 她在学校学习了社会主义的历史。

meaning: n. 经验 vt. 经历
example: Experience taught him to be more careful.
exampleChinese: 经验教会了他要更加小心。

meaning: adj. 可怕的
example: The food at that restaurant was awful.
exampleChinese: 那家餐馆的食物极坏。

meaning: n. 申请人，申请者
example: Each applicant must fill out the form carefully.
exampleChinese: 每位申请人都必须认真填写表格。

meaning: v. 说话
example: Please speak slowly so everyone can understand.
exampleChinese: 请说慢一点，这样每个人都能听懂。

meaning: n. 女售货员
example: The saleswoman showed me a blue jacket.
exampleChinese: 那位女售货员给我看了一件蓝色夹克。

meaning: adj. 第十二的，第十二个的 n. 第十二
example: Her birthday is on the twelfth of May.
exampleChinese: 她的生日在五月十二日。

meaning: v. 钉 n. 指甲
example: He used a hammer to nail the board to the wall.
exampleChinese: 他用锤子把木板钉到墙上。

meaning: n. 幻想 adj. 想象的 v. 想象
example: I fancy a quiet walk after dinner.
exampleChinese: 晚饭后我想象着去安静地散步。

meaning: n. 残疾
example: The school added a ramp for students with a disability.
exampleChinese: 学校为有残疾的学生加了一条坡道。

meaning: adv. 此外 prep. 除…之外
example: Besides math, she also likes art.
exampleChinese: 除了数学，她还喜欢美术。

meaning: n. 开始
example: The beginning of the movie was very exciting.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的开头非常精彩。

meaning: n. 岩石 v. 摇动
example: The boy sat on a large rock by the river.
exampleChinese: 那个男孩坐在河边的一块大岩石上。

meaning: v. 背叛 vt. 出卖
example: He refused to betray his friend.
exampleChinese: 他拒绝背叛自己的朋友。

meaning: n. 土地 v. 弄脏
example: Rain can soil your shoes on this muddy road.
exampleChinese: 这条泥泞的路上，雨水会弄脏你的鞋子。

meaning: n. 日落
example: We watched the sunset from the hill.
exampleChinese: 我们在山上观看了日落。

meaning: v. 允许
example: My parents allow me to ride my bike to school.
exampleChinese: 我父母允许我骑自行车上学。

meaning: n. 职员，办事员 v. 当销售员，当店员
example: The clerk helped me find the right notebook.
exampleChinese: 店员帮我找到了合适的笔记本。

meaning: n. 圣歌 v. 唱
example: We heard the monks chant in the temple.
exampleChinese: 我们听见僧人在寺庙里吟唱。

meaning: adj. 多云的
example: The sky is cloudy this morning.
exampleChinese: 今天早上的天空多云。

meaning: adv. 在这里 int. 嘿！ n. 这里
example: Please wait here for your teacher.
exampleChinese: 请在这里等你的老师。

meaning: n. 价格 v. 给……定价
example: The store will price the shoes at fifty dollars.
exampleChinese: 这家商店会把这双鞋定价为五十美元。

meaning: n. 新娘
example: The bride smiled as she walked down the aisle.
exampleChinese: 新娘走上过道时笑了。

meaning: n. 挑战 v. 向…挑战
example: Climbing the mountain was a real challenge.
exampleChinese: 爬这座山是真正的挑战。

meaning: adj. 痛苦的
example: He felt painful after the long race.
exampleChinese: 长跑结束后他感到很痛苦。

meaning: n. 垫子 v. 给…安上垫子
example: She put a soft cushion on the chair.
exampleChinese: 她在椅子上放了一个柔软的垫子。

meaning: n. 油田
example: Workers drilled for oil in the oilfield.
exampleChinese: 工人们在油田里钻井。

meaning: v. 安装 adj. 健康的 n. 合身
example: This key does not fit the door.
exampleChinese: 这把钥匙打不开这扇门。

meaning: n. 值 v. 评价 vt. 估价
example: The value of this old coin is high.
exampleChinese: 这枚旧硬币的价值很高。

meaning: n. 场面
example: That scene in the movie made everyone laugh.
exampleChinese: 电影里的那个镜头让大家都笑了。

meaning: adj. 冰冻的
example: The lake felt freezing in the morning.
exampleChinese: 早晨湖水冷得刺骨。

meaning: adj. 野生的 n. 荒野 adv. 疯狂地
example: We saw wild ducks by the lake.
exampleChinese: 我们在湖边看到了野鸭。

meaning: n. 风景
example: We stopped to enjoy the scenery.
exampleChinese: 我们停下来欣赏风景。

meaning: n. 人行道 adv. 斜地里 adj. 旁边的
example: She walked along the sideway to school.
exampleChinese: 她沿着人行道去上学。

meaning: n. 鱿鱼
example: We ordered squid for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我们晚餐点了鱿鱼。

meaning: adj. 方便的
example: It is convenient to pay by phone here.
exampleChinese: 在这里用手机付款很方便。

meaning: adj. 黑暗的，深色的 n. 黑暗
example: It gets dark early in winter.
exampleChinese: 冬天黑得很早。

meaning: n. 零点 num. 零
example: The answer is zero.
exampleChinese: 答案是零。

meaning: adj. 有趣的
example: This science book is very interesting.
exampleChinese: 这本科普书很有趣。

meaning: n. 炸土豆条
example: I ate chips with my sandwich.
exampleChinese: 我吃三明治时配了炸土豆条。

meaning: n. 糖 v. 加糖于
example: I take sugar in my coffee.
exampleChinese: 我喝咖啡时加糖。

meaning: n. 丝绸 adj. 丝的 vi. （玉米）处于长须的阶段中
example: She wore a silk scarf in spring.
exampleChinese: 她在春天戴了一条丝绸围巾。

meaning: n. 点头
example: She gave a nod and walked away.
exampleChinese: 她点了点头，然后走开了。

meaning: v. 使漂浮 n. 彩车，花车
example: The balloon will float on the water.
exampleChinese: 气球会漂浮在水面上。

meaning: v. 信任 vt. 相信
example: I believe my best friend.
exampleChinese: 我信任我最好的朋友。

meaning: n. 妈妈
example: My mom makes noodles for dinner.
exampleChinese: 我妈妈晚饭做面条。

meaning: n. 六月
example: Our summer trip starts in June.
exampleChinese: 我们的暑假旅行从六月开始。

meaning: n. 治疗，疗法
example: The doctor started treatment right away.
exampleChinese: 医生马上开始了治疗。

meaning: n. 视力 v. 看见 adj. 见票即付的
example: My grandmother still has good sight.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶的视力仍然很好。

meaning: adj. 静的，平静的 v. 使平静 n. 风平浪静
example: She stayed calm during the test.
exampleChinese: 考试时她保持镇定。

meaning: n. 丰富，大量 adj. 足够的 adv. 足够
example: We have plenty of time before the train leaves.
exampleChinese: 火车出发前我们还有 plenty 的时间。

meaning: n. 导弹 adj. 导弹的
example: The missile hit its target.
exampleChinese: 导弹击中了目标。

meaning: n. 环境
example: We should protect the environment together.
exampleChinese: 我们应该一起保护环境。

meaning: pron. 任何人
example: Anyone can join the school club.
exampleChinese: 任何人都可以加入学校社团。

meaning: adv. 清晰地
example: She spoke clearly so everyone could hear.
exampleChinese: 她说得很清晰，大家都能听见。

meaning: n. 气候
example: The climate here is warm and dry.
exampleChinese: 这里的气候温暖而干燥。

meaning: v. 表现
example: Please behave well in the library.
exampleChinese: 请在图书馆里表现得规矩一些。

meaning: v. 删除
example: Please delete this file.
exampleChinese: 请删除这个文件。

meaning: v. 呼叫 n. 电话 vt. 称呼
example: Please call me when you get home.
exampleChinese: 你到家时请给我打电话。

meaning: n. 大灾难
example: The flood was a catastrophe for the town.
exampleChinese: 那场洪水对小镇来说是一场大灾难。

meaning: n. 轨道 v. 盘旋
example: The moon goes around Earth in orbit.
exampleChinese: 月球沿着轨道绕地球运行。

meaning: n. 海关
example: We showed our passports at customs.
exampleChinese: 我们在海关出示了护照。

meaning: adj. 下雪的，多雪的
example: It was a snowy morning in January.
exampleChinese: 那是一个一月的下雪早晨。

meaning: n. 浪费 adj. 废弃的
example: Food waste is a big problem.
exampleChinese: 食物浪费是一个大问题。

meaning: n. 注意 v. 注重，考虑
example: We must regard safety as the first rule.
exampleChinese: 我们必须把安全视为第一条规则。

meaning: n. 共产主义
example: He studied the history of communism.
exampleChinese: 他研究了共产主义的历史。

meaning: adv. 较少地 adj. 较少的 prep. 减去
example: I drink less coffee now.
exampleChinese: 我现在喝更少的咖啡了。

meaning: adj. 法国的 n. 法国人
example: The French are famous for their cuisine.
exampleChinese: 法国人以他们的美食而闻名。

meaning: v. 减少
example: This rule will reduce waste.
exampleChinese: 这条规定会减少浪费。

meaning: n. 鉴定，识别
example: The guard checked my identification.
exampleChinese: 警卫检查了我的身份识别信息。

meaning: n. 字母表，字母系统
example: The teacher wrote the alphabet on the board.
exampleChinese: 老师把字母表写在了黑板上。

meaning: n. 律师
example: My lawyer explained the contract.
exampleChinese: 我的律师解释了这份合同。

meaning: n. 月亮 v. 闲荡
example: The moon looks bright tonight.
exampleChinese: 今晚的月亮看起来很明亮。

meaning: n. 机器人
example: The robot can clean the floor by itself.
exampleChinese: 这个机器人可以自己清扫地板。

meaning: num. 十九
example: She is nineteen years old this year.
exampleChinese: 她今年十九岁。

meaning: v. 叹息
example: He let out a sigh of relief.
exampleChinese: 他如释重负地叹了口气。

meaning: n. 食物
example: We bought fresh food at the market.
exampleChinese: 我们在市场买了新鲜食物。

meaning: v. 提高 n. 高地 vt. 举起
example: We should raise our hands before speaking.
exampleChinese: 我们发言前应该举手。

meaning: v. 加强
example: Regular practice can strengthen your memory.
exampleChinese: 经常练习可以加强你的记忆力。

meaning: n. 联盟 v. 使…结盟
example: Our school joined a local league last year.
exampleChinese: 我们学校去年加入了一个地方联盟。

meaning: n. 剪刀 v. 剪开
example: Please use the scissors to cut the paper.
exampleChinese: 请用剪刀把纸剪开。

meaning: v. 使出汗 n. 汗
example: The hot weather made him sweat.
exampleChinese: 炎热的天气让他出汗了。

meaning: v. 反映 vt. 反射
example: The windows reflect the bright sunlight.
exampleChinese: 窗户反射出明亮的阳光。

meaning: n. 深处 adj. 深的 adv. 深入地
example: The lake is very deep near the bridge.
exampleChinese: 桥附近的湖水很深。

meaning: n. 牙齿 vt. 给……装齿 vi. 啮合
example: My tooth hurts when I eat ice cream.
exampleChinese: 我吃冰淇淋时牙齿会疼。

meaning: adj. 橙色的 n. 橙
example: She wore an orange hat today.
exampleChinese: 她今天戴了一顶橙色的帽子。

meaning: v. 阻止 vt. 禁止
example: The school rules prohibit smoking on campus.
exampleChinese: 学校规定禁止在校园内吸烟。

meaning: n. 财政，财政学 v. 负担经费
example: My parents finance my college education.
exampleChinese: 我的父母负担我的大学教育费用。

meaning: v. 统治
example: The old king used to rule the country wisely.
exampleChinese: 那位老国王过去曾明智地统治这个国家。

meaning: n. 坦克 v. 把…贮放在柜内
example: They tank the water for the village during dry months.
exampleChinese: 在干旱的月份里，他们把水贮放在罐里供村子使用。

meaning: adj. 值得的 n. 杰出人物
example: It was a worthy goal to help the poor.
exampleChinese: 帮助穷人是一个值得的目标。

meaning: v. 通讯，传达
example: We communicate by email every week.
exampleChinese: 我们每周都通过电子邮件沟通。

meaning: n. 人口
example: The city's population is growing fast.
exampleChinese: 这座城市的人口增长很快。

meaning: n. 影响
example: Her teacher had a strong influence on her future plans.
exampleChinese: 她的老师对她未来的计划有很大影响。

meaning: n. 大洋洲
example: Australia is part of Oceania.
exampleChinese: 澳大利亚是大洋洲的一部分。

meaning: adj. 高尚的 n. 贵族 vt. 抓住
example: She has a noble heart and helps everyone.
exampleChinese: 她心地高尚，总是帮助每个人。

meaning: n. 刀 v. 用刀切
example: He cut the apple with a knife.
exampleChinese: 他用刀切苹果。

meaning: n. 孙子
example: Her grandson visits every Sunday.
exampleChinese: 她的孙子每个星期天都来探望。

meaning: n. 革命
example: The French Revolution changed the country forever.
exampleChinese: 法国革命永远改变了这个国家。

meaning: n. 克隆 v. 无性繁殖
example: Scientists can clone some plants in a lab.
exampleChinese: 科学家可以在实验室里无性繁殖一些植物。

meaning: n. 岗位 v. 张贴 vt. 投寄
example: Please post the notice on the wall.
exampleChinese: 请把通知张贴在墙上。

meaning: n. 群 v. 隆起
example: A bunch of flowers sat on the table.
exampleChinese: 桌子上放着一束花。

meaning: n. 二十 adj. 二十的
example: The class has twenty students.
exampleChinese: 这个班有二十名学生。

meaning: n. 军队 v. 群集
example: The troop moved quietly through the forest.
exampleChinese: 这支军队悄悄穿过森林。

meaning: n. 袋鼠
example: We saw a kangaroo at the zoo yesterday.
exampleChinese: 我们昨天在动物园看到了一只袋鼠。

meaning: adj. 亲爱的 adv. 高价地 int. 哎呀
example: She is a dear friend of mine.
exampleChinese: 她是我的一位亲爱的朋友。

meaning: n. 福利 adj. 福利的
example: Good schools improve children's welfare.
exampleChinese: 好学校能改善孩子们的福利。

meaning: v. 卷 n. 卷，卷形物
example: He will roll the carpet before moving.
exampleChinese: 他会在搬家前把地毯卷起来。

meaning: n. 说明，解释
example: Her explanation made the math problem clear.
exampleChinese: 她的解释让这道数学题变得清楚了。

meaning: v. 感觉 vi. 摸索
example: I can feel the sun on my face.
exampleChinese: 我能感觉到阳光照在脸上。

meaning: adj. 疯狂的 n. 狂怒
example: Dad was mad about the broken window.
exampleChinese: 爸爸因为窗户破了很生气。

meaning: n. 松鼠 v. 贮藏
example: The squirrel buried nuts in the ground.
exampleChinese: 那只松鼠把坚果埋在地里。

meaning: pron. 她（主格） n. 女人
example: She is my best friend.
exampleChinese: 她是我最好的朋友。

meaning: n. 目的地
example: Our destination is the city museum.
exampleChinese: 我们的目的地是城市博物馆。

meaning: v. 使…相异 vi. 不一致
example: The two reports differ in one important detail.
exampleChinese: 这两份报告在一个重要细节上不一致。

meaning: n. 包装
example: Please pack your books in this box.
exampleChinese: 请把你的书打包放进这个箱子里。

meaning: n. 海员，水手
example: The seaman repaired the rope on the deck.
exampleChinese: 那个海员修好了甲板上的绳子。

meaning: n. 恐怖
example: The sudden noise filled the room with terror.
exampleChinese: 突如其来的噪音让房间里充满了恐怖。

meaning: n. 力量 v. 促使，推动 vt. 强迫
example: Good habits can force change over time.
exampleChinese: 好习惯随着时间推移能促成改变。

meaning: n. 讨论
example: We had a long discussion about the plan.
exampleChinese: 我们就这个计划进行了长时间的讨论。

meaning: n. 车站 v. 配置
example: We will meet at the bus station.
exampleChinese: 我们将在公交车站见面。

meaning: n. 商业
example: Her family runs a small business.
exampleChinese: 她家经营一家小生意。

meaning: n. 奶奶
example: My granny tells funny stories.
exampleChinese: 我奶奶讲有趣的故事。

meaning: adj. 阿拉伯的 n. 阿拉伯语
example: She can read Arabic and speak it a little.
exampleChinese: 她会读阿拉伯语，还会说一点。

meaning: n. 骨 v. 剔去的骨
example: He felt a bone in the fish while eating.
exampleChinese: 他吃鱼时感觉到里面有一根骨头。

meaning: adj. 好的 adv. 行 int. 好
example: The plan looks OK to me.
exampleChinese: 我觉得这个计划还不错。

meaning: n. （基督教的）主教
example: The bishop gave a speech at the church.
exampleChinese: 那位主教在教堂发表了讲话。

meaning: n. 拒绝
example: Their refusal surprised everyone in the room.
exampleChinese: 他们的拒绝让屋里所有人都很惊讶。

meaning: adj. 渴望的
example: The children were eager to start the game.
exampleChinese: 孩子们急切地想开始游戏。

meaning: vt. 分析
example: We will analyse the results after the test.
exampleChinese: 我们会在考试后分析结果。

meaning: v. 抓，划破 n. 乱写
example: The cat can scratch the sofa in seconds.
exampleChinese: 那只猫几秒钟就能把沙发抓破。

meaning: n. 防御
example: Strong walls improve the defence of the city.
exampleChinese: 坚固的城墙加强了这座城市的防御。

meaning: pron. 任何人
example: If anybody calls, tell them I am out.
exampleChinese: 如果有任何人打电话来，就告诉他们我出去了。

meaning: n. 心理学
example: She studied psychology at university.
exampleChinese: 她在大学里学习心理学。

meaning: n. 赞成
example: The teacher nodded in approval.
exampleChinese: 老师点头表示赞成。

meaning: adj. 没有希望的
example: After many losses, the team felt hopeless.
exampleChinese: 经历了多次失败后，这支队伍感到没有希望了。

meaning: n. 电子邮件 vt. 给…发电子邮件
example: I will e-mail you the homework tonight.
exampleChinese: 我今晚会把作业用电子邮件发给你。

meaning: n. 个性化
example: The app offers personalization for each user.
exampleChinese: 这款应用为每位用户提供个性化设置。

meaning: prep. 在…上面
example: A cat jumped upon the wall.
exampleChinese: 一只猫跳到了墙上。

meaning: n. 体育馆
example: I go to the gym after school on Fridays.
exampleChinese: 我每周五放学后去健身房。

meaning: n. 方向
example: The road changed direction near the river.
exampleChinese: 这条路在河边改变了方向。

meaning: adj. 南极的 n. 南极地区
example: We saw an Antarctic research station on TV.
exampleChinese: 我们在电视上看到一个南极科考站。

meaning: vt. 认出
example: I recognize her voice right away.
exampleChinese: 我一下子就认出了她的声音。

meaning: adv. 很可能
example: She will probably arrive after lunch.
exampleChinese: 她大概会在午饭后到。

meaning: n. 铝
example: The can is made of aluminum.
exampleChinese: 这个罐子是铝制的。

meaning: v. 扯破 n. 眼泪
example: The wind made her tear the paper.
exampleChinese: 风把她手里的纸扯破了。

meaning: n. 攻击
example: The sudden attack scared the villagers.
exampleChinese: 这次突然的攻击吓坏了村民。

meaning: n. 离婚 vt. 使离婚
example: Their divorce was final last week.
exampleChinese: 他们的离婚在上周正式生效了。

meaning: adj. 失望的
example: She felt disappointed after the test results came back.
exampleChinese: 考试结果出来后，她感到很失望。

meaning: vt. 警告
example: The teacher warned us not to run in the hall.
exampleChinese: 老师提醒我们不要在走廊里跑。

meaning: adj. 苍白的
example: His face turned pale when he heard the bad news.
exampleChinese: 听到这个坏消息时，他的脸变得苍白。

meaning: vi. 旅行
example: My grandparents travel by train every spring.
exampleChinese: 我的祖父母每年春天都坐火车旅行。

meaning: adj. 难以置信的
example: The ending of the movie was unbelievable.
exampleChinese: 这部电影的结局令人难以置信。

meaning: adv. 向上
example: The balloon rose upwards into the sky.
exampleChinese: 气球向上升到了天空中。

meaning: n. 人行道
example: We walked along the pavement to the bus stop.
exampleChinese: 我们沿着人行道走到公交车站。

meaning: adj. 积极的
example: She has a positive attitude toward life.
exampleChinese: 她对生活有积极的态度。

meaning: vt. 服务， 招待
example: These buses serve the whole town.
exampleChinese: 这些公交车为整个城镇服务。

meaning: n. 教授
example: Our professor gave us a clear answer.
exampleChinese: 我们的教授给了我们一个清楚的答案。

meaning: adj. 真正的， 确实的
example: Is this story true?
exampleChinese: 这个故事是真的吗？

meaning: n. 症状
example: A cough can be a symptom of a cold.
exampleChinese: 咳嗽可能是感冒的一种症状。

meaning: vt. 烦扰
example: Sorry to bother you during dinner.
exampleChinese: 对不起，在你吃晚饭时打扰你了。

meaning: n. 朝代
example: The museum tells the story of the dynasty.
exampleChinese: 这座博物馆讲述了那个朝代的故事。

meaning: v. 〔狗〕吠叫 n. 狗叫声
example: The dog began to bark at the stranger.
exampleChinese: 那只狗开始对陌生人吠叫。

meaning: n. 现代化
example: The city needs an update to its old roads.
exampleChinese: 这座城市需要对老旧道路进行现代化改造。

meaning: n. 纳税人
example: Every taxpayer should know where the money goes.
exampleChinese: 每个纳税人都应该知道钱花到哪里去了。

meaning: n. 烟火
example: The fireworks lit up the night sky.
exampleChinese: 烟火照亮了夜空。

meaning: prep. 从
example: This letter is from my cousin in Beijing.
exampleChinese: 这封信来自我在北京的表弟。

meaning: adv. 不停的
example: The baby cried non-stop all night.
exampleChinese: 那个婴儿整晚不停地哭。

meaning: n. 光辉
example: A ray of light came through the window.
exampleChinese: 一道光线透过窗户照了进来。

meaning: n. 杂货
example: I bought milk and bread at the grocery.
exampleChinese: 我在杂货店买了牛奶和面包。

meaning: adj. 官方的， 政府的 n. 官员
example: This is the official school notice.
exampleChinese: 这是一则官方的学校通知。

meaning: v. 犹豫
example: Please hesitate if you need more time.
exampleChinese: 如果你需要更多时间，请先犹豫一下。

meaning: adj. 天主教的
example: She attends a Catholic school.
exampleChinese: 她上的是一所天主教学校。

meaning: n. 边缘
example: The farm is close to the border.
exampleChinese: 那个农场靠近边界。

meaning: adj. 特殊的
example: The teacher asked for a specific example.
exampleChinese: 老师要求举一个特定的例子。

meaning: adj. 正确的
example: The map must be accurate for the hike.
exampleChinese: 这张地图必须准确，适合徒步。

meaning: n. 保证
example: This medicine has a safety guarantee.
exampleChinese: 这种药有安全保证。

meaning: adv. 向外 adj. 向外的
example: The door opened outwards.
exampleChinese: 门向外打开。

meaning: n. 参观
example: We plan to tour the old city by bus.
exampleChinese: 我们计划乘公交车游览这座古城。

meaning: n. 〈总称〉 家具
example: We bought new furniture for the living room.
exampleChinese: 我们给客厅买了新家具。

meaning: v. 捐赠
example: Many people donate books to the village library.
exampleChinese: 许多人向乡村图书馆捐赠书籍。

meaning: vt. 占领
example: The army tried to occupy the city.
exampleChinese: 军队试图占领这座城市。

meaning: n. 纪念品
example: I bought a souvenir from the trip.
exampleChinese: 我买了一件旅行纪念品。

meaning: adj. 羊毛的
example: She wore a woolen coat in winter.
exampleChinese: 她冬天穿着一件羊毛外套。

meaning: n. 寡妇
example: The widow lived alone after her husband died.
exampleChinese: 她的丈夫去世后，这位寡妇独自生活。

meaning: n. 过客
example: A passer-by helped the lost child.
exampleChinese: 一位过路人帮助了那个迷路的孩子。

meaning: adv. 后来
example: We went home afterwards.
exampleChinese: 我们后来回家了。

meaning: v. 收缩
example: Wet clothes shrink in the dryer.
exampleChinese: 湿衣服在烘干机里会收缩。

meaning: v. 伤害
example: Be careful not to hurt your knee.
exampleChinese: 小心别弄伤你的膝盖。

meaning: vt. 指出
example: The map can indicate the safest road to school.
exampleChinese: 这张地图可以指出去学校最安全的路。

meaning: v. 用以构成疑问句及否定句 vt. 做，干
example: I do my homework after dinner.
exampleChinese: 我晚饭后做作业。

meaning: n. 杀虫剂
example: Farmers use pesticide to protect their crops.
exampleChinese: 农民使用杀虫剂来保护他们的庄稼。

meaning: adj. 假的
example: The report was false, so we checked the facts again.
exampleChinese: 那份报告是假的，所以我们又核实了一遍事实。

meaning: n. 无轨电车
example: We rode the trolleybus across the city center.
exampleChinese: 我们乘无轨电车穿过市中心。

meaning: n. 大使夫人
example: The ambassadress attended the charity dinner.
exampleChinese: 大使夫人出席了那场慈善晚宴。

meaning: adv. 以某种方式
example: Somehow, she found her keys in the dark room.
exampleChinese: 她不知怎么地在黑暗的房间里找到了钥匙。

meaning: adv. 向东
example: The train moved eastward through the valley.
exampleChinese: 火车向东驶过山谷。

meaning: n. 损伤
example: He had a knee injury from the soccer game.
exampleChinese: 他在足球比赛中膝盖受了伤。

meaning: adj. 有活力的
example: Our class has a dynamic teacher who makes lessons fun.
exampleChinese: 我们班有一位很有活力的老师，她让课堂变得有趣。

meaning: n. 程度
example: Water freezes at zero degree Celsius.
exampleChinese: 水在零摄氏度结冰。

meaning: adj. 逐渐的
example: Her English improved in a gradual way over time.
exampleChinese: 她的英语随着时间推移逐渐提高了。

meaning: adj. 在前的
example: She read the previous chapter again before the test.
exampleChinese: 她在考试前又读了一遍前一章。

meaning: n. 研究会
example: Our class will attend a science seminar this Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们班这周五将参加一个科学研究会。

meaning: v. 练习
example: I practise the piano for twenty minutes every day.
exampleChinese: 我每天练习钢琴二十分钟。

meaning: adv. 在高处
example: A plane flew overhead as we sat in the park.
exampleChinese: 我们坐在公园里时，一架飞机从头顶飞过。

meaning: n. 行为
example: Good behaviour is important at school.
exampleChinese: 在学校里，良好的行为很重要。

meaning: prep. 向， 朝， 对于
example: She walked towards the school gate.
exampleChinese: 她朝学校大门走去。

meaning: n. 罐头
example: I can swim across the small river.
exampleChinese: 我能游过这条小河。

meaning: v. 满足
example: This meal will satisfy your hunger.
exampleChinese: 这顿饭会满足你的饥饿感。

meaning: adj. 勤劳的
example: My sister is a hard-working student who finishes her homework early.
exampleChinese: 我姐姐是个勤劳的学生，总是很早完成作业。

meaning: v. 想要
example: We intend to finish the project by Friday.
exampleChinese: 我们想要在周五前完成这个项目。
